products.name: MisAdi Beso
products.description: MisAdi Beso is a pre-filled syringe containing 24 mg/mL cross-linked hyaluronic acid with lidocaine hydrochloride and Vitamin B12, buffered in phosphate-buffered saline at physiological pH 7. The formulation is designed for lip augmentation and perioral contouring, providing immediate volumizing effect while lidocaine reduces procedural discomfort and Vitamin B12 supports tissue vitality. The 1 mL volume is calibrated for single-session lip enhancement.
products.indication: Designed for soft tissue volume augmentation, including refinement and definition of the lip area. Intended for practitioners seeking a volumizing filler suitable for moderate to deeper placement.
products.packaging: Supplied as a single pre-filled syringe of 1 mL containing cross-linked HA at 24 mg/mL with lidocaine.
products.protocol: Administer via linear threading or serial puncture technique into the mid-dermis or vermillion border using a 27–30G needle; aspirate before each bolus. For lip augmentation, inject 0.05–0.1 mL per point along the vermillion border and body of the lip. Total dose per session typically 0.5–1.0 mL. Repeat at 6–12 month intervals based on clinical assessment.

products.name: REGENOVUE FINE (CE)
products.description: Regenovue Fine (CE) is a monophasic cross-linked hyaluronic acid dermal filler at 24 mg/mL, manufactured using SHAPE technology for uniform particle size and smooth tissue integration. Its low gel hardness (G') is optimized for superficial intradermal placement, targeting fine periorbital lines, lip lines, and superficial forehead rhytids. The CE marking confirms conformity with European Medical Device Directive standards.
products.indication: Suitable for the correction of fine lines and superficial skin depressions. Recommended for use in areas where light, superficial filler placement is the practitioner's objective.
products.packaging: Supplied as a single pre-filled syringe of 1.1 mL containing hyaluronic acid at 24 mg/mL.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally into the superficial dermis using a 30–32G needle via serial puncture or linear threading technique. Inject 0.02–0.05 mL per puncture point; total session volume typically 0.5–1.1 mL depending on treatment area. Massage gently post-injection to ensure even distribution. Recommend touch-up at 2 weeks if needed; repeat treatment at 6–9 months.

products.name: REGENOVUE DEEP (CE)
products.description: Regenovue Deep (CE) is a monophasic cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler at 24 mg/mL engineered with higher gel cohesivity and elasticity than Regenovue Fine, designed for mid-to-deep dermal placement. It targets moderate nasolabial folds, marionette lines, and cheek volume restoration, providing durable lift with natural tissue integration. The CE marking confirms conformity with applicable European device standards.
products.indication: Suitable for moderate facial folds and mid-depth volume restoration. Intended for use in areas requiring filler support beyond the superficial dermis.
products.packaging: Supplied as a single pre-filled syringe of 1.1 mL containing hyaluronic acid at 24 mg/mL.
products.protocol: Inject into the mid-to-deep dermis using a 27G needle via retrograde linear threading or fanning technique; aspirate before each bolus to confirm extravascular placement. Deliver 0.1–0.3 mL per depot in nasolabial folds or cheek hollows. Typical session volume 1.0–2.0 mL. Massage to contour post-injection. Reassess at 2 weeks; longevity typically 9–12 months.

products.name: REGENOVUE SUB-Q (CE)
products.description: Regenovue Sub-Q (CE) is a highly cross-linked, high-viscosity hyaluronic acid filler at 24 mg/mL formulated for supraperiosteal and subcutaneous placement in deep volumetric procedures. Its high G' and cohesivity make it suited for chin projection, jawline definition, malar augmentation, and non-surgical rhinoplasty. The CE marking confirms conformity with European Medical Device Directive standards.

products.protocol: Administer via bolus technique supraperiosteally or in the deep subcutaneous plane using a 23–25G needle or blunt cannula; always aspirate before depositing each bolus. Deliver 0.3–0.5 mL per depot; total volume 1–3 mL per session depending on indication. Mold and sculpt immediately after injection. Longevity 12–18 months; reassess at 4 weeks.

products.name: LINE BODY 50
products.specification: Body Filler 50 mL x 1 Syr, HA 20 mg/mL
products.description: Line Body 50 is a large-volume cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 20 mg/mL, supplied in a 50 mL single-use syringe for substantial body reshaping procedures. Its high-viscosity gel is designed for deep subcutaneous placement across broader body areas such as gluteal augmentation, hip shaping, and thigh volume restoration. The absence of lidocaine in this formulation means procedural anaesthesia should be planned as part of the treatment protocol.
products.indication: Suitable for body shaping and large-area volume restoration procedures conducted by trained aesthetic professionals in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 50 mL sterile pre-filled syringe, one syringe per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer at the deep subcutaneous plane using an 18–21G cannula via retrograde fanning, depositing volumes guided by target anatomy and patient goals (typically 20–50 mL per session distributed across bilateral zones). Pre-treatment tumescent or local anaesthesia is recommended. Staged sessions 4–8 weeks apart optimise outcomes. Results last 12–18 months; reversible with hyaluronidase.

products.name: MisAdi Hard
products.description: MisAdi Hard is a high-viscosity cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 24 mg/mL, supplied in a 60 cc presentation for deep subcutaneous body contouring. Its firm gel structure maintains projection and resists migration after placement, supporting non-surgical augmentation of the buttocks, hips, and soft-tissue deficiency correction following liposuction. The elevated HA concentration relative to standard body fillers delivers denser structural support.
products.indication: Designed for body contouring and large-area volume restoration intended for qualified aesthetic practitioners working in clinical environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 60 cc sterile unit, one unit per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Inject at the deep subcutaneous plane using an 18–21G blunt cannula via retrograde fanning or layered depot technique, distributing 20–30 mL per side per session in gluteal augmentation. Pre-treatment with local anaesthesia or tumescent solution is standard. Allow 6–8 weeks between staged sessions; total treatment volume guided by anatomical goals. Results last 12–18 months and are reversible with hyaluronidase.

products.name: AdiMis
products.description: AdiMis is a high-volume cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 24 mg/mL, supplied in an 80 cc presentation for large-area non-surgical body sculpting. Its dense, cohesive gel structure supports significant subcutaneous volume augmentation across areas such as the buttocks, hips, and thighs in a single treatment session, minimising the need for multiple staged visits. The 80 cc volume provides flexibility for bilateral procedures within one clinical appointment.
products.indication: Intended for body shaping and high-volume contouring procedures suitable for trained medical aesthetic professionals in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as an 80 cc sterile unit, one unit per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer at the deep subcutaneous plane bilaterally using an 18–21G cannula via retrograde fanning, distributing up to 40 mL per side per session depending on aesthetic goals and tissue assessment. Pre-treatment local or tumescent anaesthesia is recommended. Staged sessions may be planned 6–8 weeks apart for additional correction. Results last approximately 12–18 months; reversible with hyaluronidase.

products.name: SEDY FILL
products.description: Sedy Fill is a cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 24 mg/mL produced using HENM cross-linking technology, supplied in a 60 cc presentation for deep subcutaneous body contouring. Its 18% cross-linking density yields a pH-balanced, migration-resistant gel that maintains natural contour and position after subcutaneous placement. Clinical data support a 12–15 month aesthetic duration with 92% patient satisfaction and full reversibility with hyaluronidase within 48 hours.
products.indication: Designed for body contouring and large-area volumization procedures intended for qualified practitioners performing aesthetic body work.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 60 cc sterile unit, one unit per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Inject at the deep subcutaneous plane using an 18–21G blunt cannula via retrograde fanning technique, placing 20–30 mL per buttock or target zone per session. Pre-treatment local or tumescent anaesthesia is standard practice. For breast applications, a maximum of 10 mL per side is typically applied. Staged sessions are planned 6–8 weeks apart; results last 12–15 months.

products.name: MAXY FILL
products.description: Maxy Fill is a cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 24 mg/mL manufactured by Quivermedic using HENM cross-linking technology, supplied in a 70 cc presentation for non-surgical body augmentation. Its high-viscosity, migration-resistant gel supports volume addition and contour sculpting in areas including the buttocks, hips, and thighs, with aesthetic results lasting up to 12–15 months under normal metabolic conditions. The 70 cc volume accommodates bilateral gluteal augmentation of 30–40 mL per side within a single session.
products.indication: Suitable for body contouring and large-area volume restoration procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 70 cc sterile unit, one unit per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer at the deep subcutaneous plane using an 18–21G blunt cannula via retrograde fanning, targeting 30–40 mL per buttock for standard gluteal augmentation. Pre-treatment with tumescent or local anaesthesia is recommended. For hip or thigh contouring, volume is adjusted to anatomy. Results last 12–15 months and are fully reversible with hyaluronidase.

products.name: WANNA FILL H
products.description: Wanna Fill H is a cross-linked hyaluronic acid body filler at 24 mg/mL, supplied in a 50 cc large-volume presentation for non-surgical body contouring. Its cohesive, high-viscosity gel is engineered to support deep subcutaneous volumisation across areas including the buttocks, hips, and calves, providing structural lift and shape without surgical intervention. The formulation is designed for stable, durable projection in the subcutaneous plane.
products.indication: Designed for body shaping and large-area volumization procedures intended for qualified aesthetic practitioners in clinical environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 50 cc sterile unit, one unit per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Inject at the deep subcutaneous plane using an 18–21G blunt cannula via retrograde fanning technique, distributing up to 25 mL per side per session depending on the target region. Pre-treatment local or tumescent anaesthesia is recommended. Allow 6–8 weeks between staged sessions for assessment. Results last approximately 12–18 months; hyaluronidase reversal available.

products.name: P198 Filcore SB (ExoHealer™)
products.description: P198 Filcore SB (ExoHealer) is a lyophilised exosome cell booster containing 245.7 billion exosome particles per vial, formulated to deliver six types of skin growth factors including EGF, VEGF, IGF, KGF, and anti-inflammatory mediators. Upon reconstitution with its activating solvent, it targets dermal regeneration, collagen stimulation, skin barrier reinforcement, and visible improvement in firmness, radiance, and fine line attenuation. The exosome technology enables precise molecular signalling at the cellular level, distinguishing it from conventional HA boosters.
products.indication: Designed for use as a professional skin booster intended to support overall skin firmness, hydration, and radiance in adult patients.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 mL x 10 lyophilized vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Reconstitute each lyophilised 2 mL vial with 5 mL of the provided activating solution or normal saline immediately before administration. Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture technique, or apply topically following microneedling or RF fractional treatment. Standard course: 4–6 sessions every 1–2 weeks, with maintenance every 1–3 months.

products.name: P198 Filcore Activating Solution (Solvent)
products.description: P198 Filcore Activating Solution is a sterile pharmaceutical-grade solvent supplied in 5 mL vials, formulated to reconstitute the P198 Filcore SB lyophilised exosome powder. The solvent contains scalp- and skin-specific growth factors (EGF, VEGF, IGF, KGF, and Noggin) that synergise with the exosome payload to enhance biological activity after reconstitution. It is presented as a 10-vial pack to pair with exosome powder across a full treatment course.
products.indication: Intended for use as an activating solvent designed for pairing with compatible exosome skin boosters in professional skin-quality procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 10 sterile vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Add the full 5 mL of activating solution to one P198 Filcore SB lyophilised vial immediately before administration; gently invert or swirl to dissolve — do not shake. The reconstituted solution contains no preservatives and must be used within the same session. Administer intradermally at 1–3 mm depth via 30G needle or apply to the skin immediately after ablative microneedling or RF fractional treatment.

products.name: P198 Filcore SB Plus program
products.specification: Lyophilized Exosome + Solvent, 2 mL + 5 mL (5 pairs)
products.description: The P198 Filcore SB Plus Program is a paired-vial treatment kit combining lyophilised exosome powder (2 mL) with activating solvent (5 mL) in five matched pairs, providing a complete 5-session exosome skin booster course. Each session delivers 245.7 billion exosome particles enriched with six growth factors to support collagen stimulation, barrier reinforcement, and visible improvement in skin radiance and elasticity. The multi-pair programme format ensures consistent reconstitution quality across the full treatment course.
products.indication: Designed for use as a professional skin booster program intended to support skin firmness, hydration, and overall radiance in adult patients.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 mL + 5 mL paired vials, with 5 pairs per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Reconstitute one exosome vial with one solvent vial immediately before each session; administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture technique. Alternatively, apply the reconstituted solution to the skin following microneedling or RF fractional treatment for enhanced transdermal delivery. Schedule sessions weekly or every 2 weeks for the 5-session programme; maintenance every 1–3 months thereafter.

products.name: LEXYAL REJU
products.description: Lexyal Reju is a regenerative skin booster combining polydeoxyribonucleotide (PDRN) and polynucleotide (PN) fractions in a 3 mL injectable formulation, targeting dermal repair and rejuvenation at the cellular level. PDRN activates A2A purinergic receptors to stimulate fibroblast proliferation, collagen synthesis, and angiogenesis, while the PN fraction supports extracellular matrix regeneration and skin hydration. The combined PDRN+PN approach delivers anti-inflammatory, wound-healing, and anti-melanogenic effects for visible texture refinement and skin tone improvement.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin rejuvenation procedures suitable for use in facial areas, including the delicate periocular region, by trained practitioners.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 mL x 5 sterile vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 32G needle at 1–2 mm depth via papule injection technique (0.5 cm papule diameter per point), placing points across the target area in a grid pattern. Typical session dose: 3 mL per treatment zone. Recommended course: 4 sessions spaced 2–3 weeks apart; visible improvement develops over 2–4 weeks per session. Maintenance injections every 2–3 months thereafter.

products.name: BELLONA AQUA
products.description: Bellona Aqua is an advanced hyaluronic acid skin booster utilising BDDE double-crosslinking technology with a sectional-release mechanism, enabling sustained hydration delivery over an extended interval compared to standard HA boosters. Its crosslinked HA matrix gradually releases free hyaluronate as the gel degrades, providing prolonged dermal moisture support, improved skin elasticity, and enhanced radiance across the treatment period. Each 3 mL syringe is designed for a single full-face or neck treatment session.
products.indication: Intended for professional hydration and skin-quality treatments designed for use by trained aesthetic practitioners in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 mL x 3 sterile pre-filled syringes per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 2–4 mm depth via nappage or serial papule technique across the face, neck, or décolletage. Inject 0.01–0.02 mL per point in a grid pattern; total volume typically 3 mL per session per zone. Recommended course: 3 sessions at 3–4 week intervals; due to the sustained-release mechanism, longer inter-session intervals may be appropriate. Maintenance every 4–6 months.

products.name: BELLONA OPACIOUS SERUM
products.description: Bellona Opacious Serum is a premium skin brightening and regeneration booster formulated with cell-regeneration technology, designed to improve skin tone uniformity, reduce visible hyperpigmentation, and refine pore appearance across a structured clinical course. Its multi-component formulation targets melanogenesis regulation and surface radiance enhancement, delivering cumulative improvement in skin brightness with each session. Supplied as a 3 mL x 5 vial pack for a complete 5-session brightening programme.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin-brightening and rejuvenation procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-quality treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 mL x 5 sterile vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy technique, distributing the 3 mL volume evenly across the treatment area. Typical session spacing: weekly for 4–5 sessions to achieve the full brightening course. Combine with sun protection as part of post-treatment care to maintain results. Maintenance: one session every 4–6 weeks depending on skin condition.

products.name: DERMAGEN Plus NAD⁺ Solution
products.description: Dermagen Plus NAD+ Solution is a skin booster containing NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) and NMN (nicotinamide mononucleotide) encapsulated in liposomal carriers to overcome the chemical instability and limited cellular uptake of unencapsulated NAD+. NAD+ replenishes cellular energy pathways via the sirtuin and PARP signalling routes, supporting DNA repair, mitochondrial function, and fibroblast vitality, which translates to visible reduction in signs of cellular ageing and improved skin tone. The 3 mL vial format allows targeted delivery in mesotherapy protocols.
products.indication: Suitable for professional anti-aging and skin-quality procedures intended for trained practitioners working in clinical environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 3 mL sterile vial per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–2 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy technique, distributing the full 3 mL vial across the face or neck. Alternatively, apply topically immediately following microneedling for enhanced transdermal uptake. Recommended course: 4–6 sessions weekly or biweekly. As NAD+ injectables remain an emerging category, clinical endpoints should be monitored and patient expectations set accordingly.

products.name: TESORO COLLAGEN
products.description: Tesoro Collagen is a bioidentical collagen-based injectable skin booster supplied in a 2 mL pre-filled syringe, formulated to replenish dermal collagen substrate and support intrinsic fibroblast activity. Exogenous collagen delivery stimulates fibroblast proliferation through substrate-mediated signalling, complementing the skin's own collagen synthesis to improve elasticity, hydration, and fine line attenuation over a treatment course. Its 2 mL presentation suits a targeted single-zone session on the face or neck.
products.indication: Designed for professional use as a collagen-based skin booster suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-quality and rejuvenation procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe, one syringe per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via serial puncture or nappage technique, distributing 2 mL evenly across the treatment zone. A standard course of 3–4 sessions every 2–4 weeks is typical, with cumulative collagen remodelling effects becoming apparent from the second session onward. Maintenance injections every 2–3 months are recommended to sustain results.

products.name: ULTRAHILO
products.description: Ultrahilo is a bio-revitalising injectable containing 32 mg of high-molecular-weight hyaluronic acid (H-HA) and 32 mg of low-molecular-weight hyaluronic acid (L-HA) per 2 mL, formulated as a Profhilo-analogue hybrid HA booster without chemical crosslinker (BDDE). The H-HA component acts as a slow-release hydration depot in the dermis, while the L-HA diffuses rapidly to stimulate adipocyte and fibroblast activity, triggering collagen and elastin production for genuine skin remodelling. Together they deliver deep hydration, improved laxity, and surface texture refinement across a short treatment course.
products.indication: Intended for professional bio-revitalization procedures designed for use by trained practitioners performing skin-quality treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe of HA sodium salt, one syringe per pack.
products.protocol: Administer subcutaneously using a 25–27G needle via BAP (Bio Aesthetic Points) technique: 5 points per hemi-face or adapted 5-point protocol for neck and décolletage. Inject 0.2 mL per point as a bolus; aspirate at each site before depositing. Standard course: 2 sessions 4 weeks apart; a third session at 3 months optimises remodelling. Maintenance every 6 months.

products.name: EVEHILO
products.specification: 3.2% 32mg (H-HA) + 32mg (I-HA)/2mL HA sodium salt, 2 mL pre-filled syringe
products.description: Evehilo is a hybrid hyaluronic acid bio-revitaliser containing 32 mg H-HA and 32 mg L-HA per 2 mL at 3.2% total HA concentration, formulated without BDDE cross-linker in the manner of leading stabilised hybrid HA platforms. The high-molecular-weight fraction sustains dermal hydration, while the low-molecular-weight fraction disperses to activate dermal fibroblasts and stimulate neocollagenesis and elastin synthesis, addressing both skin laxity and surface quality simultaneously. Supplied as a sterile pre-filled syringe for BAP or nappage administration.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-quality treatments in clinical environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe of HA sodium salt (3.2%), one syringe per pack.
products.protocol: Inject subcutaneously via BAP technique using a 25–27G needle, placing 0.2 mL bolus deposits at five injection points per hemi-face or equivalent points on neck and décolletage. Aspirate before each bolus. Standard protocol: 2 sessions 4 weeks apart, followed by a maintenance session at 6 months. An alternative nappage approach at the intradermal level is appropriate for neck laxity.

products.name: HYALACE
products.specification: 3.2% 32mg (H-HA) + 32mg (I-HA)/2mL HA sodium salt, 2 mL pre-filled syringe
products.description: Hyalace is a hybrid hyaluronic acid bio-revitaliser formulated with 32 mg H-HA and 32 mg L-HA per 2 mL at 3.2% total HA concentration without BDDE cross-linker, delivering a combined dual-molecular-weight remodelling effect. The coexistence of high- and low-MW fractions within a single formulation provides simultaneous deep hydration depot and fibroblast stimulation, improving skin laxity, hydration, and overall surface quality over a structured course. Supplied as a sterile pre-filled syringe ready for clinical administration.
products.indication: Suitable for professional bio-revitalization procedures intended for trained practitioners performing skin-quality and hydration treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe of HA sodium salt (3.2%), one syringe per pack.
products.protocol: Administer via BAP technique using a 25–27G needle: deposit 0.2 mL subcutaneously at five points per hemi-face or adapted neck/décolletage grid. Aspirate before each bolus. Recommended course: 2 injections 4 weeks apart; a follow-up session at 3–6 months maintains results. Nappage delivery at 2–4 mm intradermal depth is an alternative for diffuse hydration enhancement.

products.name: REVS PRO 32
products.description: Revs Pro 32 is a stabilised hybrid hyaluronic acid skin booster containing 32 mg H-HA and 32 mg L-HA per 2 mL (total 64 mg/mL) without BDDE cross-linker, formulated as a Profhilo-comparable bio-remodelling injectable for treatment of skin laxity. The H+L HA technology drives simultaneous deep tissue hydration and fibroblast-mediated neocollagenesis, targeting malar and submalar skin laxity, neck, and décolletage rejuvenation. Its high HA concentration at 64 mg per 2 mL positions it among the more concentrated hybrid HA bio-remodellers on the market.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization treatments suitable for trained practitioners performing hydration and skin-quality procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe of HA sodium salt (3.2%), one syringe per pack.
products.protocol: Administer subcutaneously via BAP technique using a 25–27G needle, depositing 0.2 mL at five bio-aesthetic points per hemi-face; adapt for neck (three points per side) or décolletage. Aspirate before each deposit; do not overcorrect. Standard course: 2 sessions 4 weeks apart; reassess at 3 months and consider maintenance at 6 months. Results last 6–9 months in most patients.

products.name: AIOR50
products.description: AIOR50 is a high-concentration hyaluronic acid skin rejuvenation injectable delivering 50 mg of HA per 2 mL (25 mg/mL), formulated to support intense dermal hydration, skin tone improvement, and surface texture refinement. Its elevated HA load creates a sustained hydration reservoir within the dermis, stimulating fibroblast activity and extracellular matrix support while visibly plumping fine lines and improving skin luminosity over successive sessions. The 2 mL volume suits a bilateral half-face or single-zone treatment per session.
products.indication: Intended for professional skin-quality and rejuvenation procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-booster treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 50 mg of HA in a 2 mL sterile presentation, one unit per pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 2–4 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture, distributing 0.01–0.02 mL per point across the face, neck, or periorbital area. Total volume of 2 mL per session is typical. Recommended course: 3–4 sessions at 2–4 week intervals; improvement in skin hydration and luminosity is progressive. Maintenance every 3–4 months.

products.name: ULTRA GEN
products.description: Ultra Gen is a multi-component skin rejuvenation booster combining hydrolysed collagen and plant-derived exosomes, formulated to deliver simultaneous structural and regenerative effects in a single intradermal treatment. The collagen fraction enhances dermal water retention, skin plumpness, and elasticity, while the exosome payload carries growth factors and microRNAs that activate cellular repair, regulate inflammation, reduce pigmentation, and stimulate neocollagenesis. Supplied as 100 mg distributed across 3 vials for a structured clinical course.
products.indication: Suitable for professional skin rejuvenation procedures intended for trained practitioners performing comprehensive skin-quality treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 100 mg distributed across 3 sterile vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Reconstitute each vial per manufacturer instructions immediately before use. Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture technique, distributing one vial per session across the treatment zone. Recommended course: one vial per session over 3 sessions, spaced weekly or biweekly. Alternatively, apply topically following microneedling. Maintenance monthly or as clinically indicated.

products.name: HYALMASS 50
products.description: Hyalmass 50 is a high-concentration non-cross-linked hyaluronic acid skin booster delivering 50 mg of HA per 2 mL, with a reported molecular weight of 2.5–3 million Daltons for maximum hydrophilicity and dermal water-binding capacity. Its formulation has been shown to increase skin hydration by up to 300% within 24 hours post-injection while improving elasticity scores measurably after a 3-session course. The elevated HA molecular weight differentiates it from standard low-concentration HA boosters, providing a more pronounced and sustained hydration effect.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin-quality treatments suitable for trained practitioners performing skin rejuvenation procedures in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as 50 mg of HA in a 2 mL sterile presentation, one unit per pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth via serial puncture technique, depositing approximately 0.2 mL per 5 injection points per half-face (1 mL per side). A full 2 mL syringe covers the complete face. Recommended course: 2–3 sessions at 2–4 week intervals; improvement in skin hydration and elasticity is evident from session one. Maintenance injections every 2–3 months.

products.name: HYARON
products.specification: 2.5 mL x 10 syringes/1 pack, sodium hyaluronate
products.description: Hyaron is a sodium hyaluronate bio-revitalising solution for intradermal injection, supplied in convenient 2.5 mL single-use pre-filled syringes across a 10-syringe pack for multi-session clinical use. Its non-cross-linked sodium hyaluronate rapidly integrates into the dermis to restore moisture balance, stimulate fibroblast activity, and improve skin texture, elasticity, and luminosity. The 10-syringe pack format supports a complete skin booster programme for a single patient or multiple single-session treatments.
products.indication: Intended for professional bio-revitalization procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing hydration and skin-quality treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2.5 mL x 10 sterile pre-filled syringes per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture technique, distributing 2.5 mL evenly across the treatment area per session. Standard course: 3–4 sessions spaced 2–4 weeks apart; results begin to appear after the first session and accumulate with subsequent treatments. Maintenance sessions every 3–4 months; one syringe per session per face or neck zone.

products.name: POWERHEALER
products.specification: 5 mL x 5 vials, Succinic Acid, Collagen, Moisturizing & Whitening
products.description: Powerhealer is a multi-component skin booster containing succinic acid and collagen, formulated for professional moisturising, brightening, and skin-quality enhancement. Succinic acid supports mitochondrial energy metabolism at the cellular level and acts as an antioxidant, while collagen peptides contribute to extracellular matrix replenishment and visible plumping of fine lines. The combination targets skin fatigue, dullness, and hydration loss, making it suited to post-treatment recovery protocols and skin maintenance programmes.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin-quality and brightening procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-booster treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 5 sterile vials per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy technique, distributing one 5 mL vial evenly across the face or neck per session. Recommended course: 4–5 sessions weekly for the full brightening and moisturising effect. May be combined with micro-needling for enhanced transdermal delivery of active components. Maintenance every 4–6 weeks as required.

products.name: TRUE BELLA
products.description: True Bella is a multi-function hyaluronic acid skin booster containing HA alongside complementary skin-active ingredients, formulated in a 2.2 mL pre-filled syringe for targeted facial skin quality treatment. Its HA base supports sustained dermal hydration and acts as a vehicle for accompanying ingredients that address collagen synthesis stimulation, skin brightness, and surface smoothness. The compact 2.2 mL volume is suited to localised treatment of the face, periorbital area, or neck.
products.indication: Suitable for professional skin-booster procedures intended for trained practitioners performing comprehensive skin-quality treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2.2 mL sterile pre-filled syringe, one syringe per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via serial puncture or nappage technique, distributing the 2.2 mL volume across the target zone. Recommended course: 3–4 sessions at 2–4 week intervals, with improvement accumulating progressively across the course. Combine with photoprotection post-treatment. Maintenance every 3–4 months depending on skin response and clinical goals.

products.name: YOUTHFILL PN
products.specification: with lidocaine, Non cross-linked HA 20 mg + PN 5 mg, 1 Syr x 2.5 mL
products.description: Youthfill PN is a viscous, non-cross-linked hyaluronic acid and polynucleotide (PN) bio-revitalising injectable containing 20 mg HA and 5 mg PN per 2.5 mL syringe, formulated with lidocaine for procedural comfort. The PN fraction activates A2A purinergic receptors on fibroblasts to stimulate collagen and extracellular matrix synthesis, while the non-cross-linked HA provides immediate hydration and a supportive tissue matrix. Together they address fine lines, skin laxity, texture irregularity, and dullness in a single bio-revitalisation session.
products.indication: Intended for professional skin rejuvenation procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-quality and bio-revitalization treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 sterile pre-filled syringe of 2.5 mL, one syringe per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–2 mm depth via papule injection technique, creating 0.3–0.5 cm diameter papules across the target area in a grid pattern. Distribute the 2.5 mL volume over the full face, neck, or target zone per session. Recommended course: 4 sessions spaced 2–3 weeks apart; skin softening and hydration improvement develop progressively. Maintenance sessions every 2–3 months.

products.name: REGENOVUE PN
products.specification: Non cross-linked HA 20mg + PN 5mg, 1 Syr x 3 mL
products.description: Regenovue PN is a bio-revitalising injectable combining non-cross-linked hyaluronic acid (20 mg) and polynucleotide (5 mg) per 3 mL syringe, formulated for skin quality restoration and regenerative rejuvenation. The PN component stimulates fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis through purinergic receptor activation, while the HA base provides immediate hydration and acts as a scaffold for tissue regeneration. The combination delivers visible improvement in skin elasticity, hydration, and fine line attenuation over a structured course.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization procedures suitable for trained practitioners performing skin-quality and hydration treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 sterile pre-filled syringe of 3 mL, one syringe per individually sealed pack.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 32G needle at 1–2 mm depth via papule or nappage technique, distributing the 3 mL volume across the face or target zone per session. Recommended course: 4 sessions spaced 2–3 weeks apart; results become visible 2–4 weeks after each session. Maintenance injections every 2–3 months. The lidocaine-free formulation may require topical anaesthesia prior to treatment for patient comfort.

products.name: REGENOVUE AQUASHINE PLUS GOLD
products.specification: 15 mg/mL Crosslinked HA (15%), 3 mL x 3ea = 9 mL
products.description: Regenovue Aquashine Plus Gold is a bio-revitalising skin booster formulated with crosslinked hyaluronic acid at 15 mg/mL (15% concentration), providing a more cohesive gel structure than non-crosslinked counterparts for slower degradation and extended hydration delivery. Its crosslinked HA matrix acts as a sustained-release depot for dermal moisture, supporting skin surface smoothness, elasticity improvement, and hydration maintenance over a longer inter-session interval. Supplied as three 3 mL pre-filled syringes (9 mL total) for a complete multi-session treatment pack.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization sessions and intended for general skin conditioning, surface hydration support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic skin-quality programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 prefilled syringes of 3 mL each, providing a total volume of 9 mL per pack for in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 2–4 mm depth via nappage or serial papule technique, distributing 3 mL per session across the face or neck zone. The crosslinked HA formulation allows wider spacing between sessions compared to non-crosslinked products; recommended interval is 3–4 weeks. Standard pack provides 3 sessions; maintenance sessions at 3–6 monthly intervals are appropriate.

products.name: REGENOVUE AQUASHINE SILVER
products.specification: 15 mg/mL Non-Crosslinked HA (15%), 3 mL x 3ea = 9 mL
products.description: Regenovue Aquashine Silver is a bio-revitalising skin booster formulated with non-crosslinked hyaluronic acid at 15 mg/mL (15% concentration), delivering rapid dermal hydration and skin conditioning through free HA integration into the extracellular matrix. Its non-crosslinked format enables immediate diffusion through the dermis, providing fast-onset hydration improvement, surface smoothness, and skin tone conditioning suited to maintenance and seasonal skin quality programmes. Supplied as three 3 mL pre-filled syringes (9 mL total) for a complete multi-session treatment pack.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization protocols and intended for general skin hydration, quality maintenance, and adjunctive in-clinic conditioning of the facial and adjacent treatment areas.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 prefilled syringes of 3 mL each, providing a total volume of 9 mL per pack for professional use.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or serial puncture technique, distributing 3 mL per session across the face, neck, or décolletage. Recommended course: 3 sessions at 2–3 week intervals; due to the non-crosslinked formulation, shorter inter-session intervals are appropriate compared to crosslinked products. Maintenance sessions every 2–3 months.

products.name: CELOSOME AQUA
products.specification: 2.5 mL x 5 syringes/1 pack, sodium hyaluronate, 60 mg/2.5 mL x 1 syringe
products.description: Celosome Aqua is a sodium hyaluronate skin booster delivering a high concentration of 60 mg per 2.5 mL syringe (24 mg/mL), formulated for intensive facial hydration and bio-revitalisation. Its high-dose HA content creates a pronounced dermal hydration depot, supporting significant improvement in skin moisture levels, surface luminosity, and skin tone uniformity over a structured clinical course. Supplied as a 5-syringe pack (12.5 mL total) to support a complete five-session in-clinic programme.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin booster and bio-revitalization procedures, intended to support facial moisture levels, surface tone, and overall skin condition during in-clinic conditioning sessions.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 prefilled syringes of 2.5 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic course set.
products.protocol: Administer intradermally using a 30–32G needle at 2–4 mm depth via nappage or serial papule technique, distributing the 2.5 mL volume evenly across the face or neck per session. Recommended course: 5 sessions (one pack) at 1–2 week intervals for intensive hydration induction. Maintenance sessions every 3–4 months. The 60 mg HA dose per syringe supports more substantial hydration response compared to standard 20–30 mg HA boosters.

products.name: REJEUNESSE SPARKLE
products.specification: HA 20 mg/mL, 2.5 mL x 3 syringes, lidocaine 0.3%
products.description: Rejeunesse Sparkle is a monophasic cross-linked hyaluronic acid skin booster at 20 mg/mL with 0.3% lidocaine, formulated for superficial dermal hydration and luminosity improvement. The low-viscosity HA matrix integrates rapidly into the dermis, improving moisture retention and surface smoothness. It is indicated for face, neck, décolletage, and hand rejuvenation in patients with mild skin dehydration and early photoaging.
products.indication: Designed for professional dermal filler applications and intended for fine-line correction, gentle facial contouring, and adjunctive use within structured aesthetic injection programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 prefilled syringes of 2.5 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set.
products.protocol: Reconstitution is not required; product is supplied ready to inject. Administer intradermally at 1–2 mm depth using a 30G or 32G needle via nappage or papule technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Treat face with 0.5–1.0 mL per session; recommend 3 sessions at 2–4 week intervals, with maintenance every 4–6 months.

products.name: Oasis repair PN 2%
products.description: Oasis Repair PN 2% is a high-concentration polynucleotide injectable designed for intensive skin repair and bio-revitalization. At 2% PN concentration, it delivers nucleotide building blocks that stimulate fibroblast proliferation, upregulate collagen and elastin synthesis, and promote tissue regeneration in photodamaged or post-procedure skin. It is indicated for mature skin, post-laser recovery, scarring, and acne-damaged complexions.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization procedures and intended for skin conditioning, surface tone support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic elasticity programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 prefilled syringes of 2 mL each per pack, providing a paired working set for clinic use.
products.protocol: No reconstitution needed; use directly from the prefilled 2 mL syringe. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth with a 30G or 31G needle using a nappage grid technique, 0.02–0.03 mL per point, covering the treatment zone systematically. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; maintenance every 2–3 months.

products.name: Cindella Healer PN
products.description: Cindella Healer PN is a polynucleotide-based injectable bio-revitalizer derived from purified salmon DNA, supplying high-molecular-weight PDRN/PN fragments that bind adenosine A2A receptors to accelerate wound healing and collagen neosynthesis. The formulation targets skin matrix repair, improving elasticity, reducing fine lines, and restoring dermal hydration in fatigued or aging skin. It is suited for full-face rejuvenation and post-procedure skin recovery.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial rejuvenation protocols and intended for use in fine-line areas including the under-eye, forehead, and crow's-feet zones during in-clinic sessions.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 prefilled syringes of 2 mL each per pack, providing a paired in-clinic working set.
products.protocol: Draw from the prefilled 2 mL syringe without reconstitution. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth using a 30G needle via serial papule or nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point, evenly covering the face. Recommend 4 sessions at 1–2 week intervals; maintenance once monthly thereafter.

products.name: KIARA REJU
products.specification: 2.2 mL x 3 syringe/1 pack, PN polynucleotide 5mg/l + HA 20 mg/mL, JBP nano needle 33G 4mm
products.description: Kiara Reju is a dual-component bio-revitalizer combining polynucleotides at 5 mg/mL with hyaluronic acid at 20 mg/mL in a 2.2 mL syringe, supplied with a JBP 33G 4 mm nano needle. The PN fraction stimulates fibroblast activity and collagen production, while the HA component provides immediate volumetric hydration and viscoelastic support to the superficial dermis. It is indicated for overall facial rejuvenation, fine lines, and skin laxity improvement.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization protocols and intended for general skin hydration, surface quality support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 prefilled syringes of 2.2 mL each per pack, accompanied by an included JBP 33G 4 mm nano needle.
products.protocol: Use the supplied JBP 33G 4 mm nano needle; no reconstitution required. Inject intradermally at 2–4 mm depth using a serial-threading or nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point, 1 mL per treatment zone. Complete 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals, then maintenance monthly.

products.name: GemVous PN
products.description: GemVous PN is a polynucleotide-enriched skin booster formulated for bio-revitalization of the face, neck, and hands. The purified PN chains stimulate dermal fibroblasts to increase collagen type I and III synthesis, restore extracellular matrix integrity, and enhance skin elasticity and hydration. It is particularly suited for thin, dehydrated, or early-aging skin requiring structural reinforcement.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin booster sessions and intended to support facial tone, smoothness, and overall skin condition within structured in-clinic bio-revitalization programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 prefilled syringes of 2.5 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set.
products.protocol: No reconstitution required; use directly from the prefilled 2.5 mL syringe with a 30G or 31G needle. Inject intradermally at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or linear retrograde threading, 0.02–0.05 mL per point. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; a maintenance schedule of every 2–3 months is recommended.

products.name: MISFILL+ PDRN
products.description: MISFILL+ PDRN is a polydeoxyribonucleotide mesotherapy injectable combining PDRN with complementary skin-repair actives in a 2.2 mL syringe format. PDRN acts through A2A adenosine receptor activation to suppress inflammatory mediators, stimulate collagen and fibronectin synthesis, and accelerate epidermal turnover, making it effective for photoaged, acne-scarred, and post-treatment skin rehabilitation. It is indicated for overall facial rejuvenation and improvement of skin texture and tone.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization procedures and intended to support general skin condition, surface quality, and adjunctive in-clinic conditioning across standard facial treatment zones.
products.packaging: Supplied in injectable syringe format for professional aesthetic use within in-clinic bio-revitalization.
products.protocol: Use directly from the syringe without reconstitution with a 30G or 31G needle. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage grid technique, 0.02–0.03 mL per point, across the full face. A protocol of 3–5 sessions at 1–2 week intervals is typical, followed by monthly maintenance.

products.name: ELAXEN PLLA MASK
products.description: Elaxen PLLA Mask is a professional topical preparation enriched with Poly-L-Lactic Acid (PLLA) microspheres, minerals, and bioactive peptides to promote post-injection recovery and collagen stimulation at the skin surface. Applied after PLLA filler or biostimulator injections, it helps soothe the treated area, reduce erythema, and support neocollagenesis through transdermal delivery of peptide cofactors. It is used in conjunction with injectable PLLA treatments as part of a structured post-procedure protocol.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial protocols and intended for surface tone refinement, smoothness support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic appearance-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as a PLLA-based topical mask preparation for professional aesthetic in-clinic facial sessions.
products.protocol: Apply a uniform layer over the treated facial area after PLLA injection or microneedling, leave in contact for 20–30 minutes, then gently remove residue. Use once per session immediately post-procedure; repeat with each treatment visit. No rinsing with water is required if the product is formulated for leave-on post-care.

products.name: MISADI CO2 Mask
products.specification: 30 mL x 5 tubes carboxygel, 5 face + 5 neck masks
products.description: Misadi CO2 Mask is a professional carboxytherapy kit comprising 30 mL carboxygel tubes and matched face and neck masks, designed to deliver transcutaneous CO2 to the skin via the Bohr effect. The CO2 absorbed through the skin triggers local vasodilation and oxygen release from hemoglobin, increasing microcirculation, improving skin tone and brightness, and stimulating collagen synthesis without needles. It is used for facial and neck skin brightening, firming, and pore refinement in an in-clinic setting.
products.indication: Designed for professional in-clinic facial and neck care protocols and intended for general surface conditioning, matrix support, and adjunctive use within structured carboxytherapy programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 tubes of 30 mL carboxygel together with 5 face masks and 5 neck masks per pack.
products.protocol: Apply the carboxygel (one tube per area) in a uniform layer over the cleansed face or neck, then place the corresponding mask over the gel to create a sealed CO2 environment. Leave the mask in contact for 20–30 minutes, then remove and massage the remaining gel gently into the skin. Perform weekly sessions for 4–8 weeks, then monthly maintenance.

products.name: SOONSU ULTRA REJU
products.description: Soonsu Ultra Reju is a PDRN- and PN-enriched skin booster combining polydeoxyribonucleotides and polynucleotides derived from salmon DNA in 3 mL vials to synergistically stimulate fibroblast proliferation, collagen synthesis, and skin matrix repair. PDRN activates A2A receptors to accelerate tissue regeneration, while the PN fraction supplies structural nucleotide fragments for epidermal renewal and improved elasticity. It is indicated for overall facial rejuvenation including the sensitive periorbital zone.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy protocols and intended to support general skin rejuvenation, surface tone, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 3 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Dissolve or draw from the 3 mL vial using a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–3 mm depth by nappage or serial papule technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point. Treat once weekly for 4–5 sessions; maintenance injections monthly or as clinically indicated.

products.name: SOONSU SHINING PEEL
products.description: Soonsu Shining Peel is a biphasic professional chemical peel featuring TCA 35% combined with multi-acid exfoliants, vitamin B12, retinol, squalene oil, and bixa orellana (annatto) seed oil in a 6 mL format. The TCA at 35% induces controlled medium-depth coagulative necrosis of the epidermis and superficial papillary dermis, promoting collagen remodeling, hyperpigmentation reduction, and surface texture refinement. The added retinol, antioxidants, and lipid components moderate downtime and support epidermal barrier recovery post-peel.
products.indication: Designed for professional chemical peel protocols and intended for surface tone refinement, controlled exfoliation support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic renewal programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 units of 6 mL each per pack, providing a multi-session in-clinic working set in a single carton.
products.protocol: Degrease skin thoroughly; apply the peel solution uniformly with a fan brush in 1–2 coats, observing frosting level (Grade I–II target). Neutralize or allow self-neutralization per formulation instructions; do not exceed the manufacturer-specified contact time. Perform one session every 4–6 weeks for 3–5 cycles; rigorous sun protection is mandatory between and after sessions.

products.name: CINDELLA I (PN 1%)
products.specification: PN Skin Booster, 2 mL x 1 Syr
products.description: Cindella I PN is a 1% polynucleotide skin booster delivering 10 mg of highly purified salmon-derived PN per mL, designed for intradermal bio-revitalization of the full face. The PN molecules stimulate fibroblast proliferation, enhance extracellular matrix production, and increase dermal hydration by promoting hyaluronan biosynthesis, resulting in improved skin tone, firmness, and reduced fine lines. It is indicated for mild to moderate skin aging, photoaging, and dehydration in adult patients.
products.indication: Designed for professional bio-revitalization protocols and intended for general skin conditioning, quality support, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic rejuvenation programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe of 2 mL per pack, ready for single-session in-clinic professional use.
products.protocol: Use directly from the 2 mL prefilled syringe with a 30G or 31G needle. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via a nappage technique, 0.02–0.03 mL per injection point, covering the face systematically. A series of 4–6 sessions at 1-week intervals is recommended, followed by monthly maintenance injections.

products.name: Clair Eyes (PN 1%)
products.description: Clair Eyes PN 1% is a periorbital-specific polynucleotide injectable delivering 20 mg of PN in 1.1 mL, formulated for the thin, delicate skin of the tear trough and under-eye area. The PN content promotes fibroblast activation, increases collagen and elastin density in the fragile periorbital dermis, and reduces the appearance of dark circles by improving microvascular tone and skin opacity. It is indicated for under-eye hollows, fine periorbital wrinkles, and tear-trough dehydration.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital region and tear-valley zone, intended for hydration support, gentle refinement, and structured in-clinic eye-area conditioning.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe containing 20 mg polynucleotide per 1.1 mL for in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Use the full 1.1 mL syringe per session (both sides) with a 32G or 33G needle. Inject superficially at 0.5–1.5 mm depth in the periorbital zone using micro-papule or fanning technique, 0.01–0.02 mL per point; use extreme caution to avoid the orbital septum. Recommend 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; maintenance every 2–3 months.

products.name: ULTRA EYE (PN 1%)
products.description: Ultra Eye PN 1% is a periorbital polynucleotide injectable supplying 20 mg PN per 1.1 mL, precision-formulated for the delicate under-eye and tear-trough zone. The salmon-derived PN molecules stimulate fibroblast activity, enhance dermal collagen and elastin in the thin periorbital skin, and improve microcirculation to reduce dark circle appearance and fine-line visibility. It is indicated for periorbital aging, tear-trough dehydration, and early wrinkles in the crow's-feet region.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital and tear-valley areas and intended for hydration support, surface conditioning, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe containing 20 mg polynucleotide per 1.1 mL for in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Administer the full 1.1 mL syringe per bilateral periorbital session using a 32G or 33G needle. Inject at 0.5–1 mm intradermal depth via micro-papule technique, 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point, staying superficial and inferior to the orbital rim. Complete 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; monthly maintenance is recommended.

products.name: AMI EYES (PN 1%)
products.description: Ami Eyes PN 1% is a periorbital bio-revitalizer containing 20 mg polynucleotide in 2 mL, providing a higher volume per session for thorough treatment of the under-eye, tear-trough, and crow's-feet areas. The PN component activates A2A adenosine receptors to stimulate fibroblast proliferation, enhances collagen IV in the basement membrane, and improves microvascular tone to address dark circles and periorbital skin thinning. It is indicated for moderate periorbital aging and tear-trough volume loss.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital region and intended for hydration support, gentle refinement, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic eye-area conditioning.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe containing 20 mg of polynucleotide per 2 mL for single-session in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Use the full 2 mL syringe per bilateral periorbital session with a 32G or 33G needle, 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point at 0.5–2 mm depth. Apply micro-papule or serial threading technique below the orbital rim; avoid periosteal injection. Perform 3 sessions at 2–3 week intervals; maintenance every 3 months.

products.name: JUVELOOK i (Juvelook Eye)
products.description: Juvelook i (Juvelook Eye) is a hybrid PDLLA/HA biostimulator combining 25.5 mg poly-D,L-lactic acid with 4.5 mg hyaluronic acid per vial, formulated specifically for the periorbital zone and other delicate thin-skin areas. The PDLLA microspheres trigger neocollagenesis over a 3–6 month period by stimulating fibroblasts, while the HA fraction provides immediate hydration and volumetric support to the fragile papillary dermis. It is indicated for under-eye dark circles, fine periorbital wrinkles, crow's feet, thin neck skin, and perioral barcode lines.
products.indication: -Under-eye area (dark circles, fine lines) -Crow’s feet -Perioral “barcode” lines -Thin skin (neck, delicate zones) -Skin texture & elasticity improvement
products.packaging: Supplied as a single vial containing 25.5 mg PDLLA and 4.5 mg hyaluronic acid (30 mg per vial in total).
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 30 mg vial with the supplied diluent and allow full dissolution before use; inject with a 30G or 31G needle. Administer at superficial dermis depth (0.5–2 mm) using a nappage or mesotherapy fanning technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point. Recommend 2–3 sessions every 4–6 weeks; collagen remodeling continues for up to 6 months post-treatment.

products.name: EVE EYES (PN 1%, 20mg)
products.description: Eve Eyes PN 1% is a polynucleotide injectable delivering 20 mg PN in 2 mL, developed specifically for the periorbital region including the under-eye trough, crow's feet, and upper eyelid skin. The purified PN chains enhance fibroblast metabolism, promote de novo synthesis of collagen and elastin in the thin periorbital dermis, and improve capillary tone to reduce the dark-circle appearance caused by vascular transparency. It is indicated for periorbital wrinkles, dark circles, and periorbital skin dehydration.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital area and intended for hydration support, gentle refinement, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic eye-area conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe of 2 mL containing 20 mg of polynucleotide for single-session in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Administer the entire 2 mL syringe per bilateral periorbital treatment using a 32G or 33G fine needle. Inject intradermally at 0.5–1.5 mm depth via serial micro-papule or fanning technique below the orbital rim, 0.01–0.02 mL per point. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; maintenance every 2–3 months.

products.name: SPIDER AQUA EYE BOOSTER
products.description: Spider Aqua Eye Booster is a periorbital aqueous skin booster formulated with cross-linked HA and hydrating actives in a 2 mL syringe for the under-eye and tear-trough area. The fine-particle HA matrix delivers immediate volumetric hydration to the hollow under-eye sulcus, improves skin reflectance to reduce optical dark-circle appearance, and restores the thin periorbital dermis's moisture reservoir. It is indicated for tear-trough dehydration, periorbital thinning, and early hollowing.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital region and intended for hydration support, gentle surface conditioning, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic eye-area programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe of 2 mL for single-session in-clinic professional periorbital use.
products.protocol: Use directly from the 2 mL syringe with a 32G or 33G needle; inject intradermally or superficial subcutaneously at 1–3 mm depth below the orbital rim in the preseptal zone. Apply serial papule or fanning technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point, distributing product evenly along the tear trough bilaterally. Complete 2–3 sessions at 3–4 week intervals; reassess for maintenance after 3–6 months.

products.name: EYEBELLA (PN 1%)
products.description: Eyebella PN 1% is a periorbital polynucleotide injectable supplying 20 mg PN per 2 mL, designed to bio-revitalize the under-eye and crow's-feet area with high-purity salmon-derived polynucleotides. The PN fraction binds growth factor receptors on dermal fibroblasts to stimulate collagen I and III synthesis, improve elastin network density, and modulate periorbital skin hydration and tone. It is indicated for under-eye wrinkles, skin thinning, dark circles, and periorbital dehydration.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital region and intended for hydration support, surface conditioning, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic eye-area programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe containing 20 mg of polynucleotide per 2 mL for single-session in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Administer the full 2 mL syringe per bilateral periorbital session using a 32G needle at 0.5–2 mm intradermal depth via micro-papule technique, 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point. Keep injections below the orbital septum rim; distribute evenly across the medial, central, and lateral tear-trough segments. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; repeat maintenance every 2–3 months.

products.name: JUVE EYES (PN 1%)
products.description: Juve Eyes PN 1% is a periorbital-dedicated polynucleotide injectable containing 20 mg PN per 2 mL, formulated for the delicate under-eye trough and periorbital wrinkle zones. The high-purity PN material activates fibroblasts via purinergic signaling to stimulate collagen and elastin neosynthesis, repair the extracellular matrix, and improve periorbital skin density and hydration. It is indicated for tear-trough dehydration, periorbital laxity, under-eye fine lines, and dark-circle associated skin thinning.
products.indication: Designed for professional mesotherapy of the periorbital area and tear-valley zone, intended for hydration support, gentle refinement, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 prefilled syringe containing 20 mg of polynucleotide per 2 mL for single-session in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Use the full 2 mL prefilled syringe per bilateral treatment session with a 32G or 33G needle. Inject at 0.5–1.5 mm intradermal depth using micro-papule or linear retrograde technique along the tear trough, 0.01–0.02 mL per point. Recommend 3–4 sessions at 2-week intervals; maintenance monthly or every 2–3 months depending on clinical response.

products.name: SNOW FLOWER BLOOM
products.specification: Glutathione+PDRN+HA, 2.5 mL x 5 vials CPNP Improved
products.description: Snow Flower Bloom is a CPNP-enhanced mesotherapy cocktail combining glutathione, PDRN, and hyaluronic acid in 2.5 mL vials to address hyperpigmentation, skin dullness, and oxidative damage simultaneously. Glutathione inhibits melanin biosynthesis by suppressing tyrosinase activity, PDRN stimulates fibroblast regeneration and matrix repair, and the HA component provides immediate dermal hydration and plumping. The CPNP (Controlled-release Polymeric NanoParticle) delivery system enhances bioavailability of all active ingredients within the dermis.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial mesotherapy and intended to support surface tone, overall skin condition, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic facial rejuvenation programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 2.5 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Draw the 2.5 mL vial contents into a syringe with a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–3 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy gun technique. Apply 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point evenly across the full face or targeted pigmentation zones. Perform 4–6 weekly sessions; maintenance every 4–6 weeks for sustained brightening.

products.name: MisAdi White Skin Glazer
products.description: MisAdi White Skin Glazer is a whitening mesotherapy solution contained in a 5 mL vial, combining skin-brightening actives including glutathione, vitamin C derivatives, and pigmentation-modulating compounds to address melanin overproduction and uneven skin tone. The formulation is designed to inhibit tyrosinase, reduce oxidative stress in melanocytes, and improve overall skin luminosity and clarity through intradermal delivery. It is indicated for melasma, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and generalized skin dullness.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial mesotherapy protocols and intended to support surface tone, brightness, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic facial appearance-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 vial of 5 mL for professional in-clinic facial mesotherapy and aesthetic sessions.
products.protocol: Draw from the 5 mL vial using a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth by nappage or mesotherapy technique, 0.02–0.03 mL per injection point across targeted pigmented areas. Perform 4–6 sessions at weekly intervals; follow with monthly maintenance and strict photoprotection.

products.name: EVE WHITE
products.description: Eve White is a whitening mesotherapy solution supplied as five 5 mL vials, formulated with a blend of skin-brightening actives including tyrosinase inhibitors, antioxidants, and vitamin derivatives to reduce melanin synthesis and improve overall skin luminosity. The formulation targets the melanogenesis pathway at multiple steps, suppressing tyrosinase activity and scavenging reactive oxygen species to prevent pigment re-accumulation. It is indicated for diffuse hyperpigmentation, melasma, and post-inflammatory skin darkening requiring a multi-session brightening protocol.
products.indication: Designed for professional face-care mesotherapy and intended to support surface tone, condition, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic facial conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 5 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Draw 2–5 mL of solution per session using a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth by nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point, covering the pigmented treatment zones. Perform 1 session per week for 4–6 sessions; adjust maintenance frequency based on clinical response.

products.name: ULTRA WHITE
products.description: Ultra White is an advanced brightening mesotherapy cocktail in 3 mL vials containing tranexamoyl dipeptide-23, tetrapeptide, oligopeptide-2 (IGF-1), polypeptide-1, glutathione, vitamin C, N-acetyl glucosamine, sodium DNA, arbutin, niacinamide, and vitamin B5. These actives collectively inhibit tyrosinase at multiple pathway steps, stimulate keratinocyte turnover, reduce melanin transfer, and counteract UV-induced oxidative damage for comprehensive skin brightening. It is indicated for hyperpigmentation, melasma, uneven skin tone, and dull complexion requiring a multi-target brightening approach.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial mesotherapy and intended to support surface tone, brightness, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic facial conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 3 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Use 3 mL per session injected intradermally at 1–2 mm depth with a 30G or 31G needle using nappage or mesotherapy gun technique, 0.02–0.03 mL per injection point. Systematically cover the treatment area; combine sessions with topical brightening agents for synergistic results. Perform 4–6 weekly sessions; maintenance every 4–8 weeks under ongoing SPF50+ photoprotection.

products.name: MIRACLE X
products.description: Miracle X is a polycaprolactone (PCL)–hyaluronic acid composite skin booster supplied in 2 mL vials, combining the long-lasting biostimulatory properties of PCL microspheres with the immediate volumizing hydration of HA. The PCL microspheres act as a scaffold for neocollagenesis by stimulating fibroblast activity over a 12–18 month period, while the HA carrier provides immediate skin plumping and moisture retention. It is indicated for facial skin laxity, volume loss, and deep dermal hydration requiring both immediate effect and prolonged collagen induction.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin booster and meso-lifting protocols, intended to support facial hydration, surface quality, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 2 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Draw from the 2 mL vial and inject with a 27G or 30G needle at mid-to-deep dermis depth (2–4 mm) using linear retrograde threading or bolus technique for lifting zones; finer nappage can be used for superficial hydration. Use 1–2 mL per facial zone per session; perform 2–3 sessions at 4–6 week intervals and reassess at 3 months.

products.name: MIRACLE H
products.description: Miracle H is a PCL 20% and HA 1% meso-lifting solution in 2 mL vials that combines the biostimulatory scaffold properties of polycaprolactone with hyaluronic acid for simultaneous immediate hydration and long-term collagen neosynthesis. The PCL microspheres stimulate fibroblasts to produce new collagen over 12–18 months, while the HA component corrects immediate skin dehydration and superficial laxity. It is indicated for skin lifting, volume improvement, and rejuvenation in patients with moderate facial laxity and dermal thinning.
products.indication: Designed for professional meso-lifting and skin booster protocols and intended to support facial hydration, surface tone, and adjunctive use within structured in-clinic conditioning programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 vials of 2 mL each per pack, providing a complete in-clinic working set per program.
products.protocol: Administer 1–2 mL per zone with a 27G–30G needle at 2–4 mm depth using retrograde linear threading for lifting corridors and nappage for surface hydration. Treat across forehead, mid-face, and jawline in separate passes; total session volume is typically 4–8 mL across the full face. Schedule 2–3 sessions at 4–6 week intervals; maintenance every 6–12 months.

products.name: MIRACLE L
products.description: Miracle L is a polycaprolactone (PCL) 20% meso-lifting solution supplied as five 2 mL vials, delivering pure PCL microspheres in a biocompatible carrier without an HA component. The PCL microspheres provide a persistent mechanical scaffold that stimulates prolonged fibroblast activation and collagen type I neosynthesis lasting up to 18–24 months, effectively lifting and firming lax facial skin. It is indicated for patients requiring strong biostimulatory lifting without immediate HA-based hydration, particularly in mild-to-moderate facial ptosis.
products.indication: Designed for facial skin lifting routines and collagen-support objectives in professional aesthetic protocols, intended for practitioners working on overall firmness and skin quality refinement.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 2 mL each, supplied as a meso solution for face lifting and skin lift collagen care.
products.protocol: Use a 27G needle to inject PCL at 2–4 mm depth (mid-dermis to deep dermis) using retrograde linear threading along the nasolabial folds, jowls, and jawline lifting corridors. Apply 0.5–1.0 mL per vector; total session dose is typically 4–8 mL for a full facial treatment. Perform 2–3 sessions at 4–6 week intervals; collagen remodeling continues for up to 18 months.

products.name: TOUCH UP PCL
products.description: Touch Up PCL is a polycaprolactone-based skin rejuvenation booster supplied in five 2 mL vials, combining PCL microspheres with stem-cell-derived growth factors to induce sustained collagen neosynthesis and tissue regeneration. The PCL scaffold supports long-term fibroblast stimulation while the growth factor component accelerates cellular proliferation and skin matrix renewal for a synergistic biostimulatory effect. It is indicated for skin rejuvenation, laxity improvement, and post-treatment matrix restoration in patients seeking gradual, natural-looking lift.
products.indication: Intended for use as a stem cell booster and skin rejuvenation aid within professional aesthetic protocols, designed for practitioners addressing overall skin quality and freshness.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 2 mL each, supplied as a stem cell booster and skin rejuvenation solution.
products.protocol: Inject 1–2 mL per zone at 2–4 mm depth using a 27G or 30G needle with retrograde linear threading or bolus injection for lifting corridors. Full-face treatment typically requires 4–8 mL distributed across cheeks, jawline, and forehead; avoid superficial injection to prevent nodule formation. Perform 2–3 sessions at 4–6 week intervals; maintenance every 9–12 months.

products.name: TOUCH BR
products.description: Touch BR is a brightening mesotherapy cocktail supplied in five 5 mL vials, formulated with tyrosinase-inhibiting actives, antioxidants, and melanogenesis-suppressing agents to address uneven skin pigmentation and dullness. The multi-target whitening complex reduces melanin synthesis, prevents melanin transfer to keratinocytes, and quenches UV-induced free radical activity to restore an even, luminous skin tone. It is indicated for diffuse pigmentation, melasma, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and facial dullness requiring systemic brightening.
products.indication: Designed for use in brightening-focused professional skincare protocols targeting the appearance of uneven pigmentation, dullness, and lack of luminosity in facial skin.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as a meso solution focused on brightening and even-tone support.
products.protocol: Draw 5 mL per session with a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point, covering pigmented and dull zones evenly. Perform 4–6 weekly sessions; transition to biweekly and then monthly maintenance. Advise daily SPF50+ sunscreen throughout and after treatment.

products.name: PCL POWER BOOSTER
products.description: PCL Power Booster is a polycaprolactone-based injectable containing PCL microspheres combined with stem cell growth factors, designed to provide a potent biostimulatory regenerative effect in a single 2 mL vial dose. The PCL microsphere scaffold induces sustained fibroblast activation and collagen I neosynthesis for up to 18 months, while the accompanying growth factors accelerate tissue repair, improve skin microcirculation, and enhance epidermal renewal. It is indicated for facial skin aging, laxity, deep dermal thinning, and post-procedure tissue recovery.
products.indication: Suitable for professional care of aging or environmentally stressed skin in aesthetic settings, designed for practitioners targeting overall skin quality and the appearance of mature, fatigued skin.
products.packaging: Single vial of 2 mL, supplied as a stem cell accelerator and skin regeneration booster for professional use.
products.protocol: Inject the full 2 mL vial per targeted zone with a 27G or 30G needle at 3–4 mm depth (mid to deep dermis) using retrograde linear threading. Distribute product along 2–3 lifting vectors per zone; limit total session volume to 4–6 mL for a standard facial treatment. Repeat after 4–6 weeks for 2–3 sessions; a maintenance session every 9–12 months is recommended.

products.name: REJURAN SKIN BOOSTER
products.specification: Vial 1: 4 mL x 3 vials, Vial 2: 0.1g x 3 vials
products.description: Rejuran Skin Booster is a two-component system combining a c-PDRN (coiled polydeoxyribonucleotide) liquid base with a lyophilized amino acid blend, designed for intradermal injection to activate skin self-repair mechanisms and restore the dermal matrix. The c-PDRN component binds A2A adenosine receptors to suppress inflammation, stimulate fibroblast proliferation, and increase collagen and elastin biosynthesis, while the four amino acids supply essential substrates for collagen precursor synthesis. It is indicated for sensitive skin, photoaging, post-acne scarring, and compromised skin barrier requiring matrix-level regeneration.
products.indication: Designed for hydration support and skin rejuvenation routines in sensitive skin within professional protocols, intended for practitioners addressing dryness and overall skin quality.
products.packaging: Two-vial system: Vial 1 contains 4 mL x 3 vials and Vial 2 contains 0.1 g x 3 vials of lyophilized component.
products.protocol: Mix the lyophilized Vial 2 powder with the Vial 1 c-PDRN solution immediately before use; allow complete dissolution.
