Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth with a 30G or 32G needle by nappage or mesotherapy technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Treat the full face with 2–4 mL per session; schedule 4 sessions at 2-week intervals and reassess.

products.name: SELA TOX 10
products.description: Sela Tox 10 is a professional biomedicalization mesotherapy solution in five 5 mL vials, combining a proprietary blend of peptides, antioxidants, and skin-conditioning actives to address visible signs of skin aging including wrinkles, enlarged pores, and periorbital dark circles. The formulation is designed to modulate sebum production, tighten pores, improve periorbital microcirculation, and deliver anti-wrinkle peptides that relax facial muscle tension at the skin level. It is indicated for aging skin with enlarged pores, fine lines, and periorbital discoloration.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic protocols addressing the appearance of wrinkles, enlarged pores, and dark circles, intended for practitioners targeting overall skin tone and firmness perception.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as a biomedicalization meso solution for professional use.
products.protocol: Draw 5 mL per session with a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point, targeting enlarged pore zones, fine lines, and periorbital areas. Perform 4–6 weekly sessions followed by monthly maintenance. Supplement with daily SPF and a pore-reducing topical regimen for best outcomes.

products.name: LAPUROON AURORA SUPER
products.description: Lapuroon Aurora Super is a 2% PDRN skin booster supplied as two 2.5 mL prefilled syringes, formulated using Lapuroon's proprietary polynucleotide extraction and purification technology for high-concentration PDRN delivery. At 2% PDRN concentration, the product robustly stimulates A2A adenosine receptor-mediated fibroblast activation, drives collagen and elastin synthesis, and promotes healing and regeneration of photodamaged or procedurally compromised skin. It is indicated for intensive skin rejuvenation, post-laser recovery, acne scarring, and advanced photoaging.
products.indication: Designed for professional use as a skin booster supporting overall skin quality, hydration routines, and the appearance of refreshed, well-conditioned facial skin.
products.packaging: Box containing 2 pre-filled syringes of 2.5 mL each, supplied as a 2% PDRN skin booster for professional use.
products.protocol: Use directly from the 2.5 mL prefilled syringe with a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–3 mm depth via nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Distribute evenly across the treatment area; use 1 syringe per facial zone (face and neck). Perform 3–5 sessions at 1–2 week intervals; monthly maintenance is recommended thereafter.

products.name: LAPUROON AURORA VIVID
products.description: Lapuroon Aurora Vivid is a 0.2% PDRN skin booster supplied in five 5 mL vials, designed for high-volume, widespread intradermal treatment of the face, neck, and body areas where a lower PDRN concentration is appropriate. The polydeoxyribonucleotide content supports mild fibroblast stimulation, dermal hydration, and skin tone improvement over a course of regular sessions without the higher reactivity profile of concentrated PDRN formulations. It is indicated for maintenance bio-revitalization, mild skin dullness, and dehydration in patients who have completed an intensive PDRN induction protocol.
products.indication: Suitable for professional skin booster protocols supporting general skin care, intended for practitioners addressing overall skin quality and the appearance of healthy, conditioned skin.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as a 0.2% PDRN skin booster for professional use.
products.protocol: Draw from the 5 mL vial using a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy gun technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point, covering large surface areas. Typically use 3–5 mL per session for the face, or up to 10 mL for face and neck combined. Perform every 2–4 weeks; long-term maintenance every 1–2 months.

products.name: NMN BOTTLE NAD+
products.description: NMN Bottle NAD+ is a professional intravenous or intradermal skin booster combining nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN) with PDRN in ten 5 mL vials to target cellular energy metabolism and skin aging at the NAD+ biosynthesis level. NMN serves as a direct precursor to NAD+, upregulating sirtuin activity, mitochondrial biogenesis, and cellular DNA repair pathways to reverse energetic deficits in aged skin cells, while the PDRN component drives fibroblast regeneration and matrix synthesis. It is indicated for chronologically aged skin, fatigued dull complexion, and patients seeking metabolic skin rejuvenation.
products.indication: Designed for professional anti-aging skin booster protocols, intended for practitioners targeting overall skin condition and the appearance of mature or fatigued skin.
products.packaging: Box containing 10 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as an NMN- and PDRN-based professional skin booster.
products.protocol: For intradermal mesotherapy, draw 5 mL per session with a 30G needle; inject at 1–2 mm depth by nappage, 0.02–0.05 mL per point across the full face and neck. For IV drip administration, dilute 1–2 vials in 250 mL normal saline and infuse slowly over 60–90 minutes. Perform 6–10 weekly intradermal sessions or monthly IV infusions; tailor frequency to patient response.

products.name: 2XSOME
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 100mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 6 mL
products.description: 2XSOME is a lyophilized plant-derived or stem-cell-derived exosome system supplied as 100 mg exosome powder with a 6 mL activating diluent, formulated to deliver a concentrated payload of growth factors, microRNAs, and signaling proteins to the dermis for advanced skin rejuvenation. Upon reconstitution and injection, the exosome vesicles fuse with dermal fibroblasts to transfer bioactive cargo, stimulating collagen production, reducing inflammation, improving skin hydration, and supporting cellular renewal. It is indicated for skin aging, dullness, post-procedure recovery, and patients seeking regenerative anti-aging treatment.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting skin rejuvenation, hydration, brightening routines, and the appearance of improved elasticity in facial skin care sessions.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 100 mg (0.0035 oz) with activating diluent 6 mL (0.203 oz) per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg lyophilized powder with the provided 6 mL activating diluent and allow full dissolution; use within 30 minutes. Inject the reconstituted solution intradermally at 1–3 mm depth with a 30G or 32G needle via nappage or mesotherapy gun technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Perform 2–4 sessions at 2–4 week intervals; post-procedure microneedling can enhance delivery.

products.name: EXOGEN FOR HAIR AND SKIN
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 100mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 6 mL
products.description: Exogen for Hair and Skin is a lyophilized exosome system providing 100 mg exosome powder with a 6 mL activating diluent, formulated with exosomes that deliver growth factors including VEGF, IGF-1, and FGF to both scalp hair follicles and facial skin. For scalp use, the exosome-mediated signaling extends the anagen phase, promotes dermal papilla cell activity, and reduces follicular inflammation to improve hair density and reduce shedding. For skin use, the same growth factor cargo stimulates fibroblast collagen synthesis and epidermal regeneration.
products.indication: Suitable for professional protocols supporting scalp and hair routines as well as facial skin rejuvenation, intended for practitioners addressing overall scalp and skin condition.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 100 mg (0.0035 oz) with activating diluent 6 mL (0.203 oz) per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg lyophilized powder with the 6 mL activating diluent; use promptly after dissolution. For scalp injection, use a 30G or 32G needle at 3–4 mm depth via serial papule technique across the thinning area, 0.05 mL per point. For facial skin, inject intradermally at 1–2 mm via nappage. Schedule 3–6 sessions at 2–4 week intervals for both scalp and face indications.

products.name: EXOXE
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 50mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 5 mL
products.description: Exoxe is a lyophilized exosome preparation supplying 50 mg exosome powder with a 5 mL activating diluent, derived from plant or mesenchymal stem cell sources and rich in growth factors and signaling microRNAs. Upon reconstitution and intradermal injection, the exosome vesicles trigger fibroblast activation, upregulate collagen I and III synthesis, suppress inflammatory cytokines, and improve skin hydration and brightness. It is indicated for skin aging, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, acne scarring, and patients seeking cellular-level regenerative treatment.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting skin rejuvenation, hydration, and brightening routines, intended for practitioners targeting overall facial skin tone and condition.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 50 mg (0.0035 oz) with activating diluent 5 mL (0.203 oz) per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 50 mg lyophilized powder in the 5 mL activating diluent and inject within 30 minutes. Use a 30G or 32G needle to inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point across the targeted area. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2–3 week intervals; combine with microneedling for enhanced epidermal delivery and synergistic effect.

products.name: EXOBOOM SKIN
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 50mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 6 mL
products.description: ExoBoom Skin is a lyophilized exosome powder (50 mg) with 6 mL activating diluent, formulated for facial skin rejuvenation by delivering a concentrated cargo of growth factors, cytokines, and non-coding RNAs via extracellular vesicles. The exosome-mediated signaling activates fibroblast proliferation, suppresses MMPs that degrade dermal collagen, promotes angiogenesis, and restores the skin's regenerative capacity, with visible improvements in elasticity, hydration, and radiance. It is indicated for skin aging, solar damage, acne scarring, and patients requiring regenerative tissue repair beyond conventional mesotherapy.
products.indication: Suitable for professional protocols supporting skin rejuvenation, hydration, and the appearance of improved elasticity, designed for practitioners addressing overall facial skin condition.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 50 mg (0.0035 oz) with activating diluent 6 mL (0.203 oz) per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 50 mg exosome powder in the 6 mL activating diluent immediately before treatment; do not store the reconstituted solution. Inject intradermally at 1–3 mm depth with a 30G or 32G needle using nappage or serial papule technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per point. Perform 3–5 sessions at 2–4 week intervals; can be layered with laser or RF energy sessions for augmented results.

products.name: Botanic EXO
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 50mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 5 mL (NAD+, Amino acids/peptides/glutathione)
products.description: Botanic EXO is a plant-derived lyophilized exosome powder (50 mg) with a 5 mL activating diluent enriched with NAD+, amino acids, peptides, and glutathione to provide a comprehensive regenerative and brightening mesotherapy cocktail. The exosome fraction carries bioactive microRNAs and growth factors that stimulate fibroblast collagen synthesis, while NAD+ replenishes cellular energy via sirtuin activation, glutathione quenches oxidative stress, and peptides modulate melanin production. It is indicated for photoaging, hyperpigmentation, dull and fatigued skin, and patients requiring simultaneous regenerative and brightening treatment.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin rejuvenation, hydration, and brightening protocols, intended for practitioners targeting overall skin tone and condition in structured treatment sessions.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 50 mg (0.0035 oz) with NAD+, amino acid, peptide, and glutathione diluent 5 mL.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 50 mg exosome lyophilizate with the 5 mL NAD+/peptide/glutathione diluent and use within 30 minutes. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth with a 30G or 31G needle via nappage, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point, covering pigmented and aging zones. Perform 3–4 sessions at 2–3 week intervals; maintenance monthly under daily SPF50+ protection.

products.name: ASCE
products.specification: 1 SOME Exosome Powder 20mg + 2 SOME Activating Diluent 5 mL
products.description: ASCE is a premium human adipose-derived stem cell exosome preparation supplying 20 mg highly concentrated exosome powder with a 5 mL activating diluent, distinguished by its exceptionally high exosome purity and cargo potency from mesenchymal stem cell sources. The stem-cell-derived exosomes deliver a rich payload of growth factors (TGF-β, VEGF, HGF), anti-inflammatory microRNAs, and mitogenic proteins that powerfully stimulate dermal fibroblast proliferation, accelerate wound healing, suppress inflammatory cascades, and improve skin structure. It is indicated for advanced photoaging, post-acne scarring, post-laser or post-RF recovery, and high-demand skin regeneration.
products.indication: Suitable for professional protocols supporting skin rejuvenation, hydration, and brightening, intended for practitioners addressing overall facial skin tone, texture, and condition.
products.packaging: Lyophilized exosome powder 20 mg (0.0035 oz) with activating diluent 5 mL (0.203 oz) per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 20 mg lyophilized ASCE powder in the 5 mL diluent and administer promptly after full dissolution. Inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth with a 30G or 32G needle via nappage or mesotherapy gun, 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point. Session volume is typically 3–5 mL; perform 2–4 sessions at 3–4 week intervals; can be applied topically post-microneedling.

products.name: AMMI CAPTURE TIME
products.description: AMMI Capture Time is a professional humectant mesotherapy cocktail in five 3 mL vials, formulated with a blend of advanced humectants, skin-plumping actives, and brightening compounds to restore skin elasticity, radiance, and hydration in a single multi-functional solution. The preparation targets multiple aging pathways by combining high-affinity water-binding molecules that expand the dermis's moisture reservoir, antioxidants that reduce oxidative damage, and brightening agents that suppress melanin overproduction. It is indicated for dehydrated, dull, or pigmented skin requiring simultaneous hydration, elasticity improvement, and tone correction.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting hydration routines, plumping-focused objectives, and brightening, intended for practitioners addressing overall facial skin radiance.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 3 mL each, supplied as a humectant meso solution for professional in-clinic use.
products.protocol: Draw 3 mL from the vial per session with a 30G or 31G needle; inject intradermally at 1–2 mm depth via nappage or mesotherapy gun technique, 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point. Cover full face and optionally neck; total session volume of 3–5 mL is typical. Perform 4–6 weekly sessions; transition to biweekly and then monthly maintenance for sustained humectant replenishment.

products.name: ULTRA CA Bio Stimulator
products.description: Ultra CA Bio Stimulator is a calcium hydroxyapatite (CaHA) collagen-stimulating injectable supplied as two 0.8 mL prefilled syringes, analogous to Radiesse in composition with CaHA microspheres (25–45 μm) suspended in a carboxymethylcellulose gel carrier. The CaHA microspheres provide immediate volumetric correction at the injection site, and as they gradually resorb over 12–18 months, the calcium ions stimulate fibroblasts to produce new collagen type I and III, elastin, and proteoglycans for lasting structural improvement. It is indicated for mid-face volume restoration, jawline contouring, hand rejuvenation, and skin biostimulation in patients with moderate to severe volume loss.
products.indication: Intended for professional protocols supporting volume restoration routines and collagen-stimulation objectives, designed for practitioners performing structured injection-based aesthetic care.
products.packaging: Box containing 2 pre-filled syringes of 0.8 mL each, supplied as a CaHA bio-stimulator for professional use.
products.protocol: Do not reconstitute; use directly from the 0.8 mL prefilled syringe with a 25G or 27G needle. Inject into the deep dermis or subdermal plane using a retrograde linear threading or depot injection technique; for facial biostimulation, dilute with lidocaine (4:1 ratio) for a more spreadable consistency. Inject 0.5–1.6 mL per zone; perform 1–2 sessions, assess at 4–6 weeks, then maintenance at 12–18 months.

products.name: VOLASSOM calcium Bio Stimulator (Analogue of FACETEM)
products.description: Volassom Calcium Bio Stimulator (analogue of Facetem) is a calcium hydroxyapatite injectable containing CaHA microspheres in a gel carrier, supplied as two 0.8 mL syringes, formulated as a Korean-manufactured analogue of established CaHA bio-stimulators. The CaHA microspheres (average diameter 25–45 μm) act as a temporary scaffold providing immediate soft-tissue augmentation while simultaneously triggering neocollagenesis via fibroblast stimulation, with biological resorption of the calcium and phosphate particles over 12–18 months. It is indicated for facial volume restoration, skin biostimulation, jawline contouring, hand rejuvenation, and body skin tightening.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting collagen-stimulation routines and tissue-volume objectives, intended for practitioners performing structured injection-based aesthetic care.
products.packaging: Box containing 2 pre-filled syringes of 0.8 mL each, supplied as a calcium (CaHA) bio-stimulator filler.
products.protocol: Inject undiluted from the 0.8 mL prefilled syringe at subdermal or deep dermal depth with a 25G or 27G needle using retrograde threading or depot technique for contouring; for skin biostimulation, dilute with normal saline or lidocaine (3:1 to 4:1 ratio) and inject intradermally at 2–3 mm depth. Use 0.5–1.5 mL per zone; 1–2 initial sessions with 4–6 week review, then maintenance at 12–18 months.

products.name: GOURI
products.description: GOURI is the world's first fully solubilized injectable polycaprolactone (PCL) biostimulator, delivering 210 mg/mL of liquid-phase PCL in a single 1 mL pre-filled syringe. Unlike microparticle-based collagen stimulators, GOURI's homogeneous liquid formulation spreads evenly through the dermal and subdermal planes after injection, creating a three-dimensional matrix that activates fibroblasts to generate new collagen, restore elasticity, and tighten lax skin across the full face. Indications include skin laxity, loss of elasticity, fine lines, and overall facial rejuvenation requiring a biostimulation approach.
products.indication: Suitable for professional aesthetic protocols using PCL-based skin support, designed for practitioners performing structured injection-based in-clinic treatment sessions.
products.packaging: 1 box containing 1 pre-filled syringe of 1 mL, supplied as a full-liquid-type PCL preparation for injection.
products.protocol: Administer via cannula or 30–33G needle into the deep dermis or subdermis at 1–4 mm depth, distributing the 1 mL syringe across 6 directional vectors on the face without the need for manual shaping. A single treatment session is standard; results develop over 4–12 weeks and last up to 12 months. A 1-month interval is recommended before combining with cross-linked HA fillers or PRP.

products.name: DERMAHEAL HSR
products.description: DERMAHEAL HSR is a comprehensive skin-rejuvenating mesotherapy solution containing 58 active ingredients, including 10 mg/mL (1%) non-cross-linked hyaluronic acid, 5 biomimetic peptides (Acetyl Decapeptide-3, Decapeptide-4, Oligopeptide-24, Tripeptide-6, Copper Tripeptide-1), 13 vitamins, 24 amino acids, 5 minerals, 4 nucleic acids, and epidermal growth factors. The peptide complex stimulates fibroblast proliferation and collagen and elastin synthesis, while the high HA concentration provides deep intradermal hydration. Indicated for dull, dehydrated, aging, or sun-damaged skin requiring intensive biorevitalization.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting the appearance of aged or dehydrated skin and refining the look of fine lines, intended for practitioners addressing overall skin quality.
products.packaging: Box containing 10 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as a rejuvenating and moisturizing meso solution.
products.protocol: Reconstitute each 5 mL vial and administer via mesotherapy gun or manual 30G needle into the superficial-to-mid dermis at 1–2 mm depth, delivering 0.02–0.05 mL per papule across the treatment area. Standard course: 1 session per week for 4 weeks, then 2 sessions per month for 2 months, followed by monthly maintenance. Use one 5 mL vial per session for the face.

products.name: DERMAHEAL SR
products.description: DERMAHEAL SR is a Caregen-developed anti-aging mesotherapy solution containing 57 active ingredients, including 5 biomimetic peptides (Acetyl Decapeptide-3, Decapeptide-4, Oligopeptide-24, Tripeptide-6, Copper Tripeptide-1), 4 nucleic acids (Adenosine Cyclic Phosphate, Cytosine, Guanosine, Thymine), 13 vitamins, 24 amino acids, and coenzymes. The nucleic acids mobilize protein synthesis for new skin cell formation, while the peptide complex reduces fine lines, improves elasticity, and promotes optimal skin hydration. Indicated for intrinsic and extrinsic skin aging, rhytids, and loss of firmness.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin rejuvenation protocols, intended for practitioners addressing overall skin quality and the appearance of mature, fatigued, or environmentally stressed skin.
products.packaging: Box containing 10 vials of 5 mL each, supplied as a nucleic-acid-based anti-aging meso solution.
products.protocol: Administer via mesotherapy technique using a 30–32G needle into the superficial-to-mid dermis at 1–2 mm depth, delivering 0.02–0.05 mL per papule. One 5 mL vial per session; recommended frequency is weekly for 4–6 sessions, transitioning to monthly maintenance. Needle length and interval may be adjusted based on microneedling depth: shorter intervals (every 1–2 days) for 0.25 mm devices, fortnightly for 1.0 mm devices.

products.name: ESRELLA TEA TREE ESSENCE
products.description: ESRELLA Tea Tree Essence is an injectable mesotherapy soothing solution enriched with antibacterial peptides, hyaluronic acid, and growth factors alongside tea tree-derived active compounds, formulated to target acne-prone, inflamed-looking, and unevenly pigmented skin. The antibacterial peptide complex acts on sebaceous gland activity and surface microbial balance, while growth factors support tissue repair and HA delivers intradermal hydration for barrier recovery. Indicated for active blemish-prone skin, post-inflammatory erythema, and oily-congested complexions.
products.indication: Designed for professional protocols supporting blemish-prone, inflamed-looking, or unevenly pigmented skin, intended for practitioners addressing overall skin clarity and condition.
products.packaging: Box containing 5 vials of 3 mL each, supplied as a soothing anti-blemish meso solution for professional use.
products.protocol: Administer via mesotherapy gun or 30–32G needle into the superficial dermis at 1–2 mm depth; apply 0.02–0.05 mL per papule across affected zones. Recommended cycle: 1 session per week for 4–6 sessions, followed by monthly maintenance. Combine with topical anti-acne regimen between sessions; avoid simultaneous use of ablative procedures on active lesions.

products.name: REPIDA CLEARNEST INTENSIVE FOAM CLEANSER
products.description: REPIDA Clearnest Intensive Foam Cleanser is a daily facial cleanser for acne-prone and oily skin featuring patented Anti Sebum P(HD) complex and 0.5% salicylic acid to control excess sebum and exfoliate congested pores. Natural Houttuynia Cordata powder provides mild mechanical and antimicrobial exfoliation, Jeju Centella Asiatica extract delivers soothing and anti-inflammatory support, and a blend of 9 types of hyaluronic acid maintains post-cleansing hydration without stripping the barrier. Suitable for daily use on oily, acne-prone, and sensitive-feeling skin.
products.indication: Suitable for blemish-prone, oily, sensitive, or congested-looking skin, designed for daily cleansing routines with light exfoliation support and soothing botanical care.
products.packaging: 150 mL tube, supplied as a gentle daily foam cleanser for acne-prone and sensitive skin care.
products.protocol: Dispense a small amount onto wet hands, lather, and massage gently over the face in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, then rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use once or twice daily as the first step of a cleansing routine; follow with a toner and targeted treatment as clinically indicated. Avoid contact with eyes.

products.name: ACON DEEP CLEANSING FOAM
products.description: ACON Deep Cleansing Foam is a daily-use deep-cleansing foam formulated for acne-prone and oily skin, designed to remove excess sebum, decongest clogged pores, and reduce visible blackheads and breakouts. Its surfactant system penetrates follicular openings to emulsify lipid plugs, while anti-inflammatory actives help calm reactive skin during routine cleansing. Suitable as a twice-daily first step in structured anti-acne skincare protocols.
products.indication: Designed for blemish-prone skin and the appearance of clogged pores, excess shine, and uneven texture, suitable for daily cleansing routines as part of a structured skincare regimen.
products.packaging: 100 mL tube, supplied as a daily deep-cleansing foam for acne-prone and oily skin care.
products.protocol: Apply a coin-sized amount to damp skin, lather in the palms, and massage gently over the face for 30–60 seconds avoiding the eye area, then rinse with lukewarm water. Use once or twice daily; follow with appropriate toner, treatment serum, and non-comedogenic moisturizer. Limit use to once daily if dryness or irritation occurs.

products.name: ACLEAN GEL
products.description: ACLEAN Gel is a targeted leave-on treatment containing 2% salicylic acid (BHA), which penetrates the follicular canal to exfoliate comedonal plugs, reduce sebum accumulation, and suppress Cutibacterium acnes colonization. By normalizing desquamation within the pore and reducing surface inflammation, it visibly diminishes blackheads, papules, and rough texture over consistent use. Indicated for localized blemish-prone areas on the face with comedonal or inflammatory acne.
products.indication: Suitable for blemish-prone skin and the appearance of clogged pores or uneven texture; avoid application on broken, highly sensitive, or compromised skin areas.
products.packaging: 20 g tube, supplied as a topical leave-on gel containing 2% salicylic acid for targeted skin care.
products.protocol: After cleansing and toning, apply a thin layer to the affected area once or twice daily; allow to absorb before layering moisturizer or SPF. Begin with once-daily application and increase to twice daily as tolerated. Discontinue if persistent irritation, peeling, or sensitivity develops and consult a clinician. Broad-spectrum SPF 30+ is mandatory during daytime use.

products.name: ACLEAN BODY ACNE TREATMENT SPRAY
products.description: ACLEAN Body Acne Treatment Spray delivers 2% salicylic acid in a sprayable format equipped with a 360-degree applicator for self-application to hard-to-reach body areas, including the back, chest, and shoulders. Salicylic acid penetrates follicular openings to dissolve sebum plugs, exfoliate trapped keratin, and reduce inflammation responsible for truncal acne breakouts. Indicated for body acne (acne vulgaris) on sebaceous-dense truncal zones prone to comedonal and inflammatory lesions.
products.indication: Designed for body skin care on the back, chest, and shoulders prone to the appearance of blemishes, congestion, and uneven texture, intended for daily structured use.
products.packaging: 100 mL spray bottle with 360-degree applicator, supplied for body acne care with 2% salicylic acid.
products.protocol: After showering and drying the skin, spray directly onto affected body areas from approximately 10–15 cm distance; allow to absorb completely before dressing. Apply twice daily. Avoid use on broken or actively irritated skin, and apply broad-spectrum SPF 30+ to treated areas exposed to sunlight. Reduce to once daily if dryness or irritation occurs.

products.name: ACNON CREAM
products.description: ACNON Cream is a targeted spot-treatment cream combining Ibuprofen Piconol, an anti-inflammatory propionic acid derivative, and Isopropylmethylphenol (IPMP), a broad-spectrum bactericidal phenol, to address inflamed acne papules and pustules at the skin surface. Ibuprofen Piconol inhibits prostaglandin synthesis to reduce erythema and swelling around active lesions, while IPMP suppresses Cutibacterium acnes and Staphylococcus epidermidis colonization. Indicated for localized inflammatory acne lesions on the face.
products.indication: Suitable for the care of inflamed-looking blemishes and the appearance of clogged pores, designed for localized application as part of a structured daily skincare routine.
products.packaging: 13 g tube, supplied as a targeted topical cream for blemish-prone skin care.
products.protocol: Cleanse and dry the face, then apply a small amount of cream directly to each inflamed lesion once or twice daily. Avoid application over large areas or on mucous membranes. Limit continuous use to the duration specified on the product label; discontinue and seek advice if worsening, irritation, or allergic reaction occurs.

products.name: AZALEA CREAM
products.description: AZALEA Cream contains 20% azelaic acid, a dicarboxylic acid that normalizes follicular keratinization, inhibits 5-alpha reductase activity within the pilosebaceous unit, and directly suppresses Cutibacterium acnes proliferation. At this concentration, azelaic acid also competitively inhibits tyrosinase in hyperactive melanocytes, making it effective for both inflammatory acne and post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation (PIH) without affecting normally pigmented skin. Indicated for mild-to-moderate acne vulgaris, PIH, and rosacea-associated erythema.
products.indication: Designed for the appearance of blemishes, uneven skin tone, and visible pigmentation, intended for use as part of a structured daily skincare routine for the face.
products.packaging: 30 g tube, supplied as a 20% azelaic acid topical cream for blemish-prone and uneven-toned skin.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to clean, dry skin twice daily (morning and evening), massaging gently until absorbed. Transient stinging, tingling, or mild peeling during the first 2–4 weeks is expected. Use broad-spectrum SPF 30+ in the morning throughout treatment. Clinical improvement typically observed at 4–8 weeks; maximum benefit at 3–6 months of consistent use.

products.name: DERMAGEN Acssak Acne Clear Facial Foam Cleanser
products.description: DERMAGEN Acssak Acne Clear Facial Foam Cleanser is a mildly acidic foaming cleanser enriched with plant-derived anti-blemish extracts and ceramides, formulated to gently decongest blemish-prone skin while reinforcing the epidermal barrier. The ceramide complex supports tight-junction integrity to prevent transepidermal water loss, while botanical actives provide antibacterial and soothing support during daily cleansing. Suitable for daily use on acne-prone, combination, and sensitized skin types requiring both clarifying and barrier-protective cleansing.
products.indication: Suitable for blemish-prone skin and the appearance of clogged pores, with gentle daily exfoliation support and soothing botanical care for sensitive-feeling skin types.
products.packaging: 180 mL tube, supplied as a mildly acidic daily foam cleanser for acne-prone and sensitive skin care.
products.protocol: Apply to wet skin, lather between the palms, and gently massage over the face for 30–60 seconds using circular motions; rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use once or twice daily as the first step of a structured anti-acne routine; follow with toner and targeted treatment. Avoid the periorbital area; reduce to once daily if tightness or dryness occurs.

products.name: P198 Filcore HB Plus program
products.specification: Lyophilized Exosome + Solvent, 2 mL + 5 mL (5 pairs)
products.description: P198 ExoHealer Filcore HB Plus is a lyophilized exosome scalp biostimulator derived from umbilical cord blood stem cell conditioned media, delivering approximately 245.7 billion exosome particles per treatment at 990,000 ppm concentration. The exosome payload carries 5 targeted scalp growth factors — EGF, VEGF, IGF, KGF, and Noggin — alongside 22 amino acids, 13 vitamins, 7 peptides, antioxidant enzymes (SOD), and hyaluronic acid in the activating solution, synergistically promoting follicular revascularization, keratinocyte proliferation, and anagen-phase prolongation. Indicated for androgenetic alopecia, diffuse thinning, and scalp recovery following inflammatory or chemotherapy-related hair loss.
products.indication: Designed for professional scalp and hair care protocols supporting scalp condition and the appearance of thinning or fatigued hair, intended for practitioners performing structured booster sessions.
products.packaging: 5 pairs of vials per box: 2 mL exosome component paired with 5 mL solvent for reconstitution and use.
products.protocol: Remove the rubber cap, pour the 5 mL Filcore Activating Solution onto the 2 mL lyophilized powder, and shake 3–4 times to dissolve fully; use immediately as the formula contains no preservatives. Apply to the scalp via MTS microneedling (0.5–1.0 mm depth) or intradermal injection with a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth. Recommended protocol: 1 session per week for 4–6 sessions, then monthly maintenance. Five pairs per box = one complete course.

products.name: DR.H.RICH HAIR FILLER
products.description: DR.H.RICH Hair Filler is a scalp microinjection solution formulated with hyaluronic acid, Acetyl Hexapeptide-1, Acetyl Tetrapeptide-3, Copper Tripeptide-1, and Biotinoyl Tripeptide-1 in a phosphate-buffered saline carrier. The peptide complex stimulates dermal papilla cell proliferation and anchoring protein expression, Copper Tripeptide-1 strengthens the hair shaft, and HA provides follicular hydration and microenvironment support. Indicated for androgenetic alopecia and diffuse scalp thinning requiring direct follicular nutrient delivery.
products.indication: Designed for use within professional scalp protocols intended to address hair thinning concerns and to support overall scalp condition during structured hair-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 x 1.0 mL pre-filled syringes per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Administer via scalp microinjection using a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth into the mid-dermis of the scalp using micro-papular or intradermal technique; clean the scalp with antiseptic and apply topical anesthetic as needed. Each session uses 2 syringes (1 mL each, total 2 mL). Recommended course: 4 sessions at 2-week intervals; assess response at session 4 for maintenance planning.

products.name: HAIRNA EXOSOME HAIR FILLER
products.description: HAIRNA Exosome Hair Fill is a syringe-format scalp solution combining adipose-derived stem cell (ASC) exosomes and RSC-exosomes with Copper Tripeptide-1, Biotinoyl Tripeptide-1, FGF2 (fibroblast growth factor 2), SCF (stem cell factor), Noggin, Biotin, and Panthenol. The exosomal payload delivers mRNA, lipids, and signaling proteins that promote anagen-phase induction, reduce scalp inflammation, and reinforce the follicular barrier through cell-to-cell communication. Indicated for hair thinning, alopecia areata, and inflammatory scalp conditions.
products.indication: Intended for use within professional scalp programs that are designed to address hair thinning and to support the surrounding follicular environment as part of structured care.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 x 2.5 mL pre-filled syringe per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Administer via mesoscooter (dividing the scalp into sections and applying the product in vertical, horizontal, and diagonal strokes 5–10 times per zone) or by intradermal injection with a 30–32G needle inserted at approximately 30 degrees into the superficial-to-mid dermis at 2–3 mm depth. Recommended cycle: 1 session per week for 4–6 weeks, followed by monthly maintenance sessions.

products.name: ASCE HRLV EXOSOME HAIR FILLER
products.description: ASCE+ HRLV is a pharmaceutical-grade lyophilized exosome preparation developed by ExoCoBio using proprietary ExoSCRT technology, providing approximately 10 billion ultra-pure stem cell-derived exosomes per milliliter after reconstitution. The exosome payload includes 1,008 distinct proteins and growth factors supporting the anagen hair growth phase, 598 types of microRNAs with anti-inflammatory activity, Biotin, and Copper Tripeptide-1 for follicular regeneration and shaft strengthening. Indicated for androgenetic alopecia, hair thinning, and scalp conditions requiring high-potency exosome biostimulation.
products.indication: Designed for use within professional hair-care protocols that aim to support scalp and follicle condition as part of a structured, practitioner-led treatment routine.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 vial containing 20 mg of lyophilized powder, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 20 mg lyophilized vial with 3–5 mL of sterile saline under aseptic conditions; shake gently until fully dissolved and administer immediately. Inject intradermally or subcutaneously into the scalp using a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth. Standard protocol: 3–5 sessions at 2-week intervals; results are typically visible at 3–4 months. Use immediately after reconstitution; do not store diluted product.

products.name: EXOBOOM HAIR FILLER
products.description: EXOBOOM Hair Filler is a two-component exosome scalp system comprising 50 mg of lyophilized adipose-derived stem cell conditioned media exosome powder and a 6 mL activating solution formulated with scalp-targeted growth factors, peptides, amino acids, and hyaluronic acid. Upon reconstitution, exosomal vesicles deliver signaling biomolecules including FGF, EGF, and VEGF to dormant follicular stem cells, promoting anagen re-entry, scalp microcirculation, and anti-inflammatory cellular signaling. Indicated for diffuse hair thinning, androgenetic alopecia, and scalp recovery.
products.indication: Intended for use within professional scalp protocols that are designed to support hair and scalp condition as part of structured, practitioner-led care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 1 vial of lyophilized powder 50 mg with 1 activating liquid 6 mL per kit.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 50 mg lyophilized powder with the 6 mL activating liquid; mix gently and use immediately. Apply to the scalp via intradermal injection with a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth, or via microneedling device (0.5–1.0 mm depth) with topical distribution. Protocol: 1 session per week for 4–6 sessions, followed by monthly maintenance. Avoid washing the scalp for 4 hours post-treatment.

products.name: HAIRLUMA Exosome Hair Growth Solution
products.specification: 5 mL x 10 vials + 15 mL x 1 tube
products.description: HAIRLUMA Exosome Hair Growth Solution is a professional dual-format exosome hair system combining injectable vials (5 mL × 10) and a topical serum tube (15 mL × 1), providing in-clinic intradermal delivery alongside a home-care maintenance channel. The exosome complex carries growth factors, peptides, and scalp-nourishing actives that modulate the follicular stem cell niche, support anagen prolongation, and reduce scalp-level DHT-mediated inflammation associated with androgenetic alopecia. Indicated for thinning hair, alopecia, and scalp conditions requiring combined injectable and topical biostimulation.
products.indication: Designed for use within professional scalp protocols intended to support thinning hair concerns, scalp recovery routines, and advanced practitioner-led scalp care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 10 vials together with 15 mL x 1 tube per pack, as stated in the specification.
products.protocol: For the injectable vials: administer via 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth into the scalp dermis, 1 vial (5 mL) per session weekly for 4–6 sessions. For the topical tube: apply to a clean, towel-dried scalp daily and massage gently with fingertips to enhance absorption between clinic sessions. Avoid scalp washing for at least 4 hours after injection treatments.

products.name: ULTRA HAIR
products.description: ULTRA HAIR is a professional scalp mesotherapy ampoule formulated to nourish and reinforce weakened hair follicles, combining a peptide complex with vitamins, amino acids, minerals, and hyaluronic acid in a ready-to-use 3 mL vial. Its active components support follicular microenvironment hydration and nutrient supply, helping to shift follicles from telogen toward anagen phase and improve overall scalp condition in cases of diffuse thinning or stress-related hair loss. Indicated for nutritional supplementation of the scalp in androgenetic, telogen effluvium, and stress-induced alopecia.
products.indication: Intended for use in professional scalp programs designed to nourish and strengthen weakened scalp areas while supporting routine hair-care comfort.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3 mL x 5 vials per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Administer via mesotherapy gun or manual 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth into the scalp dermis, distributing one 3 mL vial per session across the treatment zone. Recommended frequency: 1 session per week for 4–6 sessions, then monthly maintenance. Apply topical anesthetic 30–45 minutes prior if indicated; avoid scalp washing for 4 hours post-injection.

products.name: DERMAHEAL HL
products.description: DERMAHEAL HL is a Caregen-developed anti-hair loss mesotherapy solution containing 56 active ingredients, including 4 biomimetic peptides — Decapeptide-4 (CG-IDP2), Acetyl Decapeptide-3, Oligopeptide-41 (CG-Keramin1), and Copper Tripeptide-1 — alongside 13 vitamins, 24 amino acids, 4 coenzymes, and 5 minerals. CG-Keramin1 (Oligopeptide-41) directly blocks DHT-induced follicular miniaturization and stimulates hair cell proliferation, while Copper Tripeptide-1 strengthens the hair shaft and promotes follicular vascularization. Indicated for androgenetic alopecia, diffuse thinning, and DHT-sensitive hair loss in both male and female patients.
products.indication: Suitable for use within professional protocols designed to support hair and scalp condition as part of structured, practitioner-led hair-care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 10 vials per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Administer 1 vial (5 mL) per session via mesotherapy technique using a 30–32G needle at 2–3 mm depth into the scalp dermis; apply antiseptic and topical anesthetic beforehand as clinically indicated. Frequency: 1 session per week for 10 weeks (one full box), followed by monthly maintenance. Combine with evidence-based anti-hair loss oral or topical treatment for enhanced outcomes.

products.name: DERMAGEN Many Shoot Plus+
products.description: DERMAGEN Many Shoot Plus+ is a 50 mL topical scalp treatment containing Menthol, Salicylic Acid, Biotin, Retinol, and mushroom extracts, formulated to address multiple scalp concerns simultaneously. Salicylic acid exfoliates sebum-clogged follicular openings to improve active penetration; Biotin and Retinol support keratinocyte differentiation and follicular structural integrity; Menthol improves scalp microcirculation via transient receptor potential channel stimulation; and mushroom extracts deliver antioxidant and anti-inflammatory support to the follicular niche. Indicated for scalp congestion, diffuse hair thinning, and sebum-associated hair loss.
products.indication: Helps reduce hair loss, nourish hair follicles, and improve scalp condition
products.packaging: Supplied as a 50 mL bottle per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply 5–10 drops directly to a clean, dry scalp and massage gently with fingertips to ensure even distribution and absorption. Use daily as a leave-on scalp serum, preferably after cleansing with an anti-hair loss shampoo. Do not rinse; allow to absorb fully before styling. Consistent use over a 90-day cycle is recommended for optimal results.

products.name: DERMAGEN Trimo90 Shampoo (Anti-hair Loss)
products.description: DERMAGEN Trimo90 Shampoo is a functional anti-hair loss scalp shampoo containing KFDA-certified active ingredients: HairVax complex (VEGF, KGF, bFGF growth factors + peptides), Copper Tripeptide-1, Saw Palmetto (Serenoa Serrulata Fruit Extract) for DHT-mediated sebum regulation, MOplex Complex (9 patented natural extracts including Ginkgo, Safflower, and Fleeceflower), Dexpanthenol for hair elasticity, and Salicylic Acid for follicular decongestion. The growth factor blend normalizes scalp barrier function while Saw Palmetto reduces excess sebum production linked to follicular miniaturization. Indicated for daily use as part of the 90-day Trimo90 anti-hair loss program.
products.indication: Suitable for use within daily routines designed to address scalp sensitivity concerns and to provide structured hair-care support for sensitive or stressed scalps.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 500 mL bottle per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Wet hair with warm water, apply 3–5 mL and massage evenly through the scalp, allow the lather to remain in contact for 3 minutes to allow active ingredient absorption, then rinse thoroughly. Use daily as part of the Trimo90 protocol; the '90' designation reflects the recommended continuous 90-day usage period for measurable anti-hair loss outcomes. Combine with Trimo90 Tonic for synergistic scalp support.

products.name: DERMAGEN Trimo90 Tonic (Anti-hair Loss)
products.description: DERMAGEN Trimo90 Tonic is a leave-on scalp tonic containing KFDA-certified functional actives Dexpanthenol (improves hair elasticity and strengthens roots), Salicylic Acid (removes excess sebum and scalp debris), and L-Menthol (promotes scalp circulation), together with HairVax growth factors (VEGF, KGF, bFGF), Copper Tripeptide-1, and the MOplex Complex of 9 patented botanical extracts. The tonic's leave-on format maximizes follicular contact time for growth factor and peptide delivery compared to rinse-off formulations. Intended for daily use as the second step in the Trimo90 anti-hair loss protocol.
products.indication: Designed for daily scalp care routines that are intended to support overall hair and scalp condition within structured, practitioner-led or home-based hair-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 120 mL bottle per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: After shampooing and towel-drying, apply the tonic directly to the scalp using the applicator tip, distributing evenly across thinning or affected areas, and massage gently with fingertips; do not rinse. Use daily for a minimum of 90 consecutive days as part of the full Trimo90 protocol. Pair with Trimo90 Shampoo for comprehensive follicular coverage.

products.name: DERMAGEN Mohealer Shampoo
products.description: DERMAGEN Mohealer Shampoo is a functional scalp-care shampoo formulated with Biotin (supports keratin biosynthesis), Dexpanthenol (Provitamin B5, improves hair elasticity), Niacinamide (supports scalp microcirculation and barrier function), Zinc Pyrithione (controls scalp-colonizing fungi associated with seborrheic hair loss), Copper Tripeptide-1 (follicular stimulation), U-PEPTO complex, MOplex complex, and Brewer Yeast Extract (amino acid and B-vitamin source for follicular nourishment). The multi-active formula simultaneously addresses the major contributing factors of scalp-associated hair thinning including seborrheic inflammation, follicular nutrient deficiency, and impaired scalp barrier integrity. Indicated for seborrheic alopecia, diffuse thinning, and general scalp health maintenance.
products.indication: Designed to support structured scalp-care routines and to provide a comfortable cleansing experience as part of practitioner-recommended hair-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 500 mL bottle per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Wet hair thoroughly, apply an adequate amount and massage evenly through the scalp, leave on for 2–3 minutes to allow active absorption, then rinse completely with water. Use 3–5 times per week or daily as directed; combine with Mohealer Tonic for a complete leave-on/rinse-off Mohealer scalp care program. Continue consistently for at least 8–12 weeks for measurable results.

products.name: DERMAGEN Mohealer Tonic
products.description: DERMAGEN Mohealer Tonic is a leave-on scalp treatment delivering Copper Tripeptide-1, peptide complexes (U-PEPTO, MOplex, and MGplex), Biotin, Panthenol, Niacinamide, and Zinc Pyrithione directly to the follicular microenvironment without rinse-off dilution. Copper Tripeptide-1 promotes follicular vascularization and shaft strengthening, Zinc Pyrithione controls dandruff-associated Malassezia colonization, and the proprietary MOplex complex of botanical extracts provides antioxidant and anti-inflammatory scalp support. Intended for daily leave-on use alongside Mohealer Shampoo as a comprehensive scalp-care maintenance program.
products.indication: Suitable for inclusion in routine scalp-care programs designed to support hair and scalp condition as part of structured, practitioner-recommended hair-care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 120 mL bottle per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: After cleansing with Mohealer Shampoo and towel-drying, apply the tonic directly to the scalp using the applicator or by dispensing onto fingertips, distribute evenly across affected areas, and massage gently; do not rinse. Use daily or as directed; consistent application over 8–12 weeks is recommended for measurable improvement in scalp condition and hair quality.

products.name: MelaNosa Cream 4%
products.description: MelaNosa Cream 4% is a medical-grade depigmenting cream containing 4% hydroquinone, which inhibits tyrosinase — the rate-limiting enzyme in the melanin biosynthesis pathway — to reduce melanin production and progressively lighten hyperpigmented lesions. It is indicated for melasma (chloasma), post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, freckles, senile lentigines (age spots), and solar lentigines caused by excess melanocyte activity in the epidermis. The 30 g cream format supports localized or zonal application across facial and body hyperpigmentation zones.
products.indication: • Melasma (chloasma) • Freckles • Post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation • Age spots / sun spots • Uneven skin tone due to excess melanin
products.packaging: Supplied as a 30 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to affected areas once or twice daily (morning and evening); avoid contact with periorbital and perioral mucosa. Mandatory broad-spectrum SPF 30+ sunscreen during daytime use to prevent photoreactivation of melanocytes. Standard treatment duration is 2–6 months; reassess at 8 weeks. Limit continuous use to 6 months; taper and incorporate alternative brightening actives for maintenance to reduce risk of ochronosis.

products.name: ALBENDAZOLE (Dewormer)
products.description: Albendazole is a broad-spectrum benzimidazole anthelmintic that selectively binds to parasite beta-tubulin, inhibiting tubulin polymerization and thereby causing microtubule disassembly, energy depletion via glycogen consumption, and death of susceptible intestinal and tissue-dwelling helminths. Each 400 mg tablet provides a single-dose effective against roundworm, hookworm, whipworm, and pinworm infestations, with extended dosing cycles used for tissue cestodoses including cysticercosis and echinococcosis. Supplied as 2 tablets per pack for a standard two-dose or single-dose deworming course.
products.indication: Intended for intestinal deworming use under appropriate clinician guidance and in accordance with locally applicable prescribing information and patient assessment.
products.packaging: Supplied as 2 tablets per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: For intestinal nematode infections: 400 mg as a single oral dose, taken with a fatty meal to enhance absorption; a second dose may be given 2–3 weeks later for confirmed reinfection. For tissue parasite infections (echinococcosis, cysticercosis): 400 mg twice daily with meals for 28 days, followed by a 14-day drug-free interval, for a total of 3 cycles. Dosage, cycle number, and follow-up are determined by the prescribing clinician; not recommended in the first trimester of pregnancy.

products.name: D PANSEPTIC CREAM
products.description: D Panseptic Cream is a steroid-free, preservative-free, and fragrance-free topical antiseptic cream combining Chlorhexidine Hydrochloride 5 mg/g (broad-spectrum bactericidal agent effective against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria) and Dexpanthenol 50 mg/g (Provitamin B5, which converts to Pantothenic Acid in the skin to accelerate epithelial repair and maintain skin moisture). The dual-active formula provides simultaneous microbial control and wound-bed moisturization, making it suitable for minor wound care in sensitive populations including infants and post-procedure skin. Indicated for minor cuts, abrasions, superficial burns, post-injection site care, and general antiseptic first-aid use.
products.indication: Designed as an antiseptic care option suitable for sensitive skin and children, including general minor injury aftercare within routine household first-aid practice.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 30 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Clean the affected area with water or saline; apply a thin layer of cream directly to the wound or skin surface 2–3 times daily; cover with a sterile dressing if clinically indicated. Suitable for use on sensitive skin and children. Avoid application inside deep wounds or cavities. Discontinue if rash, unusual sensitivity, or lack of healing progress occurs and seek clinical review.

products.name: SCARDERM GEL
products.description: Scarderm Gel (10 g) is a topical scar-care gel combining Allantoin (promotes keratinocyte proliferation and scar tissue softening), Heparin (anticoagulant and anti-fibrotic that reduces collagen cross-linking in hypertrophic tissue), and Onion Extract (Allium Cepa, which inhibits fibroblast proliferation and downregulates TGF-beta signaling to flatten raised scars). The triple-active synergy addresses excess collagen deposition, scar vascularization, and tissue stiffness, making it effective across hypertrophic scars, keloids, post-surgical scars, burn scars, and injury-related scarring. This smaller 10 g tube is suited for localized facial or limited-area scar management.
products.indication: Designed to support routines aimed at softening and smoothing the visible appearance of scars and helping to maintain pliable, comfortable scar tissue over time.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 10 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a small amount of gel to the fully epithelialized scar area and massage gently with fingertips in a circular motion for 3–5 minutes, 2–3 times daily. Treatment should begin once wounds are fully closed; optimal results require consistent use for 3–6 months. Combine with silicone sheeting or compression therapy as clinically indicated for hypertrophic scars. Avoid application on open or infected wounds.

products.name: SCARDERM GEL
products.description: Scarderm Gel (20 g) contains the same triple-active formulation of Allantoin, Heparin, and Onion Extract (Allium Cepa) as the 10 g variant, providing the same mechanism of reducing excess collagen formation, scar tissue vascularization, and fibroblast-mediated tissue stiffening via TGF-beta inhibition. This larger 20 g tube format is designed for extended treatment courses, wider scar surfaces (such as post-surgical abdominal or thoracic scars), or multi-lesion management. Indicated for hypertrophic scars, keloids, post-surgical, burn, and trauma-related scars requiring prolonged or wide-area treatment.
products.indication: Designed to support routines aimed at softening and smoothing the visible appearance of scars, suitable for extended use cases due to the larger pack size.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 20 g tube per unit (larger format), as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply and massage into the fully epithelialized scar area 2–3 times daily for 3–6 months; for larger body areas, apply a thin even layer and massage until absorbed. Begin after complete wound closure; do not apply to open, weeping, or infected wounds. Consistent daily use over the treatment course is essential; reassess scar pliability and height at 6–8 weeks. Silicone sheeting may be used adjunctively.

products.name: RECLAN (PDRN SOLUTION)
products.description: RECLAN is a preservative-free polydeoxyribonucleotide (PDRN) solution supplied in 0.5 mL single-dose tubes; PDRN consists of low-molecular-weight DNA fragments derived from salmon sperm that activate adenosine A2A receptors, stimulating tissue repair, promoting angiogenesis, and exerting anti-inflammatory effects via the cAMP pathway. Though registered as an ophthalmic preparation for dry eye, PDRN's regenerative and anti-inflammatory properties have led to its off-label application in dermatology for skin hydration, post-procedure recovery, and periocular rejuvenation. Each single-dose tube ensures sterility and prevents preservative-related cellular toxicity.
products.indication: Intended for hydration and skin-care support within suitable practitioner-led routines, used under appropriate clinical guidance and in line with labeled administration.
products.packaging: Supplied as 0.5 mL x 30 single-dose tubes per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: For ophthalmic use: instill 1–2 drops into the conjunctival sac as directed by the prescribing ophthalmologist or physician; discard unused portion after each single-dose application. For off-label dermatological use: apply topically or use for intradermal injection only under qualified medical supervision in strict accordance with the prescribing clinician's instructions. Adhere to single-dose handling and aseptic technique at all times.

products.name: EYEOCOOL RENEW PDRN
products.description: EYEOCOOL Renew PDRN contains polydeoxyribonucleotide sodium (PDRN) at 0.75% in a preservative-free, single-dose format; PDRN's salmon DNA-derived polynucleotide fragments activate A2A purinergic receptors to upregulate cellular repair mechanisms, stimulate fibroblast proliferation, and suppress pro-inflammatory cytokines including TNF-alpha and IL-1beta. The single-use 0.5 mL vials eliminate preservative-associated cellular toxicity, making this formulation particularly compatible with compromised or post-procedure skin barriers. Used clinically for skin nourishment, periorbital hydration, and post-laser or post-microneedling recovery support.
products.indication: Suitable for inclusion within structured skin-care routines that are designed to support hydration, elasticity, and overall comfort within routine maintenance programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as 0.5 mL x 30 single-dose tubes per pack, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Open a single-dose tube immediately before use; for topical skin application, apply the contents to cleansed skin and gently massage until absorbed, using once or twice daily as part of a routine skin-care regimen or post-procedure protocol. For any injection or peri-ocular clinical application, follow strict prescriber instructions and aseptic technique. Discard unused portion after each single-dose use; do not share between patients.

products.name: MADECASSOL GEL
products.description: Madecassol Gel (10 g) is a lightweight, non-greasy topical gel formulated with Centella Asiatica extract (Madecassoside) as the active ingredient, which promotes fibroblast proliferation, stimulates collagen synthesis via TGF-beta1 upregulation, reduces hyaluronic acid degradation, and exerts anti-inflammatory effects on post-procedure and wounded skin. It is antibiotic-free and steroid-free, making it suitable for repeated use on sensitive, reactive, or recently treated skin without risk of antibiotic resistance or corticosteroid-related side effects. Indicated for post-laser, post-peel, post-microneedling, and post-injection recovery, as well as minor wound healing and scar management on the face.
products.indication: Designed for post-procedure skin-care routines and for inclusion in programs addressing the appearance of scars, burns, and general skin irritation comfort.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 10 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to clean, intact, or healing skin as needed throughout the day, 2–4 times daily, gently dabbing without friction. This smaller 10 g format is ideal for targeted facial post-procedure care. Begin application after active weeping or bleeding has ceased; use consistently until the skin is fully recovered. Combine with SPF 30+ during daytime use on healing skin.

products.name: MADECASSOL GEL
products.description: Madecassol Gel (20 g) contains the same Centella Asiatica (Madecassoside) active as the 10 g formulation, promoting collagen synthesis, fibroblast activity, and anti-inflammatory tissue repair without antibiotics or steroids. The larger 20 g tube accommodates wider treatment areas, extended post-procedure courses, or multi-zone simultaneous application including full-face laser or peel recovery. Indicated for sensitive and post-procedure skin, minor wounds, redness, irritation, and scar-area conditioning.
products.indication: • Sensitive / irritated skin • Post-procedure care (laser, peeling, MTS) • Minor wounds (non-infected) • Redness and skin recovery
products.packaging: Supplied as a 20 g tube per unit (larger format), as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer 1–2 times daily to clean skin; gently dab onto treated areas without friction and allow to absorb before applying sunscreen or other topicals. Start once active oozing has resolved. The 20 g size is suited for full-face application or multi-session treatment courses requiring higher product volume. Pair with broad-spectrum SPF 30+ during daytime recovery.

products.name: MELATONING CREAM 2%
products.description: Melatoning Cream 2% is a skin-brightening topical cream combining Melatonin — an endogenous neurohormone and potent antioxidant that modulates melanocyte stimulating hormone (MSH) receptor activity and scavenges reactive oxygen species that upregulate melanogenesis — and Niacinamide, which inhibits melanosome transfer from melanocytes to keratinocytes via suppression of PAR-2 receptor signaling. The dual-mechanism formulation addresses both melanin production and distribution, suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin. Indicated for melasma, solar lentigines, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and diffuse uneven skin tone.
products.indication: Designed for routines targeting the visible appearance of hyperpigmentation, localized dark spots, and uneven skin tone within structured daily skin-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 30 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a pea-sized amount to clean, dry skin twice daily (morning and evening), massaging until fully absorbed; apply broad-spectrum SPF 30+ as the final morning step to prevent UV-induced melanogenesis counteracting treatment efficacy. Allow 8–12 weeks of consistent daily use for clinical assessment of depigmenting response. Avoid simultaneous use with products containing high-concentration retinoids or exfoliating acids without clinician guidance.

products.name: EGF ACTIVE VITAL CREAM
products.description: PRO-CALM EGF Active Vital Cream is a 20 mL regenerating moisturizer formulated with high-purity human Epidermal Growth Factor (sh-Oligopeptide-1), which binds to EGF receptors (EGFR) on keratinocytes and fibroblasts to stimulate cell division, accelerate epidermal renewal, and support dermal collagen deposition. The cream is designed for post-procedure barrier recovery, addressing impaired skin following laser resurfacing, chemical peels, or microneedling by accelerating re-epithelialization and reducing downtime. Indicated for sensitive, compromised, post-procedure, and aging skin requiring active cellular repair support.
products.indication: Designed for routines aimed at supporting skin elasticity, the visible appearance of fine lines, and overall skin renewal as part of regular structured maintenance.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 20 mL tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a pea-sized amount to thoroughly cleansed face and neck morning and evening, massaging gently until fully absorbed; for morning use, follow with broad-spectrum SPF 50+. Begin use immediately following the post-procedure cooling phase; apply as the final moisturizing step before SPF. For ongoing anti-aging maintenance, use twice daily for at least 8–12 weeks for measurable collagen-density improvements.

products.name: EASYEF
products.description: EASYEF is a high-potency active-form Epidermal Growth Factor (EGF) topical formulation in a 5 g refrigerated tube, delivering sh-Oligopeptide-1 at elevated concentration to accelerate keratinocyte proliferation, dermal fibroblast activation, and post-ablative wound re-epithelialization. The unpreserved or minimally preserved, cold-stored format preserves EGF bioactivity, making it particularly effective during the critical 72-hour post-procedure inflammatory and proliferative healing phases after laser resurfacing, microneedling, or chemical peel. Indicated as a clinical recovery accelerant for post-laser, post-peel, and post-needling skin.
products.indication: Suitable for use within post-laser, microneedling, or chemical peel recovery routines that are intended to support the comfort and resilience of the skin barrier.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 5 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Store refrigerated (2–8°C) and use within the specified open-vial period. Apply a thin layer to cleansed post-procedure skin 1–2 times daily; begin once active exudate has ceased, typically 24–48 hours post-procedure. Apply gently without rubbing to avoid disrupting fragile neo-epithelium. Use for 5–7 days post-procedure or as directed; follow with gentle SPF once re-epithelialization is complete.

products.name: D-Panthenol Cream
products.description: D-Panthenol Cream is a Provitamin B5 (Dexpanthenol)-rich emollient cream that converts to Pantothenic Acid in the skin, where it acts as a co-factor for acetyl-CoA synthesis essential to keratinocyte proliferation and epidermal barrier lipid production. It deeply hydrates, softens, and supports the repair of dry, cracked, or irritated skin by stimulating epithelial cell mitosis and promoting glycosaminoglycan synthesis, making it gentle enough for routine use on infants, delicate, and highly sensitive skin. Indicated for dry and sensitive skin, diaper rash, minor burns, superficial skin irritation, and general aftercare following aesthetic procedures.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive skin, infants, and general aftercare routines that aim to support skin comfort and hydration within structured daily skin-care practice.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 50 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to the affected skin area 1–3 times daily, gently massaging until absorbed; for infants, apply to clean, dry skin at each nappy change or as directed. For post-procedure use, apply after the acute inflammatory phase has resolved to support barrier restoration. No time-limited restriction on daily use; reduce frequency once skin comfort is achieved and maintained.

products.name: Rejuvenex PDRN Cream
products.description: Rejuvenex PDRN Cream is a pharmaceutical-grade topical formulation containing PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide sodium) at 1,200 ppm alongside Allantoin and Onion Extract (Allium Cepa), combining three complementary scar-remodeling and skin-repair mechanisms. PDRN activates A2A adenosine receptors to stimulate tissue regeneration and reduce fibrotic collagen deposition; Allantoin increases cell turnover and softens thickened tissue; Onion Extract inhibits fibroblast proliferation and TGF-beta activity to flatten and normalize scar architecture. Indicated for post-acne marks, surgical scars, stretch marks, and general skin texture irregularities.
products.indication: Designed for routines addressing the appearance of scars, stretch marks, and uneven skin texture, supporting consistent skin-care use over an extended period.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 10 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a small amount to the fully epithelialized target area and massage gently twice daily (morning and evening). For scar treatment, begin once wounds are completely closed and continue for 3–6 months for optimal scar remodeling. For post-procedure skin recovery, use as the final recovery moisturizer after the acute phase. Refrigeration after opening is recommended if specified on the label.

products.name: Noscarna
products.description: Noscarna is a well-regarded Korean scar gel combining Allium Cepa (onion bulb) extract — which suppresses TGF-beta-mediated fibroblast activation and reduces abnormal collagen deposition — with Heparin sodium (anticoagulant and anti-fibrotic agent that deconsticts cross-linked scar matrix) and Allantoin (keratolytic and cell-renewal promoter). The triple-active synergy addresses the primary pathological drivers of hypertrophic and keloid scarring: excess fibroblast activity, scar vascularity, and rigid collagen architecture. Indicated for both newly formed and longstanding surgical, traumatic, burn, and acne scars.
products.indication: Designed for routines that aim to soften and flatten the visible appearance of both old and newly formed scars within consistent daily skin-care programs.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 20 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to the fully healed scar surface and massage gently with fingertips 2–3 times daily. For optimal results, begin treatment as soon as wounds are fully closed (epithelialized) and use consistently for 3–6 months; established scars may require longer treatment durations of 6–12 months. Combine with silicone sheeting or pressure therapy for hypertrophic scars. Avoid application on open, infected, or actively bleeding wounds.

products.name: Bentpla Gel
products.description: Bentpla Gel is a topical anti-bruising, anti-inflammatory analgesic gel formulated with Heparin Sodium 400 IU/g (loosens coagulated subcutaneous blood by suppressing Thrombokinase and Prothrombin activity), Aescin 10 mg/g (anti-inflammatory and venotonic saponin from Horse Chestnut that reduces capillary permeability), and Glycol Salicylate 20 mg/g (analgesic and anti-inflammatory salicylic acid ester for pain relief). The three-mechanism combination addresses bruise resolution, edema reduction, and local pain simultaneously, making it effective for post-injection bruising in aesthetic practice, athletic contusions, sprains, and minor swelling. Fast-absorbing gel base enhances percutaneous penetration of active ingredients.
products.indication: Suitable for general use following minor bumps, sprains, or overuse, and as a general first-aid companion within routine household, travel, or sporting care.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 15 g tube per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer of gel to the bruised, swollen, or contused area and rub gently into the skin several times daily; the fast-absorbing formula requires no occlusion. Begin use as soon as possible after the injury or post-procedure bruising appears for fastest resolution. Avoid application on open wounds, mucous membranes, or broken skin. Discontinue if skin irritation or allergic reaction develops.

products.name: Rejunera EXO-PDRN CREAM
products.description: Rejunera EXO-PDRN Cream is a premium topical recovery and anti-aging cream combining high-purity PDRN (Polydeoxyribonucleotide), which activates cellular repair via A2A adenosine receptor stimulation and upregulates collagen I and III synthesis, with Squalane — an ultra-lightweight, non-comedogenic emollient that reinforces the lipid barrier and locks in hydration without occlusive heaviness. The PDRN-Squalane combination supports both deep regenerative signaling and surface barrier protection, making this formulation particularly suited to intensive post-procedure aftercare and ongoing anti-aging maintenance. Indicated for skin recovery following laser, microneedling, chemical peel, and injectable aesthetic treatments.
products.indication: Designed for intensive daily skin-care routines and structured aftercare programs, particularly within the period following common in-office aesthetic procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 30 mL container per unit, as stated in the product specification.
products.protocol: Apply to thoroughly cleansed skin as the final moisturizing step of morning and evening routine; for post-procedure use, begin once acute redness and weeping have resolved (typically 24–48 hours post-treatment). Massage gently in upward strokes until fully absorbed, then follow with SPF 50+ in the morning. Continue daily use for 4–6 weeks post-procedure for full barrier and collagen-regeneration benefit.

products.name: ASCEplus HomeCare Sunshine Cushion PRO
products.description: ASCEplus HomeCare Sunshine Cushion PRO is a SPF50+ PA+++ sun cushion formulated with exosomes, peptides, Niacinamide, and triple Hyaluronic Acid, providing high-efficacy UV-A and UV-B photoprotection alongside active skin-conditioning agents. The exosome and peptide complex works throughout the day to support skin resilience and radiance while the Niacinamide suppresses melanin transfer for an even tone; Hyaluronic Acid delivers immediate cushion-on skin hydration. Suitable as a daily protective final step for all skin types, including post-procedure and sensitive skin requiring concurrent UV protection and active nourishment.
products.indication: - Daily sun protection - Dull and dry skin - Sensitive or stressed skin - Skin needing hydration, radiance, and protective care - Uneven tone and photoaging prevention
products.packaging: Cushion compact set containing two 12 g refills with applicator puff, total net weight 24 g.
products.protocol: Apply as the final morning skincare step over moisturizer or makeup base; press the puff gently with a patting motion for even, buildable coverage. For post-procedure skin, begin use once re-epithelialization is complete and consult with the treating physician before applying over healing tissue. Reapply every 2–3 hours as needed throughout the day, especially after perspiration, swimming, or towel contact, to maintain full SPF50+ protection.

products.name: CELLEXO Bio-Cellulose Exosome Mask
products.description: CELLEXO Bio-Cellulose Exosome Mask is a treatment-grade sheet mask utilizing a bio-cellulose carrier — a bacterial nanofiber membrane that conforms tightly to facial contours for superior occlusive delivery — infused with plant-derived exosomes and triple-weight hyaluronic acid (high, medium, and low molecular weight) to deliver hydration at multiple skin depths simultaneously. The plant exosomes carry microRNA and signaling peptides that modulate inflammatory pathways, support epidermal barrier regeneration, and activate fibroblasts, distinguishing this from conventional hydrating sheet masks. Indicated for dull, dehydrated, or inflamed skin, post-procedure recovery, and loss of elasticity and radiance.
products.indication: - Dull, tired, or dehydrated skin - Loss of elasticity and early aging signs - Sensitive or irritated skin - Skin needing hydration and repair This is not a regular sheet mask, it’s a bio-cellulose exosome treatment mask with deeper penetration, better hydration, and real skin-repair benefits.
products.packaging: Retail carton of five individually sealed bio-cellulose sheet masks, each containing 30 ml of essence.
products.protocol: Cleanse the face thoroughly, apply the bio-cellulose mask and smooth firmly to ensure full skin contact across facial contours; leave undisturbed for 15–20 minutes. Remove the mask and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin until fully absorbed; do not rinse. Use 1–3 times per week for maintenance, or daily for the first week following aesthetic procedures to maximize post-treatment recovery. Follow with serum and moisturizer if desired.

products.name: CREBEAU Placenta Pearl Essence Mask
products.description: CREBEAU Placenta Pearl Essence Mask is a brightening sheet mask saturated with plant-based placenta extract, pearl extract, and peptides that work synergistically to hydrate, improve skin radiance, and support elasticity. The essence base delivers concentrated nourishment in a single 15-20 minute application, leaving the complexion visibly smoother and more luminous.
products.indication: - Dull and uneven skin tone - Fine lines and early aging signs - Dry or dehydrated skin - Skin needing nourishment and glow
products.packaging: Retail carton containing ten individually packaged sheet masks, each saturated with 25 ml of essence.
products.protocol: Apply to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15-20 minutes. Remove the sheet and massage residual essence into the face, neck, and decollete until fully absorbed. Use 1-3 times per week as a stand-alone treatment or after in-clinic procedures.

products.name: SPIDER TOXIN PROGRAM
products.specification: Toxin serum 0.6g/30 pouches + Micro Needle Serum 0.9g/10 pouches
products.description: SPIDER TOXIN PROGRAM is a dual-step topical system combining a smoothing toxin serum with a bio micro-needle serum to optimize ingredient penetration and surface texture refinement.
