The toxin serum works to relax facial expression lines while the dissolvable micro-needle serum delivers active ingredients into the upper dermis for deep hydration and visible firming.
products.indication: Intended for the appearance of fine lines, uneven texture, and reduced elasticity, and designed for both professional in-clinic application and complementary home-care routines.
products.packaging: Program set: Toxin serum 0.6 g across 30 pouches plus Micro Needle Serum 0.9 g across 10 pouches.
products.protocol: Cleanse the skin thoroughly, then apply the toxin serum evenly across target zones and allow to absorb. Layer the micro-needle serum onto priority wrinkle areas and press gently to activate the dissolving needles. Use the toxin serum daily and the micro-needle serum 2-3 times per week for cumulative results.

products.name: Rejuran Healer Calming Lip Balm
products.description: Rejuran Healer Calming Lip Balm is formulated with c-PDRN (Polynucleotide) derived from salmon DNA and nourishing shea butter, providing cellular repair support alongside long-lasting moisture retention for delicate lip tissue. The lightweight texture absorbs without stickiness, making it suitable for daily use and as a post-procedure lip comfort product.
products.indication: Designed for dry, sensitive, or easily chapped lips and intended for daily comfort, ongoing conditioning, and use following in-clinic lip treatments.
products.packaging: Single retail tube containing 3.7 g of lip balm with a precision applicator tip.
products.protocol: Apply a thin even layer to clean, dry lips as needed throughout the day, after eating, or immediately following in-clinic lip filler or laser treatments. Reapply generously at bedtime for overnight conditioning. No rinsing required.

products.name: Vanhalla BLEMISH Tranexamic Acid 3 Serum
products.description: Vanhalla BLEMISH Tranexamic Acid 3 Serum delivers 3% tranexamic acid alongside niacinamide and botanical brightening agents to inhibit melanin transfer, reduce post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and visibly even skin tone over consistent daily use. The lightweight 30 mL formula is suitable for blemish-prone complexions and areas of persistent discoloration.
products.indication: Intended for blemish-prone or marked complexions and designed for daily use on skin seeking tone uniformity, clarity, and continued comfort.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 30 mL of serum with a precision dropper applicator.
products.protocol: Dispense 3-4 drops onto cleansed skin morning and evening, pressing gently across hyperpigmented zones and the full face. Follow immediately with moisturizer and, during daytime use, always apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen as tranexamic acid increases photosensitivity. Visible results are typically observed after 4-8 weeks of consistent use.

products.name: Vanhalla NIACINAMIDE Skin Tone Balance Serum
products.description: Vanhalla NIACINAMIDE Skin Tone Balance Serum contains a concentrated niacinamide (vitamin B3) complex that inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, minimizes enlarged pores, and regulates sebum production for a refined, even complexion. The 30 mL formula is well-tolerated across combination, oily, and blemish-prone skin types.
products.indication: Designed for skin seeking refined tone and pore care and intended for daily use on most skin types, including combination and oil-prone complexions.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 30 mL of serum with a calibrated dropper applicator.
products.protocol: Apply 3-4 drops to cleansed skin morning and evening before moisturizer, focusing on pore-enlarged and uneven-tone areas. During morning application, follow with broad-spectrum sunscreen. Niacinamide can be layered with other actives including vitamin C and hyaluronic acid without interference.

products.name: Vanhalla ETINOL 3R SERUM
products.description: Vanhalla ETINOL 3R Serum combines pure retinol with plant-derived bakuchiol and a multi-peptide complex in a vegan formulation designed to support collagen synthesis, smooth fine lines, and improve skin firmness over time. Bakuchiol modulates retinol-like receptor pathways and enhances tolerability, making the formula suitable for reactive skin types seeking gradual slow-aging benefits.
products.indication: Designed for nightly slow-aging routines and intended for sensitive skin seeking gradual wrinkle smoothing, improved firmness, and a more resilient surface appearance.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 30 mL of serum with a precision dropper applicator.
products.protocol: Apply a pea-sized amount to cleansed skin in the evening only, beginning with 2-3 applications per week and gradually increasing to nightly use as tolerance is established over 4-6 weeks. Always apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen in the morning throughout the treatment course.

products.name: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Essence in Toner
products.description: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Essence in Toner is a 2-in-1 formula combining ceramide NP and panthenol for barrier repair with a multi-weight hyaluronic acid complex (sodium hyaluronate and hydrolyzed HA) for layered hydration. Niacinamide, vitamin C, and allantoin further support tone uniformity, soothing, and gentle surface renewal.
products.variantLabel: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Essence in Toner
products.indication: Intended for dry or barrier-weakened complexions and designed for daily hydration, soothing care, and texture refinement on all skin types.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 100 mL of essence toner with a flip-top dispensing cap.
products.protocol: Apply to freshly cleansed skin morning and evening using a cotton pad or by gently pressing with the palms before subsequent serum and cream steps. For enhanced hydration, layer 2-3 times in succession using the 7-skin method before heavier skincare steps.

products.name: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Serum in Cream
products.description: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Serum in Cream is a 2-in-1 moisturizer delivering ceramide NP for barrier restoration alongside a triple-weight hyaluronic acid complex (hyaluronic acid, sodium hyaluronate, and hydrolyzed HA) for multi-depth hydration retention. Glycerin, tocopherol (vitamin E), and allantoin provide antioxidant protection and skin-conditioning softness.
products.variantLabel: VANHALLA Ceramide Moisturizing Serum in Cream
products.indication: Designed for dry complexions or a compromised barrier and intended for skin seeking softer, more supple appearance through consistent daily moisturizing care.
products.packaging: Single retail jar containing 50 mL of serum-cream with an inner sealing disc and screw lid.
products.protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin morning and evening as the final moisturizing step in the routine. Massage gently in upward strokes across the face and neck until absorbed, and reapply a small amount to particularly dry zones as needed throughout the day.

products.name: Vanhalla CICA CALM MIST TONER
products.description: Vanhalla CICA CALM MIST TONER features 6% enhanced centella asiatica extract as its primary active, delivering concentrated madecassoside and asiaticoside to calm redness, support barrier integrity, and gently exfoliate sensitized skin. The fragrance-free, colorant-free, vegan formula is dispensed as a fine mist for even distribution over reactive or compromised complexions.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive or easily irritated complexions and intended for daily refreshing, gentle exfoliating care, and comfort support throughout the day.
products.packaging: Single retail mist bottle containing 250 mL of toner with a fine-spray nozzle applicator.
products.protocol: Mist evenly over cleansed skin at 15-20 cm distance as the first step of morning and evening routines, then press the mist into the skin with clean palms. Reapply throughout the day to refresh hydration and soothe environmental irritation. Suitable for use immediately post-procedure to calm treated skin.

products.name: SOONSU AQUA CREAM
products.description: SOONSU AQUA CREAM is a post-procedure recovery cream formulated with ceramide and skin-conditioning actives to restore the moisture barrier and balance the oil-to-hydration ratio following MTS, laser, or microneedling treatments. The fast-absorbing, non-occlusive texture provides a silky, comfortable finish without interfering with skin healing.
products.indication: Designed for post-procedure skincare following sessions such as MTS or laser treatments and intended for skin needing nourishing hydration without a heavy or occlusive feel.
products.packaging: Single retail container holding 50 mL of cream with a hygienic sealed inner liner.
products.protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin immediately following in-clinic procedures or twice daily during the post-procedure recovery period. Gently press into the treated area without rubbing and reapply on particularly dehydrated zones as needed to support barrier restoration.

products.name: SKIN MARKER PEN (White)
products.description: Skin Marker Pen (White) is a precision-tip surgical-style skin marking tool with a white pigment formulated for clear visibility across all skin tones, including medium to deep complexions where conventional blue or black markers may be difficult to see. The sterile-format tip enables accurate placement mapping for needle-based, microneedling, filler, and cosmetic tattoo procedures.
products.indication: Designed for use by trained practitioners to map treatment locations and intended for clear, temporary marking of points and reference lines on the skin surface.
products.packaging: Single white skin marker pen with capped precision tip, supplied individually for clinic use.
products.protocol: Mark target injection points, symmetry lines, and anatomical reference guides on cleansed, dry skin prior to the procedure. Complete all markings before commencing treatment and wipe residual pigment clean with an appropriate skin cleanser or 70% isopropyl alcohol wipe after the procedure.

products.name: Mask sheets for face (Random masks)
products.description: This hybrid gel sheet mask is formulated with a hydrating essence base that adheres closely to the skin contours, enabling even distribution of conditioning and moisturizing ingredients throughout the wear period. The soft gel texture supports comfortable application across facial skin and maintains contact without displacement during treatment.
products.indication: Designed for cosmetic skin care use and intended for general topical application as directed, suitable for inclusion in routine facial care and post-care comfort sessions.
products.packaging: Standard retail packaging containing a single use hybrid gel mask in a sealed protective pouch.
products.protocol: Apply the mask to freshly cleansed skin, smooth firmly to remove air pockets, and leave in place for the duration indicated on the packaging (typically 20-30 minutes). Remove and gently pat remaining essence into the skin using clean fingertips until fully absorbed.

products.name: OPACIOUS COLLAGEN MASK
products.specification: 35g of collagen - rich essence that melts into the skin overnig
products.description: OPACIOUS COLLAGEN MASK is an overnight sleeping mask delivering a collagen-rich ampoule-grade essence that gradually melts into the skin during sleep, providing extended exposure to collagen peptides, hydrating actives, and surface-smoothing agents. The concentrated single-use format functions as an intensive weekly treatment rather than a daily rinse-off mask.
products.indication: Designed for skin seeking intensive overnight hydration and a smoother-looking appearance and intended for use as a weekly or biweekly intensive recovery step.
products.packaging: Single sleeping mask unit containing 35 g of collagen-rich essence in a sealed treatment pouch.
products.protocol: Apply a generous, even layer as the absolute final step of the evening skincare routine after all serums and moisturizers. Leave on overnight without rinsing. In the morning, rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water to remove residue. Use 1-2 times per week for optimal reconditioning results.

products.name: INVU REPARATIVE BB
products.description: INVU REPARATIVE BB is a triple-functional BB cream combining SPF50+ PA++++ sun protection with a CICA Complex (madecassoside, asiaticoside) for barrier soothing, niacinamide and adenosine for brightening and wrinkle care, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for hydration, and three types of collagen for elasticity support. The formula provides natural, sheer tone-up coverage with a smooth non-sticky finish suitable for sensitive, dry, oily, or post-procedure skin.
products.indication: Designed for uneven or dull tone and post-procedure touch-up and intended for dry, oily, or sensitive skin needing light coverage paired with reliable UV protection.
products.packaging: Single retail tube containing 30 mL of BB cream with a precision dispensing nozzle.
products.protocol: Apply an even layer over the final morning skincare step, blending outward from the center of the face toward the jawline and hairline. Do not apply to open wounds or immediately post-ablative procedures. Reapply every 2-3 hours during prolonged sun exposure to maintain SPF50+ protection.

products.name: REPIDA BODY TONE-UP RADIANCE SERUM
products.description: REPIDA BODY TONE-UP RADIANCE SERUM combines EGF (epidermal growth factor) and PDRN to support skin cell renewal and collagen synthesis on body skin, paired with niacinamide for melanin inhibition, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for hydration, adenosine for elasticity, and fermented botanical extracts for soothing and brightening. The waterproof soft cream texture absorbs quickly without greasiness, delivering simultaneous tone-up and daily UV defense on arms, underarms, legs, and decollete.
products.indication: Designed for dull or uneven body skin and intended for arms, underarms, legs, decollete, and other exposed areas needing brightening support and replenishing hydration.
products.packaging: Single retail tube containing 200 mL of body serum with a flip-top dispensing cap.
products.protocol: Dispense an appropriate amount onto clean body skin after bathing or showering and massage evenly in circular motions until fully absorbed. During daytime wear on exposed areas, layer with a broad-spectrum SPF sunscreen for additional protection. Use daily for cumulative brightening and firming effects.

products.name: REPIDA AZULENE H9 DERMA PLUS BOOSTER CREAM
products.description: REPIDA AZULENE H9 DERMA PLUS BOOSTER CREAM is formulated with natural azulene at 1,000 ppm as a primary anti-inflammatory agent, supported by 9 types of hyaluronic acid for multi-depth hydration, 9 types of collagen for elasticity, 8 peptides for firming and renewal, niacinamide for brightness, and botanical extracts including centella asiatica. The naturally purple formula is designed as a booster step to calm irritation and prime the skin to enhance absorption of subsequent skincare products.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive, redness-prone, acne-prone, or dehydrated complexions and intended for use as a daily booster step within morning and evening routines.
products.packaging: Single retail container holding 50 mL of booster cream with a sealed inner protective liner.
products.protocol: Apply an even layer to cleansed skin as the first booster step before serum and cream, morning and evening. Press gently with palms to activate absorption and allow 30-60 seconds for the formula to fully penetrate before layering additional products. Particularly suited for use after in-clinic treatments to calm immediate post-procedure redness.

products.name: G2 OIL LIFTING PACK (Wrinkle Mask Pack Cream)
products.description: G2 OIL LIFTING PACK combines a G2 Fermented Complex of garlic and ginger extracts with peptides, ceramides, and multi-weight hyaluronic acids in an all-in-one mask-cream format designed to deliver immediate tightening alongside deep hydration. The fermented botanical actives support skin regeneration and improve firmness and elasticity while the mask phase creates a temporary lifting effect upon application.
products.indication: Designed for skin appearing sagging, dry, or dull and intended for use as a firming, hydrating mask treatment within weekly or biweekly intensive care routines.
products.packaging: Single retail container holding 50 mL of mask cream with a sealed inner protective liner.
products.protocol: Apply a generous even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave on for 15-20 minutes as a mask treatment. Tissue off the excess or massage the remaining cream gently into the face in upward lifting motions until absorbed. Use 2-3 times per week as an intensive treatment or as directed.

products.name: WHEAT GERM AMPOULE
products.description: WHEAT GERM AMPOULE is a lightweight daily soothing ampoule featuring a patented wheat germ extract as its signature anti-inflammatory active, supported by multiple botanical extracts to calm redness, strengthen the skin barrier, and reduce sensitivity. The formula is specifically developed for breakout-prone and reactive skin types, helping to suppress irritation triggers while maintaining a fresh, non-sticky finish.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive, irritated, or breakout-prone skin and intended for daily soothing care, barrier support, and use within recovery-focused skincare routines.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 50 g of ampoule with a precision dropper applicator.
products.protocol: Apply 3-4 drops to cleansed skin morning and evening before moisturizer, pressing gently across the face with clean palms. Allow 30-60 seconds for full absorption before layering subsequent skincare steps. Can be applied directly to inflamed breakout zones as a localized calming treatment.

products.name: EU.MEI SUN ESSENCE
products.description: EU.MEI SUN ESSENCE provides SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum protection in a 75% moisture essence base enriched with wheat germ-derived actives that calm UV-induced irritation and support barrier integrity alongside photoprotection. The formula is developed for sensitive and reactive skin types, offering reliable sun protection without white cast, fragrance, or heavy residue.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive, dry, or easily reddened complexions and intended for daily UV protection across all skin types within both indoor and outdoor routines.
products.packaging: Single retail tube containing 50 g of sun essence with a precision flip-top applicator.
products.protocol: Apply as the absolute final step of the morning skincare routine, spreading an even layer across the face and neck with gentle upward strokes. Reapply every 2 hours during continuous outdoor exposure or after sweating or towelling. For adequate SPF, apply at minimum 0.5 mL (approximately one finger length) to the face and neck.

products.name: EU.MEI YOUTH FIRMING EYE CREAM
products.description: EU.MEI YOUTH FIRMING EYE CREAM combines high- and low-molecular-weight hyaluronic acid for layered hydration with glycine saponin for microcirculation support and wheat germ-derived actives to improve firmness, reduce puffiness, and diminish the appearance of dark circles around the fragile periorbital skin. The fragrance-free, fast-absorbing formula targets wrinkles, smile lines, and localized neck fine lines simultaneously.
products.indication: Designed for the look of fine lines, puffiness, dark circles, and dryness around the eyes and intended for use on delicate eye contour and localized neck areas.
products.packaging: Single retail container holding 30 g of eye cream with a sealed inner protective liner.
products.protocol: Using the ring finger, gently tap a rice-grain sized amount around the orbital bone following the bone's contour (not directly on the eyelid skin) morning and evening. Avoid dragging the tissue and never apply closer than 5 mm to the inner mucous membrane. Allow full absorption before applying concealer or eye makeup.

products.name: WHEAT GERM COLLAGEN SKIN CARE SET
products.description: WHEAT GERM COLLAGEN SKIN CARE SET is a complete 3-step routine combining a toner (120 mL), lotion (120 mL), and cream (50 g), each formulated with 2.5x-purity hydrolyzed collagen and wheat germ extract to improve moisture retention for up to 24 hours, restore skin elasticity, and reinforce a weakened barrier. The micro-collagen particle size enables fast absorption without heaviness, making the set suitable for dry and sensitive skin seeking daily deep hydration.
products.indication: Dry, sensitive skin • Loss of elasticity • Dull texture • Weak barrier Key Features: ✔️2.5× collagen purity ✔️Deep hydration (up to 24h) ✔️Improves elasticity + barrier ✔️Fast absorption micro-collagen ✔️Wheat germ extract (antioxidant care) ✔️0.00 irritation / free from 7 harmful ingredients
products.packaging: Three-piece skincare set containing Toner 120 mL, Lotion 120 mL, and Cream 50 g in retail carton.
products.protocol: Use in sequence morning and evening on cleansed skin: first apply the toner with a cotton pad or hands to balance hydration, then layer the lotion for mid-level moisture, and finish with the cream to seal and protect the routine. The complete 3-step sequence is free of 7 designated harmful ingredients and safe for daily use.

products.name: KLARGEN LactoBath
products.description: KLARGEN LactoBath is a gentle feminine intimate cleanser formulated with lactic acid to maintain an acidic pH (3.8-4.5) in the vulvar microenvironment, paired with Lactobacillus ferment extract to support a healthy microbial balance and centella asiatica extract to calm irritated or sensitized skin. Vitamin C provides antioxidant support while the mild cleansing base removes odor-causing bacteria without disrupting the delicate intimate tissue.
products.indication: Helps cleanse the intimate area, maintain healthy pH balance, soothe sensitive skin, and reduce odor and irritation.
products.packaging: Single retail bottle containing 300 mL of feminine cleanser with a pump dispenser.
products.protocol: Dispense a small amount onto clean hands, lather gently across the external vulvar area only (do not apply internally), and rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water until completely clean. Use once or twice daily as a routine hygiene step. Avoid contact with eyes and rinse immediately if irritation occurs.

products.name: KLARGEN soln.
products.description: KLARGEN soln. is a portable 50 mL feminine intimate cleanser formulated with lactic acid for pH maintenance, Lactobacillus ferment extract for microbial balance support, centella asiatica extract for soothing, and vitamin C alongside botanical extracts for antioxidant and comfort benefits. The compact travel-friendly format delivers the same clinically supported intimate hygiene care as the full-size product in a convenient on-the-go bottle.
products.indication: Helps cleanse the intimate area, maintain healthy pH balance, reduce odor, and soothe sensitive skin.
products.packaging: Single portable retail bottle containing 50 mL of feminine cleanser with a travel-friendly cap.
products.protocol: Apply a small amount to the external intimate area, create a light lather between clean hands, and rinse thoroughly with water until completely clean. Use once or twice daily or as needed during travel. Do not apply internally, and discontinue use if persistent irritation or discomfort develops.

products.name: ASCE+ IRLV (Exosome Solution)
products.specification: Lyophilized exosome powder 20mg x 1 vial + Diluent 2.5 mL x 1 vial
products.description: ASCE+ IRLV is a lyophilized exosome-based formulation containing 20 mg of highly purified exosome powder per vial, designed for intimate area rejuvenation targeting vaginal dryness, decreased lubrication, and loss of tissue elasticity in the vulvovaginal region. Upon reconstitution with the supplied 2.5 mL diluent, the exosomes deliver signaling molecules that stimulate fibroblast activity, collagen synthesis, and tissue hydration at the cellular level.
products.indication: Helps improve vaginal dryness, enhance lubrication, increase tissue elasticity, and improve skin texture and tone of the intimate area.
products.packaging: Retail box containing 20 mg lyophilized exosome powder vial and 2.5 mL diluent vial per set.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the lyophilized powder with the full 2.5 mL diluent and mix gently until fully dissolved. Administer topically to the external intimate area using a cotton-tipped applicator or equivalent device, 1-2 times daily; avoid direct mucosal injection unless specifically indicated by a supervising physician. Treatment cycles of 4-8 weeks are typically recommended.

products.name: P198 RECORE INNER GEL (ExoNature)
products.description: P198 RECORE INNER GEL contains PSC1994-EXPG™ Panax ginseng-derived exosomes alongside lactic acid for pH maintenance, multi-weight hyaluronic acid for tissue hydration, and peptides to support elasticity and intimate skin renewal. The single-use prefilled applicators deliver 2.5 g of gel per application directly to the V-zone, combining exosome-mediated cellular signalling with microbiome-supportive and moisturizing actives.
products.indication: Helps maintain pH balance, improve hydration, reduce dryness, odor, and discomfort, and support elasticity and intimate skin health
products.packaging: Retail pack of four single-use applicators, each prefilled with 2.5 g of intimate care gel.
products.protocol: Use one single-use applicator per session following the directions printed on the packaging. Insert gently and deposit the gel as indicated, then discard the applicator hygienically after a single use. Use 3-4 times per week initially, reducing to a maintenance frequency of 1-2 times weekly as directed by the treating practitioner.

products.name: VELATOX GF11
products.description: VELATOX GF11 is a professional skin booster containing 11 distinct cell growth factors (including EGF, FGF, and IGF variants) combined with antioxidant vitamins and anti-pigmentation and moisturizing components across 3 mL vials. The multi-growth-factor complex supports keratinocyte and fibroblast proliferation, accelerates collagen remodelling, and improves skin elasticity and tone uniformity.
products.indication: Helps improve wrinkles, elasticity, brightening, hydration, and overall skin vitality.
products.packaging: Standard professional packaging supplied for in-clinic dispensing and storage compatibility.
products.protocol: Administer 3 mL per session via 30G mesotherapy injections into the upper to mid-dermis at 1-2 mm depth, using a multi-puncture or nappage technique across the treatment area. A series of 4-6 sessions spaced 2-4 weeks apart is recommended; maintenance sessions every 3-6 months. Provided as ready-to-use solution requiring no reconstitution.

products.name: VELASH SHGF11
products.description: VELASH SHGF11 is a scalp-specific ampoule delivering 11 cell growth factors alongside nourishing, moisturizing, and antibacterial components in a 10 mL volume per vial, formulated to strengthen hair follicle anchoring, stimulate hair cycle transition from telogen to anagen, and reduce scalp dryness and inflammation. The accompanying soothing moisturizer completes the post-treatment scalp care protocol.
products.indication: Helps cleanse the scalp, strengthen hair roots, reduce dryness, and support healthier hair growth.
products.packaging: Set comprising five 10 mL scalp ampoule vials and one accompanying soothing moisturizer.
products.protocol: Apply the ampoule directly onto a freshly cleansed scalp using a fine-tip applicator or mesotherapy injection (30G, 1-2 mm depth for injectable protocols), distributing evenly across the parting lines and thinning zones, then massage for 2-3 minutes. Follow with the soothing moisturizer to seal and calm the scalp. Perform 1-2 sessions per week for 8-12 weeks as an initial course.

products.name: CAMELLEX Camellia Exo No.5
products.specification: Exosome Powder 100mg x 3 vials + Solvent Ampoule (PDRN+Collagen+Peptides) 6 mL x 3 vials
products.description: CAMELLEX Camellia Exo No.5 is a dual-ampoule skin booster pairing 100 mg of plant-derived camellia exosomes per vial with a 6 mL solvent ampoule containing PDRN, collagen, and peptides alongside botanical extracts. Camellia-derived exosomes carry bioactive lipids and flavonoids that accelerate skin repair and renewal, while PDRN activates adenosine A2A receptors to promote fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis.
products.indication: Helps improve hydration, elasticity, regeneration, fine lines, and skin glow.
products.packaging: Set comprising 100 mg exosome powder vials x 3 plus 6 mL solvent ampoule vials x 3 per box.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the exosome powder with the full 6 mL solvent ampoule and mix gently until fully dissolved without vigorous shaking. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm depth) or 30G mesotherapy injections (1-2 mm intradermal depth) across the target area. Recommend a series of 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; maintenance every 3-6 months.

products.name: LXC LACTO EXO COLLA
products.specification: Exosome Powder 100mg x 5 vials + PDRN+Peptides 6 mL x 5 vials
products.description: LXC LACTO EXO COLLA combines 100 mg of Lactobacillus-derived exosomes per vial with a 6 mL PDRN and collagen peptide solvent to support skin regeneration, barrier repair, and elasticity improvement through complementary mechanisms. Lactobacillus exosomes modulate skin microbiome-associated inflammation and enhance ceramide production, while PDRN and plant stem cell extract synergistically drive collagen neosynthesis.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin booster protocols, intended to support hydration, nourishment, and elasticity-focused care routines in clinical aesthetic settings.
products.packaging: Kit with 100 mg exosome powder x 5 vials plus PDRN and peptide solution 6 mL x 5 vials.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the exosome powder with the 6 mL PDRN + peptide solvent and mix gently until dissolved. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm depth) or 30G mesotherapy injections (1-2 mm intradermal) across the treatment zones. A standard course is 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; repeat the course 1-2 times annually for maintenance.

products.name: RXC RED EXO COLLA
products.specification: Exosome Powder 100mg x 5 vials + PDRN+Peptides 6 mL x 5 vials
products.description: RXC RED EXO COLLA is a multi-source exosome skin booster combining exosomes derived from four botanicals (Panax ginseng, centella asiatica, camellia japonica, and carrot) with PDRN, collagen, peptides, glutathione, arbutin, tranexamic acid, and vitamin C. The comprehensive formula simultaneously targets skin regeneration, elasticity restoration, brightening, and hyperpigmentation reduction through parallel cellular pathways.
products.indication: Intended for professional skin booster protocols designed to support elasticity, hydration, even tone, and brightening-focused aesthetic care routines.
products.packaging: Kit with 100 mg exosome powder x 5 vials plus PDRN and peptide solution 6 mL x 5 vials.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg exosome powder with the 6 mL PDRN + peptide solvent, mixing gently until fully dissolved. Administer via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm) or 30G intradermal mesotherapy (1-2 mm depth) across the face and neck. A standard course of 4-6 sessions every 2-4 weeks is recommended; follow with sunscreen compliance post-treatment due to brightening actives.

products.name: SELASTIN TOX GF11
products.description: SELASTIN TOX GF11 is an anti-wrinkle and brightening skin booster containing Syn-Ake (a synthetic tripeptide mimicking waglerin-1 for muscle relaxation), multiple growth factors (EGF, FGF, IGF), glutathione, arbutin, vitamins C/B2/B3/B12, and adenosine in a 5 mL ready-to-inject formulation. The Syn-Ake component inhibits nicotinic acetylcholine receptors at the neuromuscular junction, providing a non-botulinum wrinkle-relaxing effect alongside growth factor-driven collagen stimulation.
products.indication: Helps reduce wrinkles, improve firmness, brighten skin, and support anti-aging care.
products.packaging: Supplied as a kit containing 5 mL x 5 vials for professional skin booster applications.
products.protocol: Administer the full 5 mL per session via 30G intradermal mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm depth using a multi-puncture nappage technique across the face. Sessions are typically scheduled every 2-4 weeks for a course of 4-6 treatments. No reconstitution required; use the ready-to-inject vial immediately upon opening.

products.name: SELASTIN EXO PLUS
products.specification: Exosome Powder 100mg x 5 vials + PDRN+Collagen+Peptides 5 mL x 5 vials
products.description: SELASTIN EXO PLUS is an exosome-based regenerative skin booster combining 100 mg of highly bioactive exosomes per vial with a 5 mL solvent containing PDRN, collagen, peptides, madecassoside, asiaticoside, phytosterol, glycoside, and tannin. Madecassoside and asiaticoside from centella asiatica reduce post-injection inflammation while supporting collagen type I and III synthesis alongside the exosome-mediated repair cascade.
products.indication: Intended for professional skin booster protocols designed to support elasticity, soothing, and regenerative-focused aesthetic care routines in clinical settings.
products.packaging: Kit with 100 mg exosome powder x 5 vials plus PDRN, collagen, and peptide solution 5 mL x 5 vials.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 100 mg exosome powder with the full 5 mL PDRN + collagen + peptide solvent and mix gently until dissolved. Administer via 30G mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm intradermal depth or via microneedling (0.5-1.5 mm). Recommend 4-6 sessions every 2-4 weeks; best tolerated with topical anaesthetic cream applied 30-45 minutes prior.

products.name: CURENEX SCULP
products.description: CURENEX SCULP is a poly-L-lactic acid (PLLA) collagen biostimulator supplied as 360 mg of sterile microparticle powder per vial. PLLA microparticles stimulate a controlled fibroplasia response, inducing neocollagenesis and gradual volumetric restoration in areas of facial volume loss, fine lines, and skin laxity over a period of weeks to months following injection.
products.indication: Designed for professional collagen biostimulation procedures intended to support firmness and elasticity-focused aesthetic care in qualified clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as 360 mg of poly-L-lactic acid biostimulator powder per vial for professional use.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 360 mg PLLA powder in 5-8 mL of sterile water for injection or lidocaine solution, mixing vigorously for 2-3 minutes and allowing to hydrate for a minimum of 2 hours (or overnight) at room temperature before use. Inject intradermally to the deep dermis or subcutaneous plane using a 25-26G needle or cannula; avoid superficial injection. A series of 2-3 sessions at 4-6 week intervals is standard, with results developing progressively over 3-6 months.

products.name: CURENEX PDRN
products.specification: Multi peptide, Glutathione, Collagen, HA, 5 mL x 5 vials
products.description: CURENEX PDRN Multi is a multifaceted bio-revitalizing booster combining salmon-derived polydeoxyribonucleotide (PDRN) with multi-peptides, glutathione, collagen, and hyaluronic acid in a 5 mL injectable formulation. PDRN activates adenosine A2A receptors to upregulate VEGF expression, promote fibroblast proliferation, and accelerate tissue repair, while glutathione provides systemic antioxidant and brightening support.
products.indication: Suitable for professional revitalizing skin booster protocols designed for use in clinical aesthetic settings by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Supplied as a kit containing 5 mL x 5 vials of salmon-derived PDRN booster solution.
products.protocol: Administer 1-5 mL per session via 30G intradermal mesotherapy injections at 1-2 mm depth across the face, neck, or targeted zones using a multi-puncture or linear threading technique. Standard courses consist of 4-6 sessions at 2-4 week intervals; maintenance injections every 2-3 months. No reconstitution required; use the ready-to-inject vial upon opening.

products.name: CURENEX DAILY CARE SKINBOOSTER (SERUM)
products.description: CURENEX Daily Care Skinbooster Serum is a topical daily serum featuring salmon DNA (PDRN-derived) as its signature nourishing active, formulated at a concentration designed for transdermal absorption to support cellular renewal, hydration balance, and oil regulation on the skin surface. The lightweight texture is designed for quick penetration without residue, suitable for use morning and evening before heavier skin care steps.
products.indication: Designed for daily home care use, intended to support skin hydration, a smooth appearance, and balanced moisture across normal skin types.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 30 mL serum bottle for daily home care application.
products.protocol: Dispense 3-4 drops or one pump onto cleansed skin morning and evening, then press the serum gently across the face and neck with clean palms. Allow 30-60 seconds for full absorption before layering moisturizer or sunscreen. Best used as part of a complete Curenex home-care routine following in-clinic PDRN booster sessions for enhanced results.

products.name: CURENEX REJUVENATING CREAM
products.description: CURENEX Rejuvenating Cream is a nourishing topical cream formulated to condition, comfort, and support skin recovery during post-procedure care and daily home routines. The formulation provides a barrier-supportive and hydrating effect suited to skin in the healing phase following injectable or energy-based aesthetic treatments.
products.indication: Designed for daily home care and as part of a post-procedure routine, intended to support skin comfort and conditioning after aesthetic treatments.
products.packaging: Supplied as a single-unit cream tube for daily home care use.
products.protocol: Apply an appropriate amount to cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently in upward motions across the face and neck until fully absorbed. During the post-procedure recovery period, apply as directed by the treating practitioner to support barrier repair and minimize transepidermal water loss. Avoid applying to open or ablated wound areas.

products.name: CURENEX HYDRATING CLEANSER
products.description: CURENEX Hydrating Cleanser is a gentle daily facial cleanser formulated with botanical extracts to remove impurities and makeup residue while maintaining skin hydration and comfort throughout the cleansing process. The mild surfactant base is designed to avoid stripping the acid mantle, leaving the skin balanced and calm after washing.
products.indication: Designed for daily cleansing across all skin types, including sensitive skin, and intended to support a comfortable, balanced after-cleanse feel.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 150 mL bottle for daily home use cleansing routines.
products.protocol: Dispense an appropriate amount onto damp skin, massage gently across the face in slow circular motions for 30-60 seconds to emulsify impurities, then rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water morning and evening. Avoid hot water, which can disrupt the skin barrier, and follow immediately with the Curenex toner or serum step.

products.name: CURENEX LIPO (FACE AND BODY)
products.description: CURENEX LIPO is a phosphatidylcholine (PPC)-based lipolytic injectable formulated for both facial and body fat reduction procedures. Phosphatidylcholine acts as a detergent on adipocyte cell membranes, causing lysis and subsequent removal of fatty acids via the lymphatic system, enabling targeted contouring of submental fat, jowls, localised body fat deposits, and lipomas.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial and body contouring procedures, intended for use by qualified medical practitioners in clinical aesthetic settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a kit containing 10 mL x 5 vials of PPC-based lipolytic solution for professional use.
products.protocol: Draw up the required volume from the 10 mL vial and administer via a 27-30G needle directly into the subcutaneous fat layer at 10-13 mm depth for body sites and 6-8 mm for facial applications, using a depot technique (0.1-0.2 mL per injection point) with points spaced 1 cm apart across the treatment zone. Typical sessions require 2-4 vials for body and 0.5-2 vials for facial use; schedule treatments 4-6 weeks apart for 2-4 sessions total.

products.name: CURENEX REJUVENATING MASK
products.description: CURENEX Rejuvenating Mask is a sheet-style treatment mask from the Curenex care line formulated to condition, refresh, and hydrate the skin with actives drawn from the Curenex biostimulator platform. Designed as a complementary home-care product for use between or after in-clinic Curenex booster sessions, the mask supports moisture retention and skin comfort during the recovery phase.
products.indication: Designed for regular home care use and as part of a post-procedure recovery routine, intended to support skin comfort and refreshment.
products.packaging: Supplied as a single-unit mask per individual pack for daily home use.
products.protocol: Apply the mask to freshly cleansed skin, smoothing it firmly to ensure full contact, and leave in place for 20-30 minutes as directed on the packaging. Remove and gently pat remaining essence into the skin using the ring fingers until absorbed. Use 2-3 times per week or after each in-clinic session during the post-procedure recovery window.

products.name: CURENEX EXO BRIGHTENING CREAM
products.description: CURENEX Exo Brightening Cream is a lightweight daily moisturizer infused with exosomes, PDRN, vitamins, and peptides that together target uneven skin tone, dullness, and early signs of aging in a quick-absorbing, non-greasy formula. The exosome and PDRN complex provides cellular signalling for repair and renewal while vitamins and peptides deliver concurrent brightening, antioxidant, and firming benefits.
products.indication: Designed for daily home care use, intended to support brightening and hydration across normal skin types as part of a regular skincare routine.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 mL tube or jar for daily home care application.
products.protocol: Apply a pea-to-pearl-sized amount to cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently in upward circular motions across the face and neck until fully absorbed. For optimal brightening efficacy, follow morning application with broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen. Ideal for use as part of a comprehensive Curenex home-care regimen between clinic sessions.

products.name: CURENEX EYE
products.description: CURENEX Eye is a prefilled 2 mL periorbital skin booster containing 1% polynucleotide (PN) and 1% hyaluronic acid with lidocaine for patient comfort, formulated specifically for the delicate under-eye and periorbital region. PN supports fibroblast activation and extracellular matrix remodelling to reduce dark circles and hollowing, while HA provides immediate volumetric hydration and tissue smoothing for tear-trough and crow's feet improvement.
products.indication: Designed for professional under-eye revitalization procedures, intended for use by qualified medical practitioners in clinical aesthetic settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 2 mL x 1 prefilled syringe of polynucleotide-based solution with lidocaine for professional use.
products.protocol: Administer the 2 mL syringe content via a 30G or 32G needle at 1-2 mm intradermal depth using a superficial multi-puncture technique in a grid pattern across the periorbital zone, taking particular care in the thin skin beneath the eye. Inject 0.01-0.02 mL per depot at points spaced 0.5-1 cm apart; lidocaine onset facilitates patient comfort. Recommend 3-4 sessions at 2-4 week intervals, with maintenance every 3-6 months.

products.name: CURENEX SNOW PEEL
products.specification: 4 vials x 1g Snowpeel C-TOX powder + 30 mL Snowpeel Activator
products.description: CURENEX Snow Peel combines purified hydrolyzed sponge spicules in C-TOX powder form with a Snowpeel Activator containing salmon DNA (PDRN), glutathione, and gluconolactone (polyhydroxy acid) for a dual-action peel. The sponge spicule microstructure provides mechanical micro-channelling and exfoliation, while the activator delivers salmon DNA for cellular repair, glutathione for brightening, and gluconolactone for gentle chemical surface renewal without the aggressive downtime of traditional acid peels.
products.indication: Designed for professional peeling and skin renewal procedures, intended to support exfoliation-focused aesthetic care performed by trained practitioners.
products.packaging: Supplied as a kit containing 4 vials x 1 g of C-TOX powder together with 30 mL of Snowpeel Activator solution.
products.protocol: Mix one 1 g C-TOX powder vial with the Snowpeel Activator in the provided ratio and stir thoroughly until the powder is fully suspended. Apply to cleansed skin and massage gently in small circular motions for 2-5 minutes to activate micro-channelling, then leave the mask on for 10-15 minutes before rinsing with lukewarm water. A course of 4-6 sessions at 2-3 week intervals is recommended; follow each session with sunscreen and avoid active retinoids for 72 hours.

products.name: CURENEX SHEER SUNSCREEN
products.description: CURENEX Sheer Sunscreen delivers SPF50+ PA+++ broad-spectrum UV protection in a lightweight daily formula enriched with PDRN, peptides, and glutathione, combining reliable photoprotection with skin-conditioning and brightening actives. PDRN supports UV-induced DNA repair, glutathione provides antioxidant quenching of ROS generated by sun exposure, and the sheer finish is designed for comfortable daily wear without white cast.
products.indication: Designed for daily broad-spectrum UV protection, suitable for use on sensitive or post-procedure skin as part of a regular morning skincare routine.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 mL tube for daily home care sun protection use.
products.protocol: Apply as the final morning skincare step, spreading a sufficient quantity (approximately 0.5 mL for face and neck) evenly across all exposed skin areas. Reapply every 2 hours during continuous outdoor exposure, after sweating, or after towelling. Particularly recommended as daily sun protection following PDRN injectable sessions and brightening treatments to prevent UV-triggered hyperpigmentation rebound.

products.name: DERMAGEN Egensia Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Egensia Cream is an intensive post-procedure recovery cream formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, EGF (epidermal growth factor), salmon egg extract, copper tripeptide-1, ceramide complex, and shea butter. These ingredients work synergistically to reinforce the skin barrier, support epidermal regeneration, and reduce post-laser redness and sensitivity. The combination of growth factors and barrier lipids makes it particularly suited for use after ablative and non-ablative laser procedures.
products.indication: Designed to soothe and condition post-laser skin and to support the skin barrier following professional aesthetic procedures in daily care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 g tube for daily home care use after aesthetic procedures.
products.protocol: For home and clinic use following laser or aesthetic procedures. Apply a thin layer to thoroughly cleansed skin twice daily, morning and evening, gently pressing in until fully absorbed. Begin application immediately after the procedure and continue throughout the recovery period. Use for a minimum of 2 weeks post-treatment, or as directed by the practitioner.

products.name: Dr. PICOS EGENCICA CREAM
products.description: Dr. PICOS Egencica Cream is a 60 g post-dermal care cream developed for sensitive and reactive skin following aesthetic procedures. The formulation delivers targeted comfort, barrier-supportive hydration, and a conditioning effect suited to delicate facial zones. It is designed to be gentle enough for skin in an active recovery phase while providing meaningful moisture retention.
products.indication: Designed to support skin comfort, hydration, and barrier-focused care after aesthetic procedures, suitable for sensitive and reactive skin types.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 60 g tube for daily home and clinic-recommended post-procedure care use.
products.protocol: For home and clinic use. Apply a thin layer to cleansed, dried skin twice daily after aesthetic procedures, gently patting in until absorbed. Continue throughout the full post-procedure recovery period. Adjust frequency based on skin sensitivity and practitioner guidance.

products.name: Dr. Picos RMV Repair Cream
products.description: Dr. Picos RMV Repair Cream is a rich 200 g barrier-replenishing daily cream designed to support the skin's moisture balance and aid recovery after professional aesthetic treatments. Its formulation provides a calming, conditioning feel suited to skin under physiological stress, including post-treatment dryness, sensitivity, and compromised barrier function. The large-format tube makes it practical for use across both face and body.
products.indication: Intended for use during skin recovery and daily care, designed to help calm, condition, and comfort irritated or stressed facial and body skin.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 200 g tube for daily home use across face and body care routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Apply liberally to cleansed skin morning and evening, focusing on dry or recovering areas, and massage gently in upward motions until fully absorbed. May be applied to both face and body. Continue throughout the recovery period as directed by the treating practitioner.

products.name: Dr. Picos Ureanol Cream
products.description: Dr. Picos Ureanol Cream is a 200 g intensive moisturizing cream formulated with urea as its principal keratolytic and humectant active, targeting very dry, rough, and thickened skin areas on the body. Urea binds water within the stratum corneum, softens thickened epidermis through keratolytic action, and supports the natural moisture factor of the skin surface. The formulation is particularly effective on elbows, heels, knees, and chronically dry patches.
products.indication: Suitable for body and problem-area care, designed to soften skin and support hydration and barrier-focused conditioning across dry, rough zones.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 200 g tube for daily home use across body and problem-area care routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use on body and problem areas. Apply an appropriate amount to affected zones once or twice daily and massage thoroughly until fully absorbed. For very thickened or fissured areas, apply under occlusion overnight for enhanced penetration. Continue regularly for at least 4 weeks for optimal keratolytic benefit.

products.name: Cindelria Tone-Up Sun Cream
products.description: Cindelria Tone-Up Sun Cream is a brightening tinted sunscreen with SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum UV protection, formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, aloe vera, and a soft-focus pigment complex to instantly unify and brighten the complexion. The formula provides both physical UV filtration via titanium dioxide and chemical UV filters while delivering a natural pink-tinted finish that reduces the appearance of dullness. It is designed as the final step of the morning skincare routine.
products.indication: Designed for daily broad-spectrum UV protection together with a brightened complexion, suitable for use as a finishing step in the morning routine.
products.packaging: 1x Pdrénza Serum 50ml 1x Pdrénza Cream 50ml Free Samples Collagen Serum 3ml, Pdrénza Serum 3ml, Pdrénza Cream 3ml, Mela-Dual Day Cream 3ml, Mela-Dual Night Cream 3ml.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Dispense a small pearl-sized amount and apply evenly to the face and neck as the closing step of the morning skincare routine, after serums and moisturizer. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged outdoor or sun exposure, or after sweating and towelling.

products.name: DERMAGEN Soothing mask
products.description: DERMAGEN Soothing Mask is a post-procedure sheet mask formulated with glycerin, panthenol, allantoin, aloe barbadensis leaf juice powder, hydrolyzed collagen, and sodium hyaluronate to rapidly soothe, hydrate, and protect skin after laser or aesthetic procedures. The ingredients create a moist recovery environment that reduces redness, swelling, and irritation, while the collagen and hyaluronate complex supports moisture retention in recovering epidermis. Supplied as 10 individually packed sheets at 23 g per sheet.
products.indication: Designed to support skin hydration and refreshment after laser and aesthetic procedures, suitable for sensitive skin during recovery routines.
products.packaging: Supplied as 10 sheets per box, each sheet weighing 23 g (0.81 oz) for individual single-use application.
products.protocol: For home or clinic use following laser or aesthetic procedures. Apply one sheet to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15 to 20 minutes, then remove and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin until absorbed. Follow with a suitable recovery cream. Use 2 to 3 times per week during the post-procedure recovery period.

products.name: DERMAGEN Well-spot Hydrocolloid
products.description: DERMAGEN Well-spot Hydrocolloid is an ultra-thin, hypoallergenic hydrocolloid spot patch that creates a moist wound-healing environment over active blemishes, post-extraction spots, and minor superficial wounds. The hydrocolloid matrix absorbs excess exudate and sebum, promotes faster epidermal closure, and provides a physical barrier against secondary contamination and picking. Each patch measures approximately 1.2 cm diameter and is discreet enough for daytime or overnight wear.
products.indication: Suitable for daily care of pimples, blemishes, and post-procedure spots, intended to support a clean, protected environment over targeted areas.
products.packaging: Supplied as 15 spots per sheet with 4 sheets per pack for daily home care use.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Apply one patch to clean, thoroughly dry skin directly over the target blemish or spot, pressing gently at the edges to ensure full adhesion. Leave in place until the patch turns opaque (indicating exudate absorption), then replace with a fresh patch. Repeat until the lesion has resolved. May be worn under makeup.

products.name: DERMAGEN White Sun Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN White Sun Cream is a triple-function SPF50+ PA++++ sunscreen formulated with glutathione, Centella Asiatica extract, niacinamide, adenosine, ethylhexyl triazone, and titanium dioxide to deliver simultaneous broad-spectrum UV protection, melanin-inhibiting brightening action, and smoothing anti-aging care. Niacinamide suppresses melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, glutathione further inhibits tyrosinase, and Centella Asiatica supports barrier integrity in post-procedure skin. Suitable as the final morning step for sensitive and post-laser complexions.
products.indication: Designed for daily UV protection together with brightening and smoothing benefits, suitable for sensitive and post-procedure skin in morning routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 g tube for daily home use sun protection and brightening care routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed and moisturized skin as the closing step of the morning routine. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged sun exposure, after sweating, or after towelling. Use consistently as part of a daily brightening maintenance protocol.

products.name: DERMAGEN Urea Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Urea Cream is a 100 g keratolytic emollient cream with urea as its key active ingredient, supplemented with squalane and tocopheryl acetate. Urea at its working concentration loosens corneocyte cohesion to exfoliate dry, thickened epidermis, binds water within the stratum corneum, and reduces itch by desensitizing C-fibre nerve endings. The squalane component reinforces the lipid barrier while tocopheryl acetate provides antioxidant protection for compromised skin.
products.indication: Designed for deep hydration of elbows, heels, knees, and overwashed hands prone to cracking, intended to support softening and conditioning of rough skin.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 100 g tube for daily home care use across rough body and problem-area routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use on rough body areas. Apply an appropriate amount to affected zones once or twice daily, massaging thoroughly into the skin until fully absorbed. For heavily thickened or fissured skin on heels and elbows, apply under light occlusion overnight for enhanced keratolytic effect. Consistent daily use over 4 to 6 weeks is recommended for optimal results.

products.name: DERMAGEN RM Repair Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN RM Repair Cream is a 200 g daily moisturizing barrier-restoration cream developed to support post-laser and post-procedure recovery and maintain optimal epidermal hydration. The formulation delivers replenishing, conditioning care to compromised facial skin, helping to restore moisture balance and comfort during the active healing phase. Its generous format supports both home use and clinic-dispensed post-treatment protocols.
products.indication: Intended for daily care after laser and aesthetic procedures, designed to help replenish moisture and condition stressed, recovering facial skin.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 200 g tube for daily home and clinic-recommended post-procedure care routines.
products.protocol: For home and clinic use. Apply a thin even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, massaging gently across the face and neck until fully absorbed. Begin use immediately following in-clinic procedures and continue throughout the recovery period, or as directed by the treating practitioner.

products.name: DERMAGEN Scargel
products.description: DERMAGEN Scargel is a transparent silicone-based gel dressing in a 15 g tube that forms a thin, breathable, semi-occlusive film over healing scar tissue. The silicone matrix maintains an optimal moisture balance at the scar surface, moderates collagen synthesis to help flatten hypertrophic and keloid scars, and protects the area from mechanical trauma. Regular use softens scar texture and reduces redness, firmness, and elevation over time.
products.indication: Designed to help support the appearance and flattening of raised post-surgical and post-trauma scars during long-term daily home care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 15 g tube for daily home care use across targeted scar areas.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Clean and dry the scar area thoroughly, then apply a thin layer of gel directly over the target scar twice daily. Allow the gel to dry completely before covering with clothing or dressings. For optimal remodelling results, use consistently for a minimum of 3 months on post-surgical or post-trauma scars. May be used in conjunction with pressure garments.

products.name: DERMAGEN Centellase Ointment
products.description: DERMAGEN Centellase Ointment is a 50 g quasi-drug topical ointment based on Centella Asiatica extract (centellase), indicated for the supportive care of superficial wounds and skin ulcers. Centellase stimulates fibroblast proliferation, promotes collagen synthesis, and improves wound epithelialization, supporting faster and more organized tissue repair. The ointment base provides a semi-occlusive barrier that maintains wound moisture and shields from external contamination.
products.indication: Designed to support the healing care of wounds and skin ulcers, intended for use as directed on the packaging or by a qualified healthcare professional.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 g tube as a quasi-drug wound treatment ointment for daily home or clinic use.
products.protocol: For home and clinic use. Cleanse the wound or affected area gently and pat dry, then apply a thin layer of ointment directly to the wound surface once or twice daily, or as directed by the packaging instructions or a qualified healthcare professional. Cover with an appropriate non-adherent dressing if required. Continue use until the wound has fully re-epithelialized.

products.name: DERMAGEN Lunatox
products.description: DERMAGEN Lunatox is a 50 g brightening cream formulated with 5% niacinamide, tranexamic acid, glutathione, hyaluronic acid, and alpha-lipoic acid to target melanin overproduction and uneven skin tone. Niacinamide inhibits melanosome transfer to keratinocytes, tranexamic acid blocks the plasmin-mediated activation of arachidonic acid in the melanin synthesis pathway, and glutathione exerts a dual inhibitory effect on tyrosinase activity. The hyaluronic acid base supports sustained epidermal hydration during daily brightening use.
products.indication: Designed for the care of pigmentation, melasma-prone, and uneven skin tone, intended to support brightening and conditioning daily routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 g tube for daily home care use across brightening-focused routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Apply a thin layer to thoroughly cleansed skin morning and evening, focusing on areas of uneven tone, hyperpigmentation, or dark spots, then gently pat in until fully absorbed before applying sunscreen or the next care step. Consistent daily use over 4 to 8 weeks is recommended for visible brightening results. Pair with SPF50+ sun protection every morning.

products.name: DERMAGEN Cicarown Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Cicarown Cream is a 50 g cooling and hydration cream formulated with Centella Asiatica extract, aloe vera extract, shea butter, ceramide complex, EGF, FGF, tocopherol, and hyaluronic acid. The combination of growth factors (EGF and FGF) supports epidermal renewal, while ceramides rebuild the intercellular lipid barrier, and aloe vera with Centella Asiatica provide immediate anti-inflammatory and soothing effects. The formulation is designed for instant cooling relief on stressed, irritated, or post-procedure skin.
products.indication: Designed for instant cooling and hydration on stressed or sensitive skin, suitable as a daily comfort step within regular home care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 50 g tube for daily home care use across cooling and hydration-focused routines.
products.protocol: For daily home use. Apply an appropriate amount to thoroughly cleansed skin as needed for cooling and hydration support, gently massaging across the face and neck until fully absorbed. May be used morning and evening as the moisturizing step in the daily routine, or applied as a targeted soothing treatment on reactive or post-procedure areas.

products.name: DERMAGEN Cindelria Tone-Up Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Cindelria Tone-Up Cream is a multifunctional daily finishing cream with SPF50+ PA++++ broad-spectrum UV protection, formulated with Centella Asiatica, Aloe Vera, Shea Butter, Ceramide Complex, EGF, FGF, Vitamin E, and Hyaluronic Acid to combine active barrier repair and skin renewal with a soft-focus pink tone-up effect. EGF and FGF support epidermal cell turnover and collagen synthesis, while ceramides reinforce barrier integrity and the UV filters protect against photodamage. The 40 mL format is suited for both daily home use and in-clinic dispensing after procedures.
products.indication: Designed for dull, fatigued-looking skin requiring daily UV protection and an even, radiant finish. Intended for use as the closing step of a daily skincare routine.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 40 mL tube for individual or in-clinic dispensing use.
products.protocol: For daily use after cleansing, toning, and serum application. Dispense a small pearl-sized amount and apply evenly across the face and neck as the closing morning skincare step, ensuring thorough coverage of sun-exposed areas. Reapply approximately every two hours during prolonged outdoor exposure or after sweating to maintain continuous UV protection.

products.name: DERMAGEN Bichaeahn Pore Toning Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Bichaeahn Pore Toning Cream is an 80 g tannin-complex targeted cream formulated with Copper Tripeptide-1, Hamamelis Virginiana (witch hazel) extract, glutathione, niacinamide, and Hippophae Rhamnoides (sea buckthorn) fruit water to refine the appearance of enlarged pores and support a brighter, more even-toned complexion. Witch hazel tannins act as an astringent to temporarily tighten pore walls, while copper tripeptide-1 promotes collagen synthesis to structurally firm the perifolicular dermis over time. Niacinamide and glutathione address surface tone unevenness and inhibit melanin transfer.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive or combination skin presenting with visible pores and uneven surface tone. Intended for daily brightening and pore-care routines.
products.packaging: Supplied in an 80 g tube for daily or in-clinic professional dispensing use.
products.protocol: For professional or daily home use. Apply an even layer to thoroughly cleansed skin, focusing on regions with visibly enlarged pores. May be used morning and evening as the moisturizing step or incorporated into post-procedure regimens once the skin barrier has fully stabilized, per practitioner judgment. Consistent use over 4 to 8 weeks is recommended for pore-toning results.

products.name: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-laser regenerating cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-Laser Regenerating Cream (60 g) is a specialist recovery cream formulated with EGF, FGF, ceramide complex, copper tripeptide-1, and shea butter to support rapid barrier restoration and epidermal regeneration following ablative or non-ablative laser procedures. Growth factors EGF and FGF stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, ceramides rebuild the disrupted lipid barrier, and copper tripeptide-1 supports organized tissue repair and anti-inflammatory recovery. The 60 g size is calibrated for individual patient post-procedure dispensing.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive, reactive skin following in-clinic laser or peeling procedures. Intended for use during post-procedure recovery as part of a barrier-support routine.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 60 g tube for individual post-procedure dispensing use.
products.protocol: For professional clinic dispensing and home use. Apply a thin even layer to gently cleansed skin immediately following the in-clinic procedure and throughout the recovery period. Reapply two to three times daily or as directed by the treating practitioner. Continue for a minimum of 7 to 14 days post-treatment until skin barrier has fully re-established.

products.name: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-laser regenerating cream
products.description: DERMAGEN Cellsia Post-Laser Regenerating Cream (500 g) is the clinic-size format of the same post-procedure barrier-restoration and regeneration cream formulated with EGF, FGF, ceramide complex, copper tripeptide-1, and shea butter. Designed for high-volume professional environments, the 500 g tube provides sufficient product for multi-patient protocols or extended clinic use. Growth factors support cellular renewal, ceramides rebuild the intercellular lipid matrix, and the anti-inflammatory actives minimize post-procedure erythema and discomfort.
products.indication: Designed for sensitive, post-procedure skin in clinic environments where larger working volumes are required. Intended for use within professional recovery protocols.
products.packaging: Supplied in a 500 g clinic-size tube for high-volume professional dispensing.
products.protocol: For professional clinic use. Decant individual-patient portions hygienically using sterile spatulas or dispensers to maintain product integrity. Apply a thin even layer to cleansed post-procedure skin and advise patients to reapply two to three times daily throughout the recovery period. Clinical replacement of dispensed portions should follow standard infection-control procedures.

products.name: DERMAGEN EZCera Cream
products.description: DERMAGEN EZCera Cream is a 200 g medical depigmenting cream formulated with 4% hydroquinone as the principal melanin-suppressing agent. Hydroquinone competitively inhibits tyrosinase, the rate-limiting enzyme in melanin biosynthesis, effectively reducing melanin production and lightening hyperpigmented lesions including melasma, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, freckles, and solar lentigines. The large-format tube supports both supervised in-clinic and home maintenance use.
products.indication: • Melasma (chloasma) • Freckles • Post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation • Age spots / sun spots • Uneven skin tone due to excess melanin
products.packaging: Supplied in a 200 g tube for daily home or in-clinic dispensing use.
products.protocol: Apply a thin layer to affected areas 1 to 2 times daily (morning and evening). Use broad-spectrum SPF50+ sunscreen during daytime throughout the treatment course to prevent UV-triggered re-pigmentation and protect existing results. Hydroquinone therapy is typically conducted in supervised 8 to 12 week cycles; treatment should be interrupted if signs of ochronosis or exogenous irritation develop. Consult a practitioner before extended use.

products.name: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 1
products.description: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 1 is a lyophilized powder containing 49.2 billion umbilical cord blood stem cell-derived exosomes per vial, supplying a high-density concentration of growth factors, mRNA, and signalling molecules that stimulate fibroblast activity, support collagen synthesis, and promote skin regeneration. The freeze-dried format preserves exosome bioactivity until reconstitution and is designed for combination with the EXOSIA Part 2 activator solution or sterile pyrogen-free saline before intradermal or topical delivery. Supplied as 10 vials x 2 mL.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin-booster protocols intended to support revitalized, healthy-looking skin. Intended exclusively for in-clinic use by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Supplied as 10 vials x 2 mL for in-clinic use.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Reconstitute one vial of Part 1 powder with the corresponding EXOSIA Part 2 activator solution (or sterile saline) and administer via intradermal mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle or via MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth. Initial course: one session per week for 3 weeks, followed by monthly maintenance sessions. Combine both Parts 1 and 2 in the same session for the full 98.4 billion exosome dose.

products.name: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 2
products.description: EXOSIA Skin Booster Part 2 is a 61-in-1 activator solution containing hyaluronic acid (5 types), 20 amino acids, 8 essential vitamins, and 7 complex peptides, formulated to serve as both the reconstitution vehicle for EXOSIA Part 1 exosome powder and as a standalone biorevitalization cocktail. The multi-ingredient blend supports effective delivery and cellular uptake of the stem cell-derived exosomes while independently providing deep hydration, antioxidant protection, and peptide-mediated collagen stimulation. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL.
products.indication: Designed for use alongside Part 1 within professional skin-booster protocols. Intended for in-clinic skin revitalization treatments performed by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL for in-clinic professional use.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Add the contents of one Part 2 vial to one Part 1 exosome vial immediately before treatment. Administer the combined preparation via intradermal injection using a 30–32G needle (nappage or serial puncture technique) or deliver topically following MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth. Recommended session schedule: weekly for 3 sessions, then monthly maintenance. Part 2 may also be used as a standalone biorevitalization booster.

products.name: GTM EXOMELA
products.specification: EXO Signal 1000 Powder 180mg + Mela Vital Solution 5 mL (5 sets per box)
products.description: GTM EXOMELA is a professional exosome-based skin booster system combining 180 mg freeze-dried EXO Signal 1000 Powder (conditioned media derived exosomes) with 5 mL Mela Vital Solution containing PDRN, tranexamic acid, glutathione, peptides, amino acids, and hyaluronic acid, specifically formulated to target hyperpigmentation, dullness, and loss of firmness. Tranexamic acid inhibits melanin synthesis via the plasmin-arachidonic acid pathway, glutathione suppresses tyrosinase activity, while PDRN and growth factor-rich exosomes stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen remodelling. Supplied as 5 treatment sets per box.
products.indication: - Hyperpigmentation, melasma, freckles, and post-inflammatory discoloration - Dull, uneven, or tired-looking skin - Loss of firmness and elasticity - Fine lines and early signs of aging - Skin rejuvenation and brightening protocols - Professional MTS / microneedling skin booster treatments
products.packaging: Supplied as 180 mg EXO Signal 1000 Powder with 5 mL Mela Vital Solution, 5 sets per box.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Reconstitute the EXO Signal 1000 Powder with the Mela Vital Solution immediately before treatment. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle (serial puncture or nappage technique) or apply topically following MTS microneedling at 0.5–1.0 mm depth across the treatment area. Recommended course: 3 to 4 weekly sessions, followed by monthly maintenance. Apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ post-treatment.

products.name: GTM PDRN MASK for face and neck
products.description: GTM PDRN Mask is a 35 mL professional sheet mask for the face and neck formulated with 3.5% PDRN (polydeoxyribonucleotide, salmon DNA extract) to promote tissue repair, support skin barrier hydration, and reduce post-procedure sensitivity. PDRN activates the adenosine A2A receptor pathway to stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, while the high-essence sheet format ensures prolonged skin contact for maximum absorption. Supplied as a box of 10 individually packaged masks.
products.indication: Designed for daily home use or in-clinic finishing care. Intended for skin in need of soothing, hydration support, and post-procedure comfort.
products.packaging: Supplied as 35 mL x 10 individually packaged sheet masks per box.
products.protocol: For professional or home use following aesthetic procedures or as a weekly treatment. Apply one sheet mask to thoroughly cleansed skin and leave in place for 15 to 20 minutes. Remove the sheet and gently pat any remaining essence into the skin until absorbed, then follow with recovery cream or SPF as appropriate. For post-procedure use, apply 2 to 3 sessions per week during the first 2 weeks of recovery.

products.name: GTM GOLD CELL PLUS
products.description: GTM GOLD CELL PLUS is a bio-revitalizing injectable skin booster containing 5% PDRN (salmon DNA extract), 5% hyaluronic acid, and 2% glutathione in a sterile 3.3 mL vial format. PDRN activates the adenosine A2A receptor to stimulate fibroblast proliferation and collagen synthesis, hyaluronic acid delivers deep intradermal hydration and volumizing support, and glutathione exerts antioxidant brightening effects by inhibiting tyrosinase. Supplied as 10 vials x 3.3 mL per box.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin rejuvenation protocols. Intended for skin showing signs of dehydration, reduced elasticity, or uneven surface tone in clinic environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 3.3 mL x 10 vials per box for in-clinic professional use.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle with serial puncture, nappage, or micro-bolus technique at 1–2 mm depth into the superficial to mid-dermis. Inject 0.02–0.05 mL per point across the treatment area. Recommended course: 3 to 4 sessions at 2-week intervals, then monthly maintenance. Results are typically noticeable after 2 to 3 sessions.

products.name: GTM GOLD CELL THE PREMIUM
products.description: GTM GOLD CELL THE PREMIUM is a professional-grade injectable skin booster for bio-revitalization delivered in 5 mL vials, combining PDRN (salmon DNA extract) and glutathione in a concentration optimized for brightening-focused skin rejuvenation protocols. PDRN acts via adenosine A2A receptor stimulation to enhance collagen remodelling and tissue repair, while glutathione inhibits tyrosinase and reduces oxidative stress-driven melanin production for a more uniform, luminous complexion. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL per box.
products.indication: Designed for professional rejuvenation and brightening protocols. Intended for skin presenting with uneven tone, dullness, or signs of fatigue in clinic environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 10 vials per box for in-clinic professional use.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle (serial puncture, nappage, or linear threading technique) at 1–2 mm depth in the superficial dermis. Dose 0.02–0.05 mL per injection point across the treatment zone. Recommended schedule: 3 to 4 sessions at 2-week intervals for the initial course, followed by monthly maintenance. Combine with post-treatment SPF50+ application.

products.name: MELACELL THE PREMIUM
products.description: MELACELL THE PREMIUM is a specialized injectable skin booster in a 5 mL vial format, designed as an intensive brightening and skin-regeneration solution combining melanin-suppressing actives with biostimulatory ingredients for advanced pigmentation and dullness correction. The formulation targets both surface and deep-dermal pigmentation while stimulating collagen synthesis and improving overall skin vitality through a multi-mechanism approach. Supplied as 10 vials x 5 mL per box.
products.indication: Designed for professional brightening protocols. Intended for skin presenting with uneven tone, dark spots, and overall dullness in clinic environments.
products.packaging: Supplied as 5 mL x 10 vials per box for in-clinic professional use.
products.protocol: For in-clinic use by qualified practitioners. Administer intradermally via mesotherapy using a 30–32G needle with serial puncture or nappage technique at 1–2 mm depth in the superficial to mid-dermis. Dose 0.02–0.05 mL per point across the treatment area. Initial course: 3 to 4 weekly or bi-weekly sessions; monthly maintenance thereafter. Apply broad-spectrum SPF50+ post-treatment to prevent photoreactivation of pigmentation.

products.name: MELACELL +
products.specification: 3.5 mL x 10 vials, 3% Tranexamic Acid + Peptide Complex
products.description: MELACELL+ is an advanced brightening injectable skin booster containing 3% tranexamic acid and a peptide complex as key actives, further enriched with niacinamide, PDRN, glutathione, amino acids, and hyaluronic acid in a sterile 3.5 mL vial.
