products.description: Botulax 200U is a higher-unit vial of the Hugel Inc. purified botulinum toxin type A complex (strain CBFC26), formulated identically to the 100U product but with twice the unit content per vial. The larger vial is suited to high-volume treatment sessions covering multiple facial zones or combining facial aesthetics with functional indications such as masseter reduction (bruxism, square jaw), hyperhidrosis (axillary or palmar), and neck platysmal band correction, where total session dose routinely exceeds 100 units.
products.indication: Designed for professional use in protocols addressing the appearance of facial expression lines, intended for application by trained practitioners within established aesthetic frameworks.
products.packaging: Each vial contains 200 units of botulinum toxin, supplied for professional aesthetic use.
products.protocol: Reconstitute with 2.0–5.0 mL of preservative-free 0.9% saline to achieve a working concentration of 4–10 U per 0.1 mL. For masseter reduction, inject 20–30 U per masseter into the bulk of the muscle using a 30G needle, with 3–5 injection points per side. For axillary hyperhidrosis, inject 50 U per axilla across 10–15 grid points (5 U/point), after minor starch-iodine test mapping. For facial aesthetics, apply standard dosing across glabella, forehead, and crow's feet as per 100U protocol. Duration 3–6 months; use within 24 hours of reconstitution.

products.name: BOTULAX 300 units

The 300U vial eliminates the need for multiple vial reconstitutions during lengthy sessions and reduces per-unit cost for established high-volume aesthetic clinics. The biological composition — human serum albumin, sodium chloride excipients — is identical to the 100U and 200U variants.
products.indication: Designed for professional use in protocols addressing the appearance of facial expression lines, intended for application by trained practitioners within established aesthetic frameworks.
products.packaging: Each vial contains 300 units of botulinum toxin, supplied for professional aesthetic use.
products.protocol: Reconstitute with 3.0–7.5 mL of preservative-free 0.9% saline to achieve the desired working concentration. Apply standard anatomical dosing across all target muscle groups using a 30–32G needle at intramuscular depth. Discard any unused reconstituted product at the end of the session; do not store for reuse beyond 24 hours post-reconstitution.

products.name: METOX 100 units
products.description: Metox 100U is a Korean purified botulinum toxin type A preparation manufactured by Maypharm Co., Ltd., presented as a white lyophilised powder containing 100 units of neurotoxin with human serum albumin and sodium chloride excipients per vial. The toxin cleaves SNAP-25 at the presynaptic terminal, blocking calcium-triggered acetylcholine vesicle fusion and producing reversible muscle chemodenervation with clinical onset at 3–7 days and duration of 6–9 months. Metox is used for cosmetic reduction of dynamic wrinkles (glabellar lines, forehead, crow's feet) and functional applications including hyperhidrosis and blepharospasm.

products.description: Ascorbic Acid Injection (Huons) is a pharmaceutical-grade ascorbic acid formulation at 500 mg per 2 mL ampoule, manufactured by Huons (Korea) for IV or IM vitamin C supplementation. Each low-volume ampoule is suited for direct IV push supplementation, mixing into IV drips, or IM use in clinical and aesthetic settings. Ascorbic acid at this concentration supports collagen synthesis, antioxidant defences, and mild skin brightening when administered repeatedly.
products.indication: Suitable for antioxidant support, brightening-oriented regimens, and post-procedure supportive protocols delivered under qualified clinical supervision.
products.packaging: 500 mg / 2 mL ascorbic acid, supplied as 2 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: For IV supplementation, add 1–2 ampoules (500–1,000 mg) to an existing IV drip bag or administer slow IV push over 2–5 minutes diluted in 10–20 mL saline. For IM use, inject 500 mg into the gluteal or deltoid muscle using a 23G 25 mm needle. Administer 2–3 times weekly for maintenance or adjunctive brightening protocols.

products.name: ATP-S Inj. (Adenosine Triphosphate) Injection
products.description: ATP-S Inj. delivers adenosine triphosphate (ATP) at 10.98 mg/mL in 2 mL ampoules, providing exogenous ATP for cellular energy metabolism and peripheral vasodilation. Exogenous ATP stimulates purinergic P1 and P2 receptors, facilitating vasodilation, improving microcirculatory perfusion, and supporting cellular energy turnover in tissues with increased metabolic demand. It is used in aesthetic and wellness IV protocols targeting fatigue, poor circulation, and skin vitality, as well as in cardiac electrophysiology diagnostics.
products.indication: Designed for use within clinician-supervised protocols intended to support energy metabolism and post-treatment recovery in professional care settings.
products.packaging: ATP solution at 10.98 mg/mL, supplied as 2 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: For aesthetic IV wellness protocols, dilute 1–2 ampoules in 100–250 mL of normal saline and infuse slowly over 30–60 minutes via 23–25G cannula, typically once to twice weekly. Rate must not exceed 10 mg/minute to avoid transient palpitations or flushing. Use under clinical supervision; contraindicated in patients with AV block or bronchospasm.

products.name: Acepain Inj.
products.description: Acepain Inj. is a ready-to-use intravenous solution of acetaminophen (paracetamol) at 1 g per 100 mL, supplied as a pre-filled IV infusion bag for perioperative and post-procedural analgesia. Acetaminophen inhibits central prostaglandin synthesis via cyclooxygenase pathways in the CNS, providing non-opioid pain relief with a rapid onset of approximately 5 minutes after IV administration and duration of up to 4 hours per dose. It is indicated for moderate post-procedural pain management in aesthetic and surgical settings.
products.indication: Helps relieve mild to moderate pain, fever, headache, postoperative pain, and general discomfort.
products.packaging: Acetaminophen 1 g / 100 mL, supplied as one ready-to-use IV infusion bag.
products.protocol: Infuse the full 100 mL bag IV over 15 minutes using a standard IV administration set; no dilution required. Adult dose: 1 g every 6 hours (maximum 4 g/day). Use as part of a multimodal analgesia protocol post-procedure. Reduce dose or frequency in patients with hepatic impairment or body weight under 50 kg. Monitor liver function with repeated courses.

products.name: Multivita
products.description: Multivita is a lyophilised multivitamin preparation combining fat-soluble vitamins (A, D2, E) and water-soluble B-complex vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B12, biotin, folic acid) with ascorbic acid, designed for IV parenteral supplementation or adjunctive vitamin infusion therapy. Lyophilisation preserves the potency of heat-labile vitamins in a sterile powder form that requires reconstitution before administration. Indicated for vitamin deficiency states, peri-operative nutritional support, and aesthetic IV drip protocols.
products.indication: Suitable for clinician-supervised IV wellness programs, supportive vitamin regimens, and post-procedure recovery protocols within professional care settings.
products.packaging: Lyophilized multivitamin powder, supplied as 10 vials per box for reconstitution prior to use.
products.protocol: Reconstitute one lyophilised vial with 5 mL sterile water for injection by gentle swirling; do not shake vigorously. Within 5 minutes of reconstitution, transfer the solution into 250–500 mL of isotonic saline or 5% dextrose and infuse IV over 60–90 minutes. Administer once daily or as clinically directed; inspect reconstituted solution for clarity and discolouration before use.

products.name: Vita-D
products.description: Vita-D (200,000 IU) is a high-dose cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) injectable solution at 5 mg/mL (200,000 IU per 1 mL ampoule), formulated for intramuscular administration as a single-dose correction of vitamin D deficiency. Cholecalciferol is converted in the liver to 25-hydroxyvitamin D and subsequently to the active 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D3 in the kidneys, regulating calcium and phosphate homeostasis, supporting immune modulation, and influencing skin cell differentiation and proliferation. Indicated for correction of clinical or subclinical vitamin D deficiency.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to address reduced vitamin D status in adults within professional care settings and structured supportive regimens.
products.packaging: Vitamin D solution, supplied as 0.5 mL × 10 single-dose vials per box.
products.protocol: Administer 200,000 IU (1 mL) by deep intramuscular injection into the gluteus maximus or vastus lateralis using a 23G 38 mm needle; aspirate before injection. A single loading dose is given for confirmed deficiency; repeat at 12 weeks if serum 25(OH)D remains below 30 ng/mL. Monitor serum calcium and 25(OH)D at 12 and 24 weeks. Avoid concurrent high-dose oral vitamin D supplementation.

products.name: Vita-D
products.specification: 300,000 IU/1.5 mL ampoule, 1.5 mL x 10 ampoules per box
products.description: Vita-D (300,000 IU) provides cholecalciferol at a 300,000 IU dose per 1.5 mL ampoule, representing a higher single-dose depot injection for rapid correction of severe vitamin D deficiency. The oil-based or aqueous cholecalciferol depot releases gradually from the intramuscular injection site, sustaining elevation of serum 25(OH)D levels over weeks to months following a single administration. Indicated for patients with severe deficiency (serum 25[OH]D < 20 ng/mL) or malabsorption syndromes where oral supplementation is unreliable.
products.indication: -Vitamin deficiency / malnutrition -Fatigue and low energy -Post-illness or post-procedure recovery -Hair, skin, and nail support -General wellness IV therapy
products.packaging: Cholecalciferol 5 mg/mL, supplied as 1 mL × 10 single-dose ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 300,000 IU (1.5 mL) by deep intramuscular injection into the gluteus maximus using a 23G 38 mm needle with aspiration; a single loading dose is typical for severe deficiency. Reassess serum 25(OH)D at 12 weeks; if levels remain below 30 ng/mL, consider a second dose. Monitor serum calcium and renal function; use caution in patients with granulomatous conditions or primary hyperparathyroidism.

products.name: Vita D-bone Inj.
products.specification: Vitamin D 200,000IU Injection, Cholecalciferol, 0.5 mL x 10 vials
products.description: Vita D-bone Inj. delivers cholecalciferol at 200,000 IU per dose in a sterile injectable form designed for intramuscular administration to support bone mineralisation and correct vitamin D deficiency. Cholecalciferol undergoes hepatic hydroxylation to 25(OH)D3 and renal activation to calcitriol, the principal hormonal regulator of intestinal calcium absorption and bone remodelling. The formulation is indicated for vitamin D deficiency-related osteopenia, osteoporosis risk reduction, and adjunctive immune support.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised, rapid correction protocols intended to address reduced vitamin D status within professional care settings.
products.packaging: High-dose Cholecalciferol solution, supplied as 1.5 mL × 10 single-dose ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 200,000 IU by deep IM injection into the gluteus maximus or vastus lateralis using a 23G needle; aspirate before injection to confirm extravascular placement. For deficiency correction, administer a single dose and reassess serum 25(OH)D at 12 weeks. Maintenance doses may be repeated every 3–6 months based on serum levels. Co-administer calcium supplementation as clinically indicated.

products.name: BM Hid inj
products.specification: 200,000 IU/1 mL vial, 1 mL x 10 vials per box
products.description: BM Hid Inj. provides cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) at 200,000 IU per 1 mL vial, formulated as a sterile injectable solution for intramuscular administration in the correction of vitamin D deficiency. Cholecalciferol is the most physiologically relevant oral and injectable form of vitamin D, producing sustained elevations in serum 25(OH)D when administered as a high-dose IM depot, with clinical evidence supporting efficacy in Korean and other Asian populations with prevalent deficiency. Indicated for deficiency correction, immune modulation, and bone health support.
products.indication: -Vitamin D deficiency -Bone disorders (osteoporosis, osteomalacia) -Immune support -Prevention in high-risk patients
products.packaging: Cholecalciferol 200,000 IU / 1 mL, supplied as 1 mL × 10 vials per box.
products.protocol: Administer 200,000 IU (1 mL) by deep intramuscular injection into the gluteus maximus or vastus lateralis using a 23G 38 mm needle; aspirate to confirm placement. Administer a single loading dose for confirmed deficiency; repeat at 12 weeks if 25(OH)D remains subtherapeutic. Monitor serum 25(OH)D and corrected serum calcium at 12-week intervals. Avoid in hypercalcaemia or hypervitaminosis D.

products.name: Doxy Tab. (300)
products.description: Doxy Tab. (300) provides doxycycline hyclate 100 mg oral tablets in a 300-tablet professional pack for extended antibiotic and anti-inflammatory courses. Doxycycline is a broad-spectrum tetracycline antibiotic that inhibits bacterial protein synthesis by reversibly binding the 30S ribosomal subunit; at sub-antimicrobial doses it additionally suppresses matrix metalloproteinases and inflammatory cytokines, underpinning its use in inflammatory acne, rosacea, and post-procedure prophylaxis. The 300-tablet pack is sized for institutional or high-volume clinical use.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised antimicrobial protocols where doxycycline therapy is considered appropriate under qualified medical assessment.
products.packaging: Doxycycline hyclate 100 mg oral tablets, supplied as 300 tablets per professional pack.
products.protocol: For moderate-to-severe acne or rosacea: administer 100 mg orally once or twice daily with food and a full glass of water to reduce oesophageal irritation. Standard antibiotic course: 8–12 weeks; at sub-antimicrobial dosing (40 mg modified-release), continuous use is appropriate for rosacea maintenance. Avoid concomitant antacids, dairy, or iron within 2 hours of dosing. Counsel patients on photosensitivity risk.

products.name: Doxy Tab. (30)
products.description: Doxy Tab. (30) provides doxycycline hyclate 100 mg oral tablets in a 30-tablet pack suitable for standard antibiotic courses in acne, rosacea, or peri-procedural prophylaxis. Doxycycline inhibits bacterial 30S ribosomal translation and exerts anti-inflammatory effects through MMP inhibition and cytokine suppression, making it effective for both infection control and inflammatory skin conditions. The 30-tablet format corresponds to a standard 4-week treatment course at 100 mg once daily.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised antimicrobial protocols where doxycycline therapy is considered appropriate under qualified medical assessment.
products.packaging: Doxycycline hyclate 100 mg oral tablets, supplied as 30 tablets per pack.
products.protocol: Administer 100 mg orally once daily (or 100 mg twice daily for more severe presentations) with food and a full glass of water; avoid lying down for 30 minutes post-dose. Standard course: 4 weeks at this pack size. Co-prescribe a topical retinoid or benzoyl peroxide for acne synergy. Contraindicated in pregnancy and children under 12; monitor for GI intolerance, photosensitivity, and yeast overgrowth.

products.name: MESOCARTIN INJ
products.description: MESOCARTIN INJ is an L-carnitine-based injectable solution formulated for intramuscular or intravenous administration to support fatty acid beta-oxidation and energy metabolism. L-carnitine is an essential quaternary ammonium compound that transports long-chain fatty acids across the inner mitochondrial membrane, enabling their oxidative conversion to ATP, which drives fat mobilisation, reduces fatigue, and supports metabolic body contouring protocols. Each box contains 10 vials for structured lipolytic or energy-support treatment courses.
products.indication: Designed for professional body-contouring and slimming protocols intended to address localized adipose areas under qualified clinical supervision.
products.packaging: L-Carnitine-derived injectable solution, supplied as 10 vials per box.
products.protocol: For aesthetic fat-reduction protocols, administer 1–2 vials (2,000 mg) by IM injection into the gluteus maximus or by slow IV push/infusion diluted in 100 mL saline, once or twice weekly at minimum 5-day intervals. A standard course is 8–12 sessions. Combine with mesotherapy lipolytic techniques for localised fat areas. Monitor for mild GI symptoms; generally well tolerated.

products.name: LIPOTOCIN INJ
products.description: LIPOTOCIN INJ contains thioctic acid (alpha-lipoic acid, ALA) at 300 mg per 12 mL ampoule, providing a high-potency injectable antioxidant for IV infusion therapy. Alpha-lipoic acid is a mitochondrial co-enzyme that both regenerates endogenous antioxidants (glutathione, vitamins C and E) and directly scavenges reactive oxygen species, with additional roles in glucose metabolism, insulin sensitisation, and inhibition of NF-κB-mediated inflammatory pathways. Indicated for diabetic polyneuropathy, oxidative-stress driven skin conditions (melasma, photo-ageing, acne), and metabolic support.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to support metabolic balance, nervous system wellness, and antioxidant care within professional settings.
products.packaging: Thioctic acid solution, supplied as 12 mL × 10 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Dilute one ampoule (300 mg/12 mL) in 100–250 mL of normal saline and infuse IV over at least 30 minutes via 22–25G cannula, at a maximum rate of 50 mg/minute to avoid adverse reactions. Administer once daily for severe neuropathy or 2–3 times weekly for aesthetic protocols. A standard course is 10–20 sessions; sensitive patients should be titrated starting from a lower dose. Protect diluted solution from light.

products.name: HYCOBAL INJ.
products.specification: Hydroxocobalamin 5mg/2 mL (Vit. B12a), 2 mL x 50 ampules
products.description: HYCOBAL INJ. provides hydroxocobalamin (Vitamin B12a) at 5 mg per 2 mL ampoule for intramuscular or intravenous administration as a high-potency B12 repletion therapy. Hydroxocobalamin is the preferred depot form of cobalamin, retained in tissues significantly longer than cyanocobalamin; it acts as a co-factor for methionine synthase and methylmalonyl-CoA mutase, supporting DNA synthesis, myelin maintenance, neurological function, and erythropoiesis. Indicated for B12 deficiency, pernicious anaemia, peripheral neuropathy, and adjunctive neurological and energy support infusions.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to address peripheral and neuropathic discomfort and to support Vitamin B12a status within professional care settings.
products.packaging: Hydroxocobalamin 5 mg / 2 mL, supplied as 2 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: For B12 deficiency repletion: administer 1,000–5,000 mcg (0.4–2 mL) IM into the gluteus maximus or deltoid 3 times weekly for 2–4 weeks using a 23G 25 mm needle, then monthly for maintenance. For IV wellness protocols, add to an existing drip at 1,000–5,000 mcg per session. Rotate injection sites to avoid local induration; monitor serum B12, CBC, and methylmalonic acid response.

products.name: B-COLAMIN VIT B12
products.description: B-COLAMIN VIT B12 delivers cyanocobalamin or hydroxocobalamin as a 2 mL injectable solution per ampoule, supplied in a 50-ampoule box for high-volume clinical B12 supplementation. Cobalamin is essential for the conversion of homocysteine to methionine and methylmalonyl-CoA to succinyl-CoA, supporting neurological integrity, erythrocyte maturation, and energy metabolism. Indicated for vitamin B12 deficiency, pernicious anaemia, fatigue states, and adjunctive IV wellness and neurological support protocols.
products.indication: Suitable for clinician-supervised protocols intended to support energy, mood balance, and immune wellness through Vitamin B12 supplementation in professional settings.
products.packaging: Vitamin B12 solution, supplied as 2 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 1 ampoule (2 mL) intramuscularly into the gluteus or deltoid using a 23G 25 mm needle, 2–3 times weekly during loading phase, then once weekly or monthly for maintenance. For IV aesthetic protocols, add to an IV drip bag or administer slow IV push over 1–2 minutes. Monitor serum B12 and CBC at baseline and 3 months to assess response.

products.name: BeeCom Hexa Vitamin B Complex
products.description: BeeCom Hexa Vitamin B Complex delivers a complete spectrum of B vitamins — B1 (thiamine), B2 (riboflavin), B3 (niacinamide), B5 (dexpanthenol), B6 (pyridoxine), B7 (biotin), and B12 (cyanocobalamin) — in a 2 mL injectable ampoule for IM or IV administration. This hexa-B formulation supports energy metabolism (ATP synthesis via the TCA cycle), neurological function (myelin synthesis, neurotransmitter production), erythropoiesis, and skin cell turnover — making it widely used in aesthetic IV drip cocktails for skin radiance, fatigue, and hair health. Supplied as 50 ampoules per box.
products.indication: Suitable for clinician-supervised protocols intended to support energy, mood balance, skin wellness, and general vitality through Vitamin B Complex supplementation.
products.packaging: Vitamin B Complex (B1, B2, B3, B5, B6, B7, B12), supplied as 2 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 1 ampoule (2 mL) IM into the gluteus or deltoid using a 23–25G needle, or add to an IV drip bag for slow infusion over 30–60 minutes, 2–3 times weekly. For intensive aesthetic revitalisation protocols, combine with Vitamin C and glutathione infusions. Maintenance dosing is one to two injections per week. Caution: high-dose B6 (pyridoxine) over extended periods may cause sensory neuropathy.

products.name: ZINC INJ
products.description: ZINC INJ is a zinc sulfate hydrate sterile injectable solution delivered in 10 mL vials, providing parenteral zinc supplementation for IV or IM administration. Zinc is an essential trace element that serves as a catalytic co-factor for over 300 enzymes, plays a structural role in zinc finger transcription factors, and is critical for immune function, wound healing, keratinocyte proliferation, sebaceous gland regulation, and collagen cross-linking. Indicated for zinc deficiency, acne management, immunodeficiency support, scar regeneration, and hair loss protocols.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to address reduced zinc status and to support structured supplementation regimens in professional care settings.
products.packaging: Zinc sulfate hydrate solution, supplied as 10 mL × 10 vials per box.
products.protocol: For IV trace element supplementation: add the required volume of zinc sulfate solution to a parenteral nutrition bag or 250 mL saline and infuse over 60–90 minutes via 22–25G cannula. Typical IV aesthetic dose: 1–3 mg elemental zinc per session, 1–2 times weekly. For acne and skin protocols, combine with vitamin C and B-complex infusions. Monitor serum zinc levels periodically; excess zinc can interfere with copper absorption.

products.name: Zinc S Inj.
products.specification: Zinc Sulfate Hydrate, 5 mL x 10 vials
products.description: Zinc S Inj. provides zinc sulfate hydrate in a 5 mL sterile injectable vial for parenteral zinc supplementation, offering a smaller-format option suited to individual session dosing or supplementation of IV cocktails. Zinc acts as a structural component of metalloenzymes, supports T-cell and NK cell immune activity, and in dermatology is used for its antioxidant, anti-seborrhoeic, and wound-healing properties. It is indicated for zinc deficiency states, acne vulgaris, hair thinning, and adjunctive IV wellness protocols.
products.indication: Designed for zinc supplementation within clinician-managed parenteral nutrition protocols and structured trace mineral regimens in professional settings.
products.packaging: Zinc sulfate hydrate solution, supplied as 5 mL × 10 vials per box.
products.protocol: Add the required elemental zinc dose from the 5 mL vial to an IV drip (250–500 mL normal saline) and infuse over 60 minutes via 22–25G cannula, or administer via IM injection into the deltoid or gluteus using a 23G needle. Typical aesthetic IV dose: 1–3 mg elemental zinc per session, one to two sessions weekly. Monitor serum zinc and copper; long-term zinc supplementation may deplete copper.

products.name: MAXYBLUE INJ
products.description: MAXYBLUE INJ is a sterile multi-trace mineral injectable solution supplying five essential microelements — zinc (Zn), copper (Cu), manganese (Mn), selenium (Se), and chromium (Cr) — in a single 10 mL vial for IV administration. Each element fulfils specific enzymatic roles: zinc supports wound healing and immune function; copper is a co-factor for ceruloplasmin and lysyl oxidase; manganese activates mitochondrial superoxide dismutase; selenium is integral to glutathione peroxidase activity; and chromium enhances insulin receptor sensitivity. Indicated for trace element repletion in patients on IV nutrition, immune support protocols, and metabolic wellness programmes.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised IV nutrition protocols requiring trace mineral supplementation within structured professional care programs.
products.packaging: Trace mineral solution (Zn, Cu, Mn, Se, Cr), supplied as 10 mL × 10 vials per box.
products.protocol: Add one 10 mL vial to an appropriate parenteral nutrition admixture or 250–500 mL saline and infuse IV over 60–90 minutes via 22–25G cannula, once daily for repletion or 2–3 times weekly for maintenance supplementation. Do not administer undiluted. Monitor serum trace element levels at baseline and periodically. Avoid concurrent high-dose zinc supplementation from separate sources to prevent copper displacement.

products.name: Hishiphagen-C Inj. Detox Agent
products.description: Hishiphagen-C Inj. is a Japanese-origin compound injectable containing monoammonium glycyrrhizinate 53 mg (40 mg as glycyrrhizic acid), glycine 400 mg, and L-cysteine 20 mg per 20 mL ampoule. Glycyrrhizinate (derived from liquorice root) exerts hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects through glucocorticoid metabolism modulation and NF-κB pathway suppression; L-cysteine and glycine provide antioxidant support and serve as glutathione precursors for hepatic detoxification. Indicated for chronic hepatitis, drug-induced hepatotoxicity, allergic dermatoses, eczema, urticaria, and general fatigue recovery.
products.indication: Designed as adjuvant support within clinician-supervised protocols intended to support skin wellness and hepatic balance in professional care settings.
products.packaging: Detox-focused injectable solution, supplied as 20 mL × 50 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 20–40 mL IV (slow IV push or diluted in 100–250 mL saline) once daily; for chronic hepatic disease, dose may be increased to 40–60 mL IV daily under physician supervision, not exceeding 100 mL/day. For general detox and skin protocols, administer 20 mL 2–3 times weekly using a 23–25G cannula. Monitor blood pressure (pseudoaldosteronism risk with prolonged use) and serum potassium.

products.name: CARTIN Inj.
products.description: CARTIN Inj. provides L-carnitine at 1,000 mg per 10 mL ampoule for intravenous or intramuscular administration, supporting mitochondrial fatty acid oxidation and energy production. L-carnitine facilitates the translocation of long-chain acylcarnitine esters across the inner mitochondrial membrane, making it essential for beta-oxidation of stored fat; injectable delivery bypasses gastrointestinal absorption limitations to achieve rapid plasma concentrations useful in lipolytic and metabolic enhancement protocols. Indicated for carnitine deficiency, fat-reduction IV protocols, fatigue, and metabolic support.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to address reduced carnitine status and to support structured supplementation regimens in professional care settings.
products.packaging: L-Carnitine 1000 mg solution, supplied as 10 mL × 10 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Administer 1,000 mg (10 mL) by slow IV infusion diluted in 100 mL saline over 30–60 minutes, or by IM injection into the gluteus maximus using a 23G 38 mm needle, once or twice weekly. For body contouring drip protocols, combine with alpha-lipoic acid and B-complex in the same infusion. Standard course: 8–12 sessions. Rotate IM injection sites; IV route preferred for rapid absorption.

products.name: Chioctocin inj (Thioctic acid)
products.description: Chioctocin Inj. is an injectable formulation of thioctic acid (alpha-lipoic acid) at 25 mg per 5 mL ampoule, providing a lower-concentration IV-compatible antioxidant dose for gentle metabolic and neuroprotective support. Alpha-lipoic acid is a universal antioxidant active in both aqueous and lipid cellular compartments, regenerating endogenous antioxidants including glutathione, vitamins C and E, and coenzyme Q10, while also inhibiting advanced glycation end-product formation and supporting peripheral nerve function. Indicated for mild diabetic or chemotherapy-induced neuropathy, antioxidant IV cocktails, and metabolic support protocols.
products.indication: Designed for clinician-supervised protocols intended to support cognitive wellness and circulatory balance within professional supportive care settings.
products.packaging: Ginkgo Biloba extract 3.5 mg/mL, supplied as 5 mL × 25 ampoules per box.
products.protocol: Dilute one ampoule (25 mg/5 mL) in 100–250 mL of normal saline and infuse IV over 30 minutes via 23–25G cannula, protecting from direct light. For neuropathy protocols, administer once daily (up to 600 mg total daily dose across multiple ampoules) for 2–4 weeks, then transition to oral supplementation at 600 mg/day. For aesthetic antioxidant drips, use 25–75 mg as an additive to multivitamin infusions, 1–2 times weekly.

products.name: WELLSCAINE PLUS CREAM
products.description: WELLSCAINE PLUS CREAM is a eutectic mixture of lidocaine 25 mg/g and prilocaine 25 mg/g (EMLA-type formulation) in a 500 g professional bulk tub for pre-procedural topical anaesthesia. The eutectic combination lowers the melting point of both anaesthetics, enabling effective dermal penetration as a cream, with lidocaine and prilocaine blocking voltage-gated sodium channels in peripheral nerve fibres to produce dose-dependent cutaneous anaesthesia up to 5 mm depth under occlusion. Indicated for needle injections, laser treatments, mesotherapy, microneedling, thread lifting, and permanent cosmetics.
products.indication: Designed for topical numbing of intact skin prior to minor cosmetic and dermatological procedures performed by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Lidocaine 25 mg + Prilocaine 25 mg topical cream, supplied as a 500 g professional tub.
products.protocol: Cleanse the treatment area; apply a 2–3 mm thick layer and cover with occlusive dressing for 30–45 minutes (45–60 minutes for deeper procedures such as thread lifting at 5–8 mm). Remove cream and wipe area before proceeding. Maximum dose per session: 184 mg lidocaine (approximately 7.4 g cream) over intact skin. Do not apply to mucosae or broken skin without specialist guidance. Effect duration: approximately 60–90 minutes after removal.

products.name: LIDCAIN CREAM
products.description: LIDCAIN CREAM is a high-concentration topical anaesthetic formulated at 10.56% lidocaine, supplied in a 500 g professional bulk tub for large-volume or multi-patient clinical use. Lidocaine reversibly blocks voltage-gated sodium channels in peripheral sensory nerve endings, temporarily interrupting pain signal transmission from the application site; the 10.56% concentration represents the highest commercially available topical lidocaine level, enabling effective surface analgesia for minimally invasive cosmetic procedures without systemic absorption at recommended doses. Indicated for laser resurfacing, microneedling, semi-permanent make-up, filler injection, and hair removal.
products.indication: Designed for topical numbing of intact skin prior to minor cosmetic and dermatological procedures performed by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Topical anesthetic cream (10.56%), supplied as a 500 g professional bulk tub.
products.protocol: Apply a thick uniform layer (approximately 1–2 g/10 cm²) to the clean, dry treatment area and cover with occlusive film for 15–25 minutes; remove immediately before the procedure and wipe the area clean. Maximum dose: 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) per 24 hours on intact skin. Do not apply to mucous membranes or damaged skin. Anaesthetic effect lasts 60–90 minutes post-removal.

products.name: WELLSCAINE CREAM
products.description: WELLSCAINE CREAM is a 9.6% lidocaine-only topical anaesthetic supplied in a 500 g professional tub, formulated for pre-procedural surface numbing across a broad range of aesthetic and minor surgical applications. The 9.6% lidocaine base provides reliable dermal anaesthesia via sodium channel blockade in cutaneous nociceptors, with an onset of 15–20 minutes under occlusion and a depth of anaesthesia suitable for superficial-to-mid-dermal procedures. Indicated for injections, laser treatments, fractional resurfacing, mesotherapy, and semi-permanent cosmetics.
products.indication: Designed for topical numbing of intact skin prior to minor cosmetic and dermatological procedures performed by qualified practitioners.
products.packaging: Topical surface anesthetic cream, supplied as a 500 g professional bulk tub.
products.protocol: Apply a 2–3 mm layer to the clean treatment area, cover with plastic occlusive wrap, and leave for 20–30 minutes; remove excess cream with a gauze pad before the procedure. Maximum dose: do not exceed 187 mg lidocaine per 24 hours on intact skin. Avoid open wounds and mucosal surfaces. Anaesthetic effect persists approximately 60–90 minutes after application; proceed within this window.

products.name: BERACAINE SPRAY
products.description: BERACAINE SPRAY is a fast-acting topical anaesthetic containing lidocaine 10% in a metered-dose 50 mL spray bottle, designed for rapid surface numbing prior to minimally invasive aesthetic and dermatological procedures. The spray format delivers a fine, even mist of lidocaine that diffuses across the stratum corneum within 1–2 minutes, blocking peripheral sodium channels to achieve mucosal or surface analgesia suitable for injections, tattooing, piercing, laser ablation, and permanent cosmetics. The metered delivery enables precise dose control without over-application.
products.indication: Designed for topical numbing during dental, ENT, and minor medical procedures performed by qualified practitioners. Not intended for skincare or cosmetic application.
products.packaging: Lidocaine 10% topical anesthetic spray, supplied as a 50 mL professional spray bottle.
products.protocol: Hold the spray bottle 5–10 cm from the skin surface and spray 1–3 short bursts (approximately 10 mg lidocaine per spray) onto the clean treatment area; allow 1–2 minutes for onset before proceeding. For mucosal use (dentistry, otolaryngology), apply no more than 2–3 sprays per session. Maximum recommended dose: 200 mg lidocaine per 24 hours. Do not spray near eyes or onto broken skin. Anaesthetic effect lasts 60–90 minutes.

products.name: NEO-CAIN CREAM
products.description: NEO-CAIN CREAM (30 g tube) is a high-concentration topical surface anaesthetic formulated at 10.56% lidocaine in a convenient 30 g single-patient tube format. Lidocaine blocks sodium ion influx through voltage-gated channels in sensory neurones, temporarily abolishing pain signal transmission from the application site; the 10.56% concentration provides powerful dermal anaesthesia suitable for procedures requiring mid-to-deep dermal access such as filler injections, laser resurfacing, and microneedling. The 30 g tube format is suited to individual procedure use or single-patient dispensing.
products.indication: Designed for topical surface application prior to minor aesthetic and dermatological procedures requiring localized superficial skin numbing performed by trained professionals.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 30g tube of NEO-CAIN surface anesthetic analgesic cream.
products.protocol: Apply a generous uniform layer (2–3 mm thick) to the clean, dry treatment area; cover with occlusive film and leave for 20–30 minutes. Remove excess cream with gauze and cleanse the area before the procedure. Maximum application: do not exceed 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) within 24 hours. Avoid mucous membranes and broken skin. Anaesthetic effect persists approximately 60–90 minutes after removal of the cream.

products.name: NEO-CAIN CREAM
products.description: NEO-CAIN CREAM (500 g jar) is the professional bulk-size presentation of the 10.56% lidocaine topical anaesthetic, providing high-volume supply for multi-patient clinical settings or practices performing large treatment areas. The formulation delivers high-concentration sodium channel blockade for effective cutaneous anaesthesia to depths suitable for fractional mesotherapy (2–4 mm) and thread lifting procedures (5–8 mm) under adequate occlusion time. The 500 g professional jar minimises per-session cost for high-throughput aesthetic clinics.
products.indication: Intended for topical surface application before aesthetic and dermatological procedures in clinical settings, supporting practitioners performing treatments that require superficial skin numbing.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 500g professional jar of NEO-CAIN surface anesthetic cream.
products.protocol: Dispense from the jar with a spatula to the clean, dry treatment area; apply a uniform 2–3 mm thick layer and cover with occlusive film for 20–30 minutes (up to 45 minutes for deeper procedures). Remove and wipe clean before proceeding. Maximum dose per session: 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) on intact skin per 24 hours. Maintain aseptic technique when accessing the bulk container to prevent contamination.

products.name: NEO PRO CREAM
products.description: NEO PRO CREAM is a eutectic lidocaine/prilocaine combination anaesthetic cream containing lidocaine 25 mg/g and prilocaine 25 mg/g in a 450 g professional bulk jar. The eutectic binary mixture penetrates intact skin more effectively than either anaesthetic alone, producing anaesthesia to 5 mm depth under occlusion by co-blocking voltage-gated sodium channels in A-delta and C sensory fibres; prilocaine carries a lower cardiovascular toxicity profile than lidocaine alone at equivalent doses. Indicated for needle injections, laser, thread lifting, and body procedures requiring deep dermal anaesthesia.
products.indication: Designed for topical application by trained professionals prior to aesthetic procedures requiring controlled superficial skin numbing of the treatment area.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 450g jar of NEO PRO Cream with Lidocaine 25mg + Prilocaine 25mg.
products.protocol: Apply a 2–3 mm thick layer of cream under occlusive wrap; allow 45–60 minutes for deep procedure anaesthesia (5–8 mm depth) or 30 minutes for superficial applications. Remove cream and cleanse the area before starting. Do not exceed 184 mg lidocaine per session on intact skin. Avoid use on mucosae, perianal skin, or open wounds without specialist indication. Prilocaine may cause methaemoglobinaemia at very high doses; observe standard dose limits.

products.name: J-CAIN
products.description: J-CAIN is a high-strength lidocaine topical anaesthetic cream at 10.56% concentration, supplied in a 500 g professional jar for aesthetic clinics and tattoo studios requiring bulk numbing agent. Lidocaine at 10.56% achieves effective sodium channel blockade in epidermal and upper-dermal nerve endings within 15–25 minutes of occlusive application, providing temporary elimination of surface pain suitable for all categories of minimally invasive dermatological procedures. The large-format container supports multi-patient or high-volume single-session use.
products.indication: Suitable for topical application by trained professionals before aesthetic and minor dermatological procedures that benefit from superficial skin numbing of the target area.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 500g jar of J-CAIN anesthetic surface cream.
products.protocol: Apply a thick, even coat of J-CAIN to the clean, dry skin area and cover with cling film or occlusive dressing for 20–30 minutes prior to the procedure; remove and wipe clean before starting. Maximum dose: 187 mg lidocaine (approximately 1.74 g cream) per 24 hours on intact skin. Do not apply to damaged skin, mucous membranes, or around the eyes. Anaesthetic effect lasts approximately 60–90 minutes post-removal.

products.name: SM CREAM
products.description: SM CREAM (500 g jar) delivers lidocaine at 10.56% concentration in a professional bulk topical anaesthetic formulation for high-volume clinical use. The high-concentration lidocaine base rapidly penetrates the stratum corneum under occlusion to block sodium ion channels in superficial sensory nerve terminals, providing effective pre-procedural anaesthesia for laser treatments, microneedling, mesotherapy, semi-permanent make-up, and injection procedures. The 500 g format is economical for aesthetic clinics treating multiple patients per day.
products.indication: Designed for topical application by trained professionals prior to MTS, semi-permanent makeup, laser, and cosmetology procedures requiring superficial numbing.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 500g jar of SM anesthetic surface cream.
products.protocol: Apply liberally (2–3 mm thick layer) to the clean treatment area, cover with occlusive film, and leave in place for 20–30 minutes prior to the procedure. Remove all excess cream with gauze before starting. Maximum dose: 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) per 24 hours on intact skin. Keep away from eyes and mucosal surfaces. Onset approximately 15–20 minutes; effect persists 60–90 minutes after removal.

products.name: SM CREAM
products.description: SM CREAM (30 g tube) offers the same 10.56% lidocaine topical anaesthetic formulation as the bulk jar format in a compact, single-patient or portable 30 g tube. Lidocaine achieves rapid sodium channel blockade in cutaneous peripheral nociceptors under occlusion, effectively numbing the treatment zone within 15–20 minutes for procedures including filler injection, laser hair removal, tattooing, and microneedling. The tube format reduces cross-contamination risk compared to multi-patient bulk containers.
products.indication: Designed for topical application by trained professionals prior to MTS, semi-permanent makeup, laser, and cosmetology procedures requiring superficial numbing.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 30g tube of SM anesthetic surface cream.
products.protocol: Squeeze a sufficient amount (2–3 mm layer) onto the treatment area, cover with occlusive wrap, and leave for 20–30 minutes; wipe clean before the procedure. Limit application to 1.74 g of cream (187 mg lidocaine) per 24 hours on intact skin. Do not apply to open wounds or mucous membranes. Anaesthetic effect lasts approximately 60–90 minutes; proceed promptly after removing the cream.

products.name: Muchcaine
products.description: Muchcaine (100 g tube) is a eutectic lidocaine 25 mg/g and prilocaine 25 mg/g topical anaesthetic cream in a 100 g tube, providing an intermediate-size option between the 30 g personal tube and 500 g bulk jar. The EMLA-type eutectic formulation penetrates intact skin under occlusion to depths of 3–5 mm, blocking both A-delta mechanonociceptors and C-fibre polymodal nociceptors via sodium channel inhibition, reducing pain associated with injections, laser, and permanent cosmetics. The dual-agent formula provides broader sodium channel coverage with a favourable safety margin.
products.indication: Intended for topical application by trained professionals before aesthetic procedures requiring controlled superficial skin numbing of the targeted treatment area.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 100g tube of Muchcain with Lidocaine 25mg + Prilocaine 25mg.
products.protocol: Apply a uniform 2–3 mm layer to the clean, dry area and cover with occlusive wrap for 30–45 minutes (45–60 minutes for deeper procedures). Remove and wipe the area clean before beginning the treatment. Do not exceed 184 mg lidocaine per 24 hours on intact skin. Prilocaine can cause methaemoglobinaemia at excessive doses; adhere to dose limits. Not for use on mucous membranes without specific clinical indication.

products.name: MUCHCAINE
products.description: MUCHCAINE (500 g jar) is the professional bulk-size presentation of the 10.56% lidocaine topical anaesthetic, formulated for large-area treatment or multi-patient daily use in high-volume aesthetic clinics. The 10.56% lidocaine concentration blocks peripheral sodium channels in cutaneous nociceptors under occlusion, achieving effective surface-to-mid-dermal anaesthesia within 15–25 minutes — suitable for full-face laser, extensive tattooing, and large mesotherapy grids. The 500 g jar maximises cost efficiency for practices with high throughput.
products.indication: Designed for topical application by trained professionals prior to aesthetic and minor dermatological procedures requiring controlled superficial skin numbing.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 500g jar of Muchcaine anesthetic surface cream.
products.protocol: Using a spatula (to maintain sterility), apply a 2–3 mm thick layer to the clean, dry treatment area; cover with occlusive film for 20–30 minutes, then wipe clean before the procedure. Maximum dose: 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) per 24 hours on intact skin. Avoid eyes and mucosal surfaces. Use a fresh spatula for each patient to prevent cross-contamination. Anaesthetic effect persists 60–90 minutes post-removal.

products.name: MUCHCAINE
products.description: MUCHCAINE (30 g tube) is the individual-use or clinic-sample format of the 10.56% lidocaine topical anaesthetic cream, providing single-application or limited-session supply in a compact tube. Lidocaine at 10.56% concentration delivers rapid sodium channel blockade in superficial dermal sensory neurones under occlusion, achieving anaesthesia adequate for minimally invasive procedures including injections, laser, microneedling, and tattooing. The tube format supports single-patient dispensing and eliminates shared-container contamination risks.
products.indication: Designed for topical application by trained professionals prior to aesthetic and minor dermatological procedures requiring controlled superficial skin numbing.
products.packaging: Each unit contains one 30g tube of Muchcaine anesthetic surface cream.
products.protocol: Squeeze a generous layer (2–3 mm) onto the clean, dry treatment area and cover with occlusive film for 20–30 minutes; remove and wipe the area clean before the procedure. Maximum dose: 1.74 g cream (187 mg lidocaine) per 24 hours on intact skin. Do not apply to mucous membranes or broken skin. Onset within 15–20 minutes under occlusion; anaesthetic effect persists approximately 60–90 minutes after removal.

products.name: LIDOCAINE HCl Inj 2%
products.description: LIDOCAINE HCl Inj 2% is a sterile injectable solution of lidocaine hydrochloride at 20 mg/mL in a 20 mL vial, formulated for local infiltration anaesthesia, nerve block, and intravenous regional anaesthesia (Bier block) in clinical and aesthetic settings. Lidocaine HCl reversibly inhibits voltage-gated sodium channels in peripheral nerve axons, blocking both sensory and motor conduction in a dose-dependent, reversible manner to produce local anaesthesia lasting 60–120 minutes without vasoconstrictors. Each box contains 10 sterile vials for professional procedural use.
products.indication: Intended for use in epidural, infiltration, surface, and nerve block anesthesia and related professional clinical applications administered according to practitioner judgment.
products.packaging: Each box contains 10 sterile vials of 20 mL Lidocaine HCl 2% injection.
products.protocol: For local infiltration: inject 0.5–5 mL per site using a 25–30G needle, delivering a maximum of 4.5 mg/kg (without adrenaline) per session; aspirate before each injection to avoid intravascular placement. For facial aesthetic procedures, use 0.5–1 mL per block point at 27–30G with slow infiltration. Onset: 2–5 minutes; duration: 60–90 minutes. Do not exceed maximum safe dose; have resuscitation equipment available for nerve block procedures.

products.name: LAENNEC
products.specification: hepaprotector, immunostimulant, youth elixir, 2 mL x 50 ampules
products.description: LAENNEC (50-ampoule box) is a pharmaceutical-grade human placenta hydrolysate developed by Japan Bio Products Co., Ltd., containing over 200 bioactive components including low-molecular-weight peptides, 18 amino acids, 14 growth factors (EGF, FGF, HGF, IGF), and 26 minerals. The hydrolysate exerts hepatoprotective effects through hepatocyte growth factor stimulation and oxidative stress reduction, while its growth factor profile promotes cellular regeneration, collagen synthesis, and immunomodulation — supporting both liver function restoration and non-surgical skin rejuvenation. Indicated for chronic hepatitis, liver fibrosis, atopic dermatitis, and aesthetic anti-ageing protocols.
products.indication: Intended for use within placental therapy protocols administered by qualified medical professionals under appropriate clinical supervision and established treatment frameworks.
products.packaging: Each box contains 50 ampoules of 2mL LAENNEC placenta injection.
products.protocol: Standard adult dose: 2 mL subcutaneous or intramuscular injection once daily (gluteus maximus or abdomen using a 26–30G needle), with frequency increased to 2–3 times daily for severe hepatic indications. For aesthetic mesotherapy protocols, administer 1–2 mL intradermal or subdermal once or twice weekly; a standard rejuvenation course is 10–20 sessions. Clinical hepatic reassessment including ALT/AST at 4 and 12 weeks.

products.name: LAENNEC
products.description: LAENNEC (10-ampoule box) is the smaller clinical pack of the Japan Bio Products human placenta hydrolysate injection, containing the same pharmaceutical-grade formulation as the 50-ampoule presentation in a 10-session supply. Each 2 mL ampoule delivers over 200 bioactive components including growth factors (EGF, FGF, IGF, HGF), amino acid peptides, and trace minerals that promote hepatocellular regeneration, fibroblast activation, and immune modulation for both hepatic therapy and aesthetic skin rejuvenation. The 10-ampoule format is suited to initiating a patient course or lower-volume clinical use.
products.indication: Intended for use within placental therapy protocols administered by qualified medical professionals under appropriate clinical supervision and established treatment frameworks.
products.packaging: Each box contains 10 ampoules of 2mL LAENNEC placenta injection.
products.protocol: Administer 2 mL subcutaneously or intramuscularly once daily for hepatic and systemic protocols, or 1–2 mL by intradermal/subdermal injection once to twice weekly for aesthetic rejuvenation courses. Use a 26–30G needle with aspiration confirmation. A 10-ampoule box represents approximately 1–2 weeks of daily systemic therapy or 5–10 aesthetic sessions. Monitor liver enzymes at baseline and 4 weeks for hepatic indications.

products.name: MELSMON
products.description: MELSMON is a Japanese-approved human placenta hydrolysate injectable (Melsmon Pharmaceutical Co., approved 1956) containing amino acids, peptides, growth factors, vitamins, enzymes, and benzyl alcohol as a preservative-analgesic. Subcutaneous or intramuscular administration stimulates cellular regeneration, improves skin elasticity, and is the only product in this range with official Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare approval specifically for menopausal disorder management. The low-molecular-weight bioactive fraction supports hepatic function, fatigue reduction, and dermal rejuvenation concurrently.
products.indication: Designed for use within placental therapy protocols administered by qualified medical professionals operating under appropriate clinical supervision and treatment frameworks.
products.packaging: Each box contains 50 ampoules of 2mL MELSMON placenta injection.
products.protocol: Administer 1–2 ampoules (2–4 mL) via subcutaneous or IM injection 2–3 times per week for the first 2–4 weeks, then taper to once or twice weekly for 2–3 months. For menopausal indications, begin with 1 ampoule every other day for 2–3 weeks. Intravenous administration is contraindicated. Aesthetic mesotherapy protocols may target intradermal papular injection at 1–2 cm grid spacing across the face or décolletage.

products.name: CURACEN JBP PLAMON INJ
products.description: CURACEN (JBP Co., Ltd.) is a human placenta hydrolysate injectable containing over 280 bioactive components including 18 amino acids (8 essential), hyaluronic acid precursors, low-molecular-weight growth factors (< 3000 Da), cytokines, and nucleic acids. It is specifically formulated for aesthetic mesotherapy — the low molecular weight cut-off maximises cellular absorption and bioavailability at the dermal level. Unlike Laennec (which also carries hepatic indications), CURACEN is optimised for skin rejuvenation, elasticity improvement, and collagen synthesis stimulation.
products.indication: Intended for use within placental therapy protocols administered by qualified medical professionals operating under appropriate clinical supervision and established treatment frameworks.
products.packaging: Each box contains 10 ampoules of 2 mL CURACEN JBP PLAMON placenta injection.
products.protocol: Administer 1 ampoule (2 mL) via subcutaneous or intradermal mesotherapy injection twice weekly for the initial 4–8 weeks, reducing to once every 10–15 days for maintenance. Use a 30–32G needle at 2–4 mm depth for facial papular technique. No reconstitution required; use directly from ampoule.

products.name: Melamin Inj.
products.description: Melamin Injection is a human placenta extract preparation manufactured by JBP Co., Ltd. (Japan Bio Products), supplied as 2 mL ampoules in the same Plamon/Laennec product family. The hydrolysate delivers amino acids, growth factors, and low-molecular-weight peptides that exert regulatory effects on hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal signalling, making it clinically relevant for menopausal disorder management. Secondary aesthetic applications include skin brightening, melanin regulation, and improvement of liver function markers.
products.indication: Designed to support qualified medical practitioners managing symptoms related to menopausal disorders within established placental therapy protocols and clinical supervision.
products.packaging: Each box contains 50 ampoules of 2 mL Melamin placenta extract injection.
products.protocol: Administer 1 ampoule (2 mL) subcutaneously or intramuscularly 2–3 times per week for the initial treatment phase of 2–4 weeks, followed by a maintenance schedule of once or twice weekly for 2–3 months. For menopausal symptom relief, a minimum treatment course of 6 injections over 2 weeks is typically required before clinical response is assessed.

products.name: ELASTY MESO NEEDLE
products.description: ELASTY Meso Needle is a sterile, single-use nano needle designed specifically for mesotherapy and micro-injection aesthetic procedures. Supplied in 32G / 4 mm configuration, the ultra-fine gauge minimises injection trauma, bruising, and patient discomfort during intradermal product delivery. The short 4 mm length ensures placement within the papillary and upper reticular dermis, making it appropriate for skinbooster, biorevitaliser, and vitamin cocktail mesotherapy protocols.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise superficial injection procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 100 pieces of sterile 32G / 4mm ELASTY MESO nano needles.
products.protocol: Insert at 30–45° bevel-up into the superficial to mid-dermis (2–4 mm depth); deliver 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point using the nappage or papule technique. Grid spacing of 1–2 cm is standard for facial mesotherapy. Discard after single patient use; do not re-cap and re-use.

products.name: REJUBEAU MESO NEEDLE 30G
products.description: REJUBEAU Meso Needle 30G is a sterile, single-use hypodermic needle manufactured for professional mesotherapy and aesthetic injection procedures. Available in 4 mm, 6 mm, and 13 mm working lengths, the 30G calibre is suited to intradermal skinbooster delivery, superficial fat cocktail administration, and scalp mesotherapy where slightly larger flow diameter than 32G needles is preferable. The range of lengths allows practitioners to select appropriate depth for different anatomical zones.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise superficial injection procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 100 pieces of sterile 30G REJUBEAU nano needles in 4mm, 6mm, or 13mm.
products.protocol: Use the 4 mm length for facial intradermal nappage (2–4 mm depth), 6 mm for intermediate-depth injections in thicker skin regions, and 13 mm for subcutaneous delivery in scalp or body applications. Deliver product slowly at 0.01–0.05 mL per point; apply mild pressure post-injection to distribute the bolus. Single-patient use only.

products.name: REJUBEAU MESO NEEDLE 32G
products.description: REJUBEAU Meso Needle 32G is a sterile, single-use ultra-thin hypodermic needle designed for low-trauma intradermal mesotherapy. Available in 4 mm, 6 mm, and 13 mm lengths, the 32G gauge produces minimal injection pain and is particularly suited to sensitive facial zones such as the periorbital and perioral regions. The fine bore controls micro-dosing accuracy during nappage and papule techniques with skinboosters, polynucleotides, or vitamin cocktails.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise superficial injection procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 100 pieces of sterile 32G REJUBEAU nano needles in 4mm, 6mm, or 13mm.
products.protocol: Insert bevel-up at 30–45° to deliver product at 2–4 mm intradermal depth for facial mesotherapy. Use 4 mm for superficial facial nappage, 6 mm for mid-depth treatment in thicker zones, and 13 mm for scalp or body subcutaneous routes. Deliver 0.01–0.02 mL per point; space injection points 1–1.5 cm apart. Discard after single use.

products.name: REJUBEAU MESO NEEDLE 33G
products.description: REJUBEAU Meso Needle 33G is a sterile, single-use extra-fine calibre hypodermic needle engineered to minimise trauma in delicate intradermal mesotherapy applications. Available in 4 mm, 6 mm, and 13 mm lengths, the 33G bore is optimal for periorbital, lip-border, and thin-skin facial zones where minimising local tissue disruption is a priority. It is suited to low-viscosity products including dilute hyaluronic acid skinboosters, growth factor solutions, and peptide cocktails.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise superficial injection procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 100 pieces of sterile 33G REJUBEAU nano needles in 4mm, 6mm, or 13mm.
products.protocol: Insert bevel-up at a shallow 15–30° angle, targeting 1–3 mm intradermal depth for the most delicate facial zones. Use 4 mm for periorbital and perioral nappage; 6 mm for general facial mid-dermis work; 13 mm for scalp mesotherapy. Deliver no more than 0.01–0.02 mL per injection point to avoid visible papule formation. Single use only.

products.name: REJUBEAU MESO NEEDLE 34G
products.description: REJUBEAU Meso Needle 34G is a sterile, single-use nano-calibre hypodermic needle representing the finest gauge in the REJUBEAU range, supplied exclusively in the 4 mm length. The 34G bore is suited to ultra-low-trauma nano-injection techniques delivering highly dilute skinboosters, growth factors, or polynucleotides in the most sensitive facial zones — including the upper eyelid, under-eye, and fine perioral region — where conventional mesotherapy needles cause unacceptable bruising.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise superficial injection procedures performed by trained aesthetic professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 100 pieces of sterile 34G / 4mm REJUBEAU nano needles.
products.protocol: Insert at a near-flat 10–20° angle, bevel-up, to place product within the upper 1–2 mm of the dermis. Deliver 0.005–0.01 mL per point using an automated nano-injector or manual syringe with slow, controlled depression of the plunger. Recommended point spacing: 0.5–1 cm in periorbital zones; 1 cm elsewhere. Single patient use; discard immediately after procedure.

products.name: JBP nano cannula 22G
products.description: JBP Nano Cannula 22G is a sterile, single-use blunt-tip flexible microcannula manufactured by Japan Bio Products, available in 50 mm and 70 mm working lengths. The 22G lumen accommodates medium-to-high viscosity fillers and larger-volume product delivery across extended tissue planes with reduced risk of vascular injury compared to sharp needles. The blunt tip displaces rather than penetrates vessels, making it appropriate for mid-face volume restoration, jawline contouring, and body filler techniques.
products.indication: Designed for use in injection-based aesthetic procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 24 pieces of sterile 22G JBP nano cannulas in 50mm or 70mm lengths.
products.protocol: Introduce via a 21G sharp entry needle at the access point, then advance the cannula in the subdermal or supraperiosteal plane using gentle retrograde or anterograde threading. Aspiration is recommended at each new position. Use the 50 mm length for focused facial zones and 70 mm for linear body or jaw contouring passes. Deliver product in small retrograde aliquots of 0.1–0.2 mL per pass. Single use.

products.name: JBP nano cannula 25G
products.description: JBP Nano Cannula 25G is a sterile, single-use blunt-tip flexible microcannula by Japan Bio Products, available in 50 mm and 70 mm lengths. The 25G calibre is versatile for medium-viscosity hyaluronic acid fillers in delicate facial regions — including the nasolabial fold, tear trough, lip augmentation, and temple — where the blunt tip significantly reduces bruising, swelling, and neurovascular trauma relative to a sharp needle of equivalent gauge.
products.indication: Designed for use in injection-based aesthetic procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 24 pieces of sterile 25G JBP nano cannulas in 50mm or 70mm lengths.
products.protocol: Create an entry point with a 23G sharp needle, then introduce the cannula into the appropriate tissue plane (subdermis or pre-periosteum depending on target). Advance with minimal force; retreat and re-angle if resistance is met. Deliver filler in retrograde threading passes at 0.05–0.1 mL per cm of track. The 70 mm variant suits linear cheek or mandibular passes. Aspiration before each bolus is recommended.

products.name: JBP nano cannula 27G
products.description: JBP Nano Cannula 27G is a sterile, single-use blunt-tip microcannula by Japan Bio Products, supplied in the 50 mm length. The slender 27G bore is well suited for low-to-medium viscosity products — including skinboosters, thin hyaluronic acid fillers, and polynucleotides — in delicate anatomical areas such as the periorbital region, lips, and superficial dermal planes where precise, low-volume delivery is required.
products.indication: Designed for use in injection-based aesthetic procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 24 pieces of sterile 27G / 50mm JBP nano cannulas.
products.protocol: Puncture the skin with a 25G or 26G sharp needle to create the entry port, then introduce the 27G cannula at a shallow subdermal angle. Advance with the bevel-up orientation and deliver product slowly in 0.02–0.05 mL retrograde aliquots. The 50 mm working length is appropriate for single-entry periocular, lip, and cheek treatments. Replace after each patient or if the tip becomes contaminated.

products.name: JBP nano cannula 30G
products.description: JBP Nano Cannula 30G is a sterile, single-use ultra-fine blunt-tip microcannula by Japan Bio Products, supplied in 25 mm working length. The 30G / 25 mm format is optimised for very superficial intradermal fanning or threading of low-viscosity products — such as dilute hyaluronic acid, amino acid cocktails, or botulinumtoxin micro-doses — in the superficial dermis of delicate facial areas including the periorbital, perioral, and forehead zones.
products.indication: Designed for use in injection-based aesthetic procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 24 pieces of sterile 30G / 25mm JBP nano cannulas.
products.protocol: Create entry with a 28G or 29G sharp needle; introduce the cannula bevel-up at a 10–20° angle into the superficial dermis. The 25 mm length allows controlled retrograde delivery from a single entry point across a small treatment zone. Deliver 0.01–0.03 mL per retrograde pass. Suitable for microdroplet toxin distribution or superficial skinbooster fanning. Single use only.

products.name: Sungshim meso needles
products.description: Sungshim Meso Needles are sterile, single-use hypodermic needles manufactured in South Korea for professional mesotherapy and aesthetic injection procedures. Available in 27G, 29G, and 30G gauges across multiple lengths (4 mm to 60 mm), the range allows practitioners to select gauge and length according to anatomical site, product viscosity, and injection depth — from superficial facial nappage to deeper scalp or body subcutaneous delivery. The ultra-sharp bevel minimises injection trauma and facilitates smooth, controlled flow.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise injection procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards in dedicated treatment settings.
products.packaging: Each pack contains 100 sterile Sungshim needles in 27G, 29G, 30G from 4mm to 60mm.
products.protocol: For facial mesotherapy, use 30G or 29G x 4–6 mm for intradermal nappage at 2–4 mm depth; use 27G x 13 mm for mid-depth injections in the scalp or thicker skin areas. Deliver 0.01–0.05 mL per injection point; space points 1–1.5 cm apart. For body mesotherapy or lipolytic cocktails, use 30G x 13 mm or 27G x 13–60 mm into the subcutaneous plane. Discard after single patient use.

products.name: Sungshim syringes (for botox)
products.description: Sungshim Botox Syringes are sterile, single-use low dead-space insulin-style syringes with fixed needles, specifically configured for precise small-volume neurotoxin delivery. Available in 30G or 31G x 8 mm needles mounted on 0.5 cc or 1 cc barrels, the low dead-space design maximises yield from expensive reconstituted toxin vials. The short 8 mm needle length targets the intramuscular plane in superficial facial muscles — corrugator, procerus, frontalis, orbicularis — without risk of periosteal contact.
products.indication: Designed for use in precise small-volume injection procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each pack contains 100 Sungshim syringes in 30G or 31G x 8mm, in 0.5cc or 1cc volume.
products.protocol: Load reconstituted botulinum toxin from the vial using standard aseptic technique. Insert the 30G or 31G needle perpendicular to the skin surface to a depth of 5–8 mm for intramuscular injection into target facial muscles. Deliver 0.025–0.1 mL per injection point per the planned unit dosing. Aspirate gently before each injection; discard unused residual in the syringe and do not re-use across sessions.

products.name: Sungshim PEN NEEDLES
products.description: Sungshim Pen Needles are sterile, single-use needles compatible with standard insulin and aesthetic injection pen devices, supplied in 31G x 8 mm, 32G x 4 mm, and 32G x 6 mm configurations. In aesthetic practice, they are used with pen-based micro-injection systems for precise delivery of botulinum toxin, skinboosters, or peptide solutions in small, controlled aliquots. The universal pen-thread connection fits most BD-compatible pen devices.
products.indication: Designed for use with compatible injection pens by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards in dedicated treatment settings.
products.packaging: Each pack contains 100 Sungshim pen needles in 31G x 8mm, 32G x 4mm, or 32G x 6mm.
products.protocol: Thread needle onto the pen device using a half-turn lock; perform an air prime of 1–2 units before the first injection to confirm flow. For facial micro-toxin protocols, set the pen to 0.5–2 unit increments; insert at 90° to a depth equal to the needle length (4 mm or 6 mm for intradermal, 8 mm for superficial intramuscular). Remove and discard immediately after use; never re-use across injection sites.

products.name: DK Filler Cannula with punching needle
products.description: DK Filler Cannula with Punching Needle (21G/23G/25G) is a sterile, single-use blunt-tip microcannula set that includes a matched sharp access needle (introducer). The flexible cannula tip reduces the risk of intravascular injection and minimises bruising in medium-to-large filler volume procedures. The 21G, 23G, and 25G gauges in 50 mm and 70 mm lengths cover deep volumising, mid-face structural work, and nasolabial fold correction respectively; the 70 mm option is suited to linear cheek, mandible, or body passes.
products.indication: Designed for use in filler-based aesthetic injection procedures performed by trained professionals operating under appropriate clinical and sanitary standards.
products.packaging: Each box contains 50 sterile DK filler cannulas in 21G, 23G, or 25G with 50/70mm.
products.protocol: Pierce the skin with the included punching (introducer) needle at the chosen entry point, then exchange for the cannula and advance in the appropriate tissue plane (supraperiosteal for deep structure; subdermis for superficial correction). Use retrograde threading at 0.1–0.2 mL per pass. Aspirate at each new position before delivering product. The 21G/23G variants suit volumising fillers; 25G suits medium-viscosity HA products. Single use.

products.name: DK Filler Cannula with punching needle
products.description: DK Filler Cannula with Punching Needle (18G x 50/70 mm) is a sterile, single-use large-bore blunt-tip microcannula designed for high-viscosity, large-volume filler or fat transfer-adjunct procedures. The 18G lumen accommodates even dense cross-linked HA products or PRF-enhanced preparations with minimal injection resistance. At 50 mm and 70 mm lengths, it supports deep subcutaneous volumising of the cheeks, temporal hollows, and body contouring sites through a single entry point.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic procedures requiring precise placement of injectable solutions through a single entry point with reduced tissue trauma.
products.packaging: Supplied as 50 pieces per box. Available in 18G with 50mm and 70mm lengths.
products.protocol: Create access with the included sharp 16G or 17G punching needle; advance the 18G cannula in the deep subcutaneous or supraperiosteal plane with steady forward pressure. Deliver product in 0.2–0.5 mL retrograde boluses or slow continuous threading passes. Avoid injecting under excessive resistance. Optimal for high-viscosity products requiring a wide-bore delivery path. Single patient use; do not re-autoclave or re-use.

products.name: DK ULTRA Thin Meso needles
products.description: DK ULTRA Thin Meso Needles are sterile, single-use ultra-fine hypodermic needles for professional mesotherapy, supplied in 30G, 32G, 33G, and 34G gauges across 4 mm, 6 mm, 8 mm, and 13 mm working lengths. The comprehensive gauge-and-length matrix enables practitioners to precisely match needle size to product viscosity, anatomical depth, and treatment zone — from 34G x 4 mm periorbital nappage to 30G x 13 mm scalp mesotherapy. The ultra-thin wall construction maximises inner bore diameter within the fine outer gauge, reducing injection resistance.
products.indication: Designed for shallow and precise delivery of injectable solutions during professional mesotherapy procedures across varied facial and body treatment zones.
products.packaging: Supplied as 100 pieces per box. Gauges and lengths: 30G (4/6/13mm), 32G (4/6/8mm), 33G (4/6mm), 34G (4/6mm).
products.protocol: For facial intradermal mesotherapy (skinboosters, PRP, polynucleotides), use 32G–34G x 4–6 mm at 15–45° insertion angle, delivering 0.01–0.02 mL per point in a nappage or papule pattern. For scalp hair mesotherapy, use 30G–32G x 8–13 mm at perpendicular angle, spacing injections 1–1.5 cm across the target area. For body subcutaneous mesotherapy, select 30G x 13 mm. Single use only.

products.name: NEO CANNULA
products.description: NEO CANNULA 17G is a sterile, single-use large-bore flexible blunt-tip microcannula for professional aesthetic and body contouring injection procedures, supplied in 100 mm, 120 mm, and 150 mm working lengths. The 17G calibre and extended lengths are designed for body applications — including abdominal, gluteal, and thigh fat-dissolving cocktail delivery, PRF/PRP infusion across large surface areas, and extensive body filler volumising — where the reach of standard facial cannulas is insufficient.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic procedures requiring controlled delivery of injectable solutions through a single entry point across multiple treatment regions.
products.packaging: Supplied as 20 pieces per box. 17G in lengths 100mm (FC17100), 120mm (FC17120), 150mm (FC17150).
products.protocol: Create a small entry incision with a 15G or 16G sharp cannula intro needle, then advance the 17G NEO CANNULA through the subcutaneous adipose layer using a fanning technique. Deliver product in retrograde passes; the 100 mm variant suits targeted body zones, while 120–150 mm lengths enable broad area coverage from a single entry point. Inject at 0.2–1.0 mL per retrograde pass. Aspirate before each delivery. Single use.

products.name: NEO CANNULA
products.description: NEO CANNULA 14G is a sterile, single-use extra-large-bore flexible blunt-tip microcannula for advanced body aesthetic and reconstructive injection procedures, available in 100 mm, 150 mm, and 200 mm working lengths. The 14G lumen and lengths up to 200 mm support large-volume subcutaneous delivery — including fat transfer support, extensive lipolytic infusion, and gluteal or abdominal body filler placements — across the largest treatment planes achievable with a cannula system.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic procedures requiring controlled delivery of injectable solutions across extended treatment areas through a single entry point.
products.packaging: Supplied as 20 pieces per box. 14G in lengths 100mm (FC14100), 150mm (FC14150), 200mm (FC14200).
products.protocol: Create an entry port with a matched sharp introducer (13G or 14G needle); advance the cannula in the deep subcutaneous layer under gentle pressure with a fan or linear threading pattern. Deliver 1–3 mL per retrograde pass for large-volume procedures. Use the 200 mm length for full-gluteal or abdominal coverage from bilateral entry points. Never force through resistance. Single use only; do not re-sterilise.

products.name: SYRINGE MIXING TUBE (CONNECTOR)
products.description: Syringe Mixing Tube Connector (100 pcs) is a sterile luer-lock accessory that forms a sealed bidirectional conduit between two syringes, enabling closed-system mixing of two injectable products or transfer of a reconstituted solution without loss or contamination. It is particularly useful for preparing combination cocktails (e.g., HA + growth factors, toxin + saline top-up) and for precisely transferring reconstituted product between vials and injection syringes in aesthetic clinic settings.
products.indication: Intended for connecting compatible syringes during product preparation and transfer steps within professional treatment settings and workflows.
products.packaging: Supplied per box for connecting compatible syringes during product preparation workflows.
products.protocol: Attach one syringe to each end of the connector with firm luer-lock engagement. Alternately push the plungers to blend contents back and forth until homogeneous — typically 10–15 strokes. Keep syringes horizontal during mixing to prevent air pockets. Once mixed, transfer the combined solution to the injection syringe via forward push. Do not apply excess force to avoid unseating the luer seal. Single use; discard after each product preparation cycle.

products.name: SYRINGE MIXING TUBE (CONNECTOR)
products.description: Syringe Mixing Tube Connector (10 pcs) is a sterile luer-lock connector that forms a sealed conduit between two syringes for closed-system mixing or product transfer. Identical in function to the 100-piece format, the 10-piece pack is suited to smaller clinics or practitioners who require occasional mixing of injectable cocktails without the need for a large inventory. It prevents product loss and contamination during preparation of combination injectables or reconstituted solutions.
products.indication: Intended for connecting compatible syringes during product preparation and transfer steps within professional treatment settings and workflows.
products.packaging: Supplied as 10 pieces per pack for connecting compatible syringes during product preparation workflows.
products.protocol: Engage both syringe tips firmly into each end of the connector via luer-lock twist. Mix by alternately pushing the plungers back and forth (10–15 passes) until the combined solution is uniform. Transfer the mixed product to the injection syringe after blending. Avoid trapping air during mixing by keeping the connector and both syringes horizontal. Discard connector and any single-use components after each use cycle.

products.name: RESTYLANE DEFYNE
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, HA 20 mg/mL, Lidocaine 0.3%
