products.description: Restylane Defyne is a Galderma OBT (Optimal Balance Technology) cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler at 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%, engineered with a flexible gel network that moves naturally with facial expression while maintaining structural correction. It is FDA-cleared and CE-marked for mid-to-deep dermal injection to correct moderate-to-severe facial wrinkles and folds — principally nasolabial folds and chin retrusion — with reported 48-week durability in 69.8% of subjects.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic use in addressing deeper facial lines, expression folds, and contour refinement during qualified clinical procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe containing HA 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%.
products.protocol: Inject into the mid-to-deep dermis or subdermal plane using the included 27G needle. For nasolabial folds, use linear threading, serial puncture, or crosshatching at a depth of 3–5 mm; aspirate before each bolus. Typical NLF correction requires 0.5–1.5 mL per side. For chin augmentation, deposit product supraperiosteally in 0.1–0.2 mL aliquots. Massage gently post-injection to smooth. Touch-up at 4 weeks if needed.

products.name: RESTYLANE VOLYME
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, HA 20 mg/mL, Lidocaine 0.3%
products.description: Restylane Volyme is a Galderma OBT cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler at 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%, formulated specifically for volume restoration of the mid-face, cheeks, and malar region. The resilient, firm gel integrates with cheek tissue to restore youthful projection and correct volume deflation, with results reported to last 12–18 months in clinical studies. It is CE-marked for facial volumising in the supraperiosteal and deep subcutaneous planes.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic use focused on restoring facial volume and supporting contour refinement during qualified clinical procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe containing HA 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%.
products.protocol: Inject supraperiosteally over the malar eminence or into the deep fat compartments of the mid-face using a 25G or 27G needle or 25G cannula. Deposit product in 0.1–0.3 mL deep boluses; avoid superficial placement which risks the Tyndall effect. Typical full-cheek volumising requires 1–2 mL per side. Aspirate before each bolus. Massage after injection to ensure symmetrical distribution. Touch-up at 4–6 weeks.

products.name: RESTYLANE KYSSE
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, HA 20 mg/mL, Lidocaine 0.3%
products.description: Restylane Kysse is a Galderma OBT cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler at 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%, specifically engineered for lip augmentation and peri-oral line correction. The flexible gel integrates with lip tissue to provide natural-feeling volume and definition — including vermilion border sharpening, Cupid's bow accentuation, and philtrum column enhancement — with FDA approval for lip augmentation and correction of upper perioral lines.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic use in lip enhancement, definition of the vermilion border, and refinement of lip contour within qualified clinical procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe containing HA 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%.
products.protocol: Inject into the vermilion border using retrograde linear threading or serial puncture with a 27G needle for precise lip line definition; deliver volume into the lip body using a 25G cannula or needle in the submucosal plane. Typical full lip augmentation requires 0.5–1.5 mL. Apply topical or infiltration anaesthesia as adjunct where lidocaine content is insufficient. Massage to blend; avoid overcorrection in a single session. Results last approximately 6–9 months.

products.name: RESTYLANE LYFT
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, HA 20 mg/mL, Lidocaine 0.3%
products.description: Restylane Lyft is a Galderma OBT cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler at 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%, formulated as a firm, high-G-prime gel for structural volumising of the cheeks, mid-face, and dorsal hands. FDA-approved for cheek augmentation and the correction of age-related mid-face volume deficit, it is placed supraperiosteally or in deep fat compartments to provide lift and structural support to overlying soft tissue with durability up to 12 months.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic use targeting facial volume restoration and contour correction during qualified clinical procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe containing HA 20 mg/mL with lidocaine 0.3%.
products.protocol: Inject supraperiosteally over the zygomatic arch and malar eminence, or into the deep medial cheek fat pad, using a 27G needle for targeted boluses or a 25G cannula for fanning technique. Deposit 0.1–0.4 mL per bolus point; aspirate before each injection. Typical cheek volumising session uses 1–3 mL per side. For dorsal hand rejuvenation, inject subcutaneously in 0.2–0.3 mL retrograde passes using a 25G cannula. Massage evenly post-procedure.

products.name: RESTYLANE + LIDOCAINE
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, 2 x 29G disposable needles
products.description: Restylane with Lidocaine is the original Galderma non-animal stabilised HA (NASHA) cross-linked filler at approximately 20 mg/mL, formulated with lidocaine for enhanced injection comfort. Supplied with two 29G disposable needles, it is designed for mid-dermal correction of moderate nasolabial folds, marionette lines, lip augmentation, and contour refinement, with a clinical track record exceeding 20 years and results reported to last 6–9 months.
products.indication: Designed for professional facial contouring, wrinkle correction, and lip and cheek enhancement within qualified clinical aesthetic procedures.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe with 2 x 29G (TW) disposable needles.
products.protocol: Inject into the mid-dermis using the supplied 29G needle via serial puncture or retrograde linear threading at 3–4 mm depth. Aspiration before each bolus is recommended. For nasolabial folds, inject 0.5–1.0 mL per fold; for lips, use 0.3–0.5 mL per session. Avoid superficial placement to prevent visible gel beading. Gentle massage post-injection ensures smooth integration. Re-treatment is typically required at 6–9 months.

products.name: RESTYLANE LYFT LIDOCAINE
products.description: Restylane Lyft with Lidocaine is a Galderma NASHA cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler formulated with lidocaine, with a larger gel particle size suited to deep-plane injection. FDA-approved and CE-marked for mid-to-deep dermal and subdermal correction of moderate-to-severe nasolabial folds, frown lines, and cheek volume enhancement, the robust gel provides structural lift at the supraperiosteal level with results durable up to 12 months. Supplied with two disposable needles.
products.indication: Designed for professional correction of moderate to severe facial wrinkles, nasolabial folds, and cheek volume enhancement within qualified clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe with 2 disposable needles included.
products.protocol: Inject into the deep dermis or supraperiosteal plane using a 27G needle; for nasolabial folds, target the deep dermal plane at 4–6 mm depth using linear threading or bolus technique, aspirating before each injection. Typical NLF dose: 1–2 mL per fold. For cheek volumising, inject deep boluses of 0.2–0.5 mL supraperiosteally. Avoid superficial placement — the large-particle gel is not suited to mid-dermal or intradermal injection. Touch-up at 4 weeks.

products.name: RESTYLANE SKINBOOSTERS VITAL LIDOCAINE
products.description: Restylane Skinboosters Vital with Lidocaine is a Galderma stabilised hyaluronic acid skinbooster designed for deep intradermal delivery to improve skin hydration, elasticity, and structural resilience in photodamaged or dehydrated skin. The lightly cross-linked HA integrates into the dermis to restore the water-binding matrix, with clinical evidence for improvement of skin elasticity, smoothness, and luminosity following 3 initial sessions. Results are reported to last up to 6 months with single maintenance top-up.
products.indication: Designed for professional skin rejuvenation protocols addressing sun-damaged or dehydrated skin through hydration and structural support of the dermis.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe with lidocaine. Minimum order quantity 10 units.
products.protocol: Administer as a series of 3 sessions spaced 4 weeks apart, then maintenance every 6 months. Inject into the deep dermis (3–4 mm) using a 30G or 32G needle with a micro-papule or serial puncture technique; typical grid spacing 1–1.5 cm. Standard full-face dose: 1–2 mL per session. Common treatment areas include face, neck, décolletage, and dorsal hands. Topical anaesthesia applied 30 min before is recommended. MOQ 10 units.

products.name: RESTYLANE VITAL LIGHT LIDOCAINE
products.specification: 1 mL x 1 Syr, 12 mg/ml HA + 3 mg/ml lidocaine, MOQ 10
products.description: Restylane Vital Light with Lidocaine is a Galderma stabilised hyaluronic acid skinbooster containing HA 12 mg/mL and lidocaine 3 mg/mL, formulated as a lighter alternative to Restylane Vital for sensitive, thin, or delicate skin areas. The reduced HA concentration allows intradermal placement in fine-skin zones — periorbital, perioral, and neck — where the higher-concentration Vital formulation would risk surface irregularities. It restores superficial dermal hydration and improves skin texture and glow, with results lasting approximately 6 months.
products.indication: Suitable for professional skin hydration and rejuvenation procedures targeting fine, thin, or sensitive skin areas within qualified clinical settings.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 1 mL pre-filled syringe containing HA 12 mg/ml with lidocaine 3 mg/ml. MOQ 10.
products.protocol: Administer as a 3-session course at 4-week intervals, followed by maintenance every 6 months. Inject into the superficial-to-mid dermis (2–3 mm) using a 32G or 30G needle via micro-papule nappage technique; grid spacing 0.8–1.2 cm. Typical dose per session: 0.5–1.5 mL depending on treatment area. Particularly suited for under-eye, neck, and décolletage boosting. Apply topical anaesthetic cream 30 minutes prior. MOQ 10 units.

products.name: DYSPORT 500 unit
products.description: Dysport (abobotulinumtoxinA, Ipsen/Galderma) is a botulinum toxin type A complex (Clostridium botulinum-derived hemagglutinin complex) supplied as a lyophilised powder in 500-unit vials. It blocks presynaptic acetylcholine release at the neuromuscular junction, producing reversible muscle relaxation over 3–6 months. The 500-unit vial format is used for larger aesthetic workloads — full-face anti-wrinkle treatment, hyperhidrosis, masseter reduction, and trapezius slimming — and for combination medical/aesthetic treatment sessions.
products.indication: Intended for professional aesthetic use within qualified clinical settings, administered by trained practitioners following manufacturer guidance.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 500 unit vial of botulinum toxin type A in lyophilized form.
products.protocol: Reconstitute with 2.5 mL of preservative-free 0.9% NaCl to yield 200 U/mL; swirl gently, do not shake. For aesthetic glabellar lines: 50 U total in 5 injections of 10 U each into corrugator (×4) and procerus (×1), using a 30G or 32G × 13 mm needle. For masseter reduction: 25–50 U per side deep intramuscular injection. For hyperhidrosis: 50–100 U per axilla via intradermal grid. Use within 4 hours of reconstitution; store reconstituted vial at 2–8°C.

products.name: XEOMIN 100 unit
products.description: Xeomin (incobotulinumtoxinA, Merz) is a highly purified botulinum toxin type A product from which accessory complexing proteins have been removed, leaving only the active 150 kDa neurotoxin molecule. This protein-free formulation may reduce the risk of antibody formation with repeat treatments. Supplied as 100-unit lyophilised vials, it is FDA-approved and CE-marked for glabellar line correction (20 U standard dose) and upper-limb spasticity; aesthetic applications extend to crow's feet, forehead lines, and brow lifting.
products.indication: Intended for professional aesthetic use within qualified clinical settings, administered by trained practitioners following manufacturer guidance.
products.packaging: Supplied as a 100 unit vial of botulinum toxin type A in lyophilized form.
products.protocol: Reconstitute the 100-unit vial with 2.5 mL of preservative-free 0.9% NaCl to yield 4 U/0.1 mL. For glabellar lines: inject 4 U per site (0.1 mL) into 5 sites — 2 in each corrugator muscle, 1 in procerus — using a 30–33G × 13 mm needle intramuscularly. Typical aesthetic full-face session uses 40–100 U. Onset within 3–7 days; duration up to 3–4 months. Refrigerate unused vials; use reconstituted product within 24 hours.

products.name: BOTOX 50 (Allergan)
products.description: Botox 50 (onabotulinumtoxinA, Allergan/AbbVie) is the 50-unit vial of the world's most clinically studied botulinum toxin type A, with regulatory approvals spanning glabellar lines, lateral canthal lines, and forehead lines in aesthetic applications. The 50-unit format is commonly used for single-area or combination small-area aesthetic sessions, reducing wastage in practices where treating one or two regions per patient is the norm. Each unit of Botox is not interchangeable in dose with other botulinum products.
products.indication: Intended for professional aesthetic use within qualified clinical settings, administered by trained practitioners following manufacturer guidance.
products.packaging: Supplied per manufacturer specification as a botulinum toxin preparation vial.
products.protocol: Reconstitute with 1.25 mL of preservative-free 0.9% NaCl to yield 4 U/0.1 mL, or 2.5 mL for 2 U/0.1 mL for more dilute techniques. For glabellar lines: 20 U total in 5 sites (4 U/0.1 mL each) using a 30G or 32G needle. For lateral canthal lines: 12 U per side in 3 injections. For forehead: 10–20 U in 4–6 sites. Inject intramuscularly with 30–33G needle; onset 3–5 days; duration 3–4 months. Use within 4 hours after reconstitution.

products.name: JUVIDERM
products.specification: VOLUMA HA 20mg/mL / VOLIFT HA 17.5mg/mL / VOLITE HA 25mg/mL / VOLBELLA HA 25mg/mL, Lidocaine 0.3%
products.description: Juvederm (Allergan/AbbVie) is a Vycross- or BDDE-cross-linked hyaluronic acid filler range with lidocaine 0.3%, offered in four distinct formulations: Voluma (HA 20 mg/mL) for deep volumising of the cheeks and mid-face; Volift (HA 17.5 mg/mL) for moderate folds and lip augmentation; Volite (HA 25 mg/mL) for intradermal skin quality improvement; and Volbella (HA 25 mg/mL) for lips and fine perioral lines. Each variant is engineered at a specific G-prime to match the target tissue plane and indication.
products.indication: Designed for professional aesthetic use across volume restoration, contouring, hydration, and fine-line refinement, with the variant selected by treatment objective.
products.packaging: Hyaluronic acid filler line with lidocaine 0.3% across Voluma, Volift, Volite, and Volbella variants.
products.protocol: Voluma: inject supraperiosteally using a 25G cannula or 27G needle for cheek volumising (0.5–2 mL per side). Volift: mid-dermal injection via 27G needle for nasolabial folds (0.5–1.5 mL per fold) or submucosal for lip body augmentation. Volbella: superficial dermal threading with 30G needle for vermilion border and fine perioral lines (0.3–0.8 mL total). Volite: intradermal micro-papule injection at 2–3 mm depth with 30G needle, 3-session course 4 weeks apart. Aspirate before each bolus across all variants.
